■ ON THEIR WAY: New Heat Surge MV.2 miracle heaters will soon be delivered to lucky Fitchburg area residents who beat the 48-hour order deadline
and live in one of the zip code areas listed in today’s publication. Everyone’s getting the upstairs-downstairs efficiency combo of two Heat Surge MV.2
miracle heaters because they only use pennies an hour of electricity to drastically slash home heat bills.

# New heaters go to Massachusetts residents by zip code


# Brand new heaters are being delivered to the first Fitchburg area residents who call before the 48 hour


# order deadline ends to get the new MV.2 miracle heaters to drastically slash home heat bills


# Never be cold again: If you live in one of the Fitchburg area zip codes listed below call the special 48 hour hotlines to get the


# new heater that only uses about the same energy per hour as a coffee maker to help make heat bills hit rock bottom

MASSACHUSETTS – The Toll
Free Hotlines are ringing off the
hook.
That’s because Fitchburg area res-
idents who find the first two digits of
their zip code listed in today’s publi-
cation are getting new heaters that
quickly put a stop to high heat bills
forever.
Fitchburg area residents who get
the new Heat Surge® MV.2 miracle
heaters by calling the Toll Free Hot-
lines before the 48-hour order dead-
line ends will never have to pay high
heat bills again.
“We all know that freezing cold
weather is coming and heat bills
are going to skyrocket this winter.
That’s why I’ve given the directive
to give the first Fitchburg area resi-
dents who call in the next 48 hours a
massive discount on our brand new
MV.2 miracle heaters,” said David
Martin, General Manager of U.S.
based Heat Surge.
Heat Surge’s latest heating miracle
is being called the MV.2 Efficiency
because its micro design easily goes
from room to room to help you save a
ton on heat bills.
Demand for Heat Surge heaters has
skyrocketed to stardom ever since
consumer reviews surfaced showing
just how much money ultra-efficient
zone heat saves people on heat bills
which is why this announcement is
being so widely advertised.
According to the avalanche of con-
sumer reviews for the original Heat
Surge heaters, people absolutely
swear by them, repeatedly saying, “it
saves money,” “looks beautiful,” and
“keeps you warm and cozy.” That’s
why Fitchburg area residents will be
scrambling to get them starting at
precisely 8:30am this morning.
The new Heat Surge MV.2 Effi-
ciency heats for just fourteen cents
an hour to drastically slash home
heat bills.
In fact, it gives you 74° of bone-
soothing room heat even when the
home thermostat is turned down to
59°. That means you can zone heat
and never be cold again. And since it
only uses about the same energy per
hour as a coffee maker you’ll save a
ton on your heat bills, too.
And here’s the best part. A 2-Day
Double Coupon has been reprinted
in today’s publication for readers to
use.
By using this coupon, everyone
who calls is being rewarded with
$100 off. That makes this a remark-
able new heater a real steal at just
$ 149. Since this is a Double Coupon
Deal, it not only gives you a massive
discount, but also entitles you to Free
shipping and Free handling.
The new MV.2 miracle heater
comes with Fireless Flame tech-
nology that gives you the peaceful
flicker of a real fire but without any
flames, fumes, ashes, or mess so it’s
totally safe to the touch.
The good news is, the new Heat
Surge MV.2 miracle heater is vir-
tually maintenance free and comes
fully assembled, so all you have to do
is plug it in and relax in front of the
Fireless Flame.
People everywhere got off easy last
winter, but everyone knows that the
cold weather is setting in this year.
And we all know that frigid cold tem-
peratures mean skyrocketing heat
bills.
That’s why everyone is rushing to
get the new Heat Surge MV.2 miracle
heater that saves a ton of money on
heat bills with zone heating and
keeps you warm all winter long.
“We’re bracing ourselves for all the
calls because everyone who wants
to really save on their heat bills and
stay warm this winter will be call-
ing immediately to make sure they
get their new heater at a massive dis-
count,” said Martin.
Readers can use the 2-Day Double
Coupon more than once. But there is
a catch. You can only get away with it
for the next two days from the date
of today’s publication by calling the
Toll Free Hotline before the deadline
ends.
“To make sure everyone gets their
new Heat Surge MV.2 miracle heater
before the harsh winter weather hits,
UPS® drivers have been instructed
to make home deliveries anywhere in
the United States,” Martin said.
“Just remember, to get your
new heater you must find the first
two digits of your zip code listed
in today’s publication and be one
of the first Fitchburg area read-
ers to call the Toll Free Hotline at
1-800-789-3172 before the 48-hour
deadline ends,” he said.

C4 Monday, February 28, 2005 The Herald Bulletin
i 2004 Media Services S 6082 Of 116520-1 Advertisement

# New advanced portable heater can


# cut your heating bill up to 50%


# Heats a large room in 5 minutes with


# even heat wall to wall and floor to ceiling


# Does not get hot, cannot start a fire and


# w ill not reduce hum idity or oxygen


# Never be cold again How it works:


## Cannot start a fire; a child or animal


## can touch or sit on it without harm

By John Whitehead, Media Services
A remarkable new advanced
quart/ infrared portable heater,
the EdenPure , can cut your
heating bills by 50%.
The EdenPure* can pay for
itself in a matter of weeks and
then start putting a great deal
of extra money in your pock­
et after that.
And that’s just the start of the
benefits the new EdenPure"
Quart/ Infrared Portable Heater.
The number one cause of
residential fires in the United
States is portable heaters. But
the EdenPure cannot cause a
fire. That is because the quart/
infrared heating element never
gets to a temperature that can
ignite anything.
The outside of the Eden­
Pure * only gets warm to the
touch so that it will not burn
children or pets. Pets can
sleep on it when it is operat­
ing without harm.
The EdenPure® w ill also
make you healthier. That is
because, unlike other heating
sources, it w ill not reduce hu­
midity or oxygen in the room.
Typical heating sources re­
duce humidity which dries
out your sinuses, makes you
more susceptible to disease
and makes your skin dry.
With other heating sources,
you'll notice that you get
sleepy when the heat comes
on because they are burning
up oxygen.
The advanced space-age
EdenPure® Quartz Infrared
Portable Heater also heats the
room evenly, wall-to-wall and
floor-to-ceiling. Other heating
sources heat rooms unevenly
with most of the heat concen­
trated high in the room and to
the center of the room. And.
as you know, portable heaters
only heat an area a few feet
around the heater. With the
EdenPure , the temperature
will not vary one degree in
any part of the room.
Unlike other heating sources,
the EdenPure cannot put poi­
sonous carbon monoxide into a
room or any type of fumes or
any type of harmful radiation.
For more details on the
amazing EdenPure Quart/
Infrared Portable Heater, here
is my interview with one of
the developers. William Bur­
kett, from BioTech Research.
Q. VV hat is the origin of
this amazing heating ele­
ment in the EdenPure®?
A. This advanced heating
element was discovered acci­
dentally by a man named
John Jones. He had a large old
farmhouse that was impossi­
ble to heat. Jones had a coal
furnace in his basement.
Jones placed a sheet of cured
copper near the furnace to
store it. Cured copper is a type
of copper that goes through an
extensive heating process to
give it special properties.
After the fire went out in
the coal furnace, Jones no­
ticed that the sheet of copper
was heating his entire base­
ment evenly, even though the
furnace was no longer
putting out heat. He also was
amazed as to how long the
heat stayed in the copper and
continued to warm the room.
Jones was so taken hack by
this that he started to experi­
ment. He formed a company
with me to develop a heating
source out of this cured cop­
per. But Jones had a number
other hazardous situations like
creating carbon monoxide or
radiation. He also did not want
his children to get burned.
To make a long story short,
through a great deal of research
and development, Jones and I
developed a heating source that
utilized commercial infrared
quartz tubes.
Q. What advantages does
infrared quartz tube heating
source have over other heat­
ing source products?
A. John Jones and I de­
signed his heating source
around the three most impor­
tant consumer benefits: econ­
omy, comfort, and safety. The
final development of this in­
frared quartz heat source can­
not be matched by any other
heating system in the world.
In the EdenPure * system,
electricity is used to generate
infrared light which, in turn,
creates a very safe heat. In­
frared is the safest form of
heat because ii does not create
carbon monoxide or harmful
radiation. And, most impor­
tantly, infrared heat does not
reach a burning temperature.
After a great deal of re­
search and development, very
efficient infrared heat cham­
bers were developed that uti­
lize three unique patented sol­
id copper heat exchangers in
one EdenPure* heater. Over 5
years of research and field,
testing and real life testing
stand behind this heat source.
It has worked in residential
and commercial applications
worldwide.
Q. Why is it that this
quartz infrared heating
source uses less energy to
create heat than other
of children and he did not
want a heating source that
would cause a fire or create
sources?
A. Actually, there is more
than one reason. One of the
primary reasons is that heat at
Therefore, the heat is not
evenly distributed, causing a
very inefficient and uncom­
fortable heat source.
The EdenPure* Quartz In­
frared Portable Heater does
not use burning heat. Once
the heat exchanger absorbs
the infrared heat, it exhales
the heat into the living area
which is carried by the exist­
ing humidity in the air. This
Causes the heat to travel
rapidly and evenly through­
out a room.
In actual studies, photos
using infrared lighting
demonstrated that the heat
was almost perfectly even
from floor-to-ceiling and
wall-to-wall. The Eden Pure *
Quartz Infrared efficiency is
based on the distribution of
energized air, not on just fan
movement. This heat is
coined as "soft heat" due to
how comfortable it is.
Q. What are the other
disadvantages of combus­
tion heat sources?
A. Heat sources that are
above the burning level have
many unhealthy side effects.
One of these is that it creates
dry, irritating indoor air. It al­
so burns a great deal of oxy­
gen in the air. If you remem­
ber, when you sit in front of a
fireplace or a portable heater
combustion level, which is
w hat all other heat sources
use, causes the heat to in­
stantly rise to the ceiling.
or close to a heat source, you
will remember yawning. This
is because you are not getting
enough oxygen.
This dry irritating heat and
lack of oxygen dries out sinus­
es and mucus in the throat,
and makes people susceptible
to disease. The lack of oxygen
causes fatigue.
Also, many combustible
heat sources produce carbon
monoxide, static cling, and
some produce radiation.
rect. Asa matter of fact, pets
arc actually drawn to this heat
because it is a natural source
of heat, just like the sun heats
the earth. Animals are much
more instinctive than hu­
mans. This heat not only
heats the air, but it also heats
the objects in the room. It is a
perfectly balanced heat.
The EdenPure*5 has a real
wood outer finish.
Q. How can a person cut
their heating hill
Q. So you're saying thai
children or pets can come
up to this unit and touch it
and not be harmed?
A. That is absolutely cor­
by up to
50% w ith the EdenPure®?
A. First, the EdenPure®’
uses 35% less energy to cre­
ate heat than other sources,
hut that is just part of why it
will cut a person’s heating
bill. The EdenPure® will heat
a room in about 5 minutes.
Therefore, you can turn the
heat down in your house to
as low as 50 degrees, but the
room you are occupying,
which has the EdenPure *,
will be warm and comfort­
able. When you move to an­
other room, it will quickly
heat that room also. This
drastically cuts heating bills
by up to 50%.
Q. I also understand
that the EdenPure® pro­
duces clean fresh air with­
out furnace filters. How
can it do that?
A. A furnace generates a
lot of dust due to the combus­
tion. By lowering the furnace
temperature, you are not go­
ing through the furnace and
therefore reducing the re­
quirement for the furnace fil­
ters. Also, when there’s no
combustion, there are no
harmful fumes.
Q. So, the EdenPure® Is to­
tally safe to use?
A. It absolutely is. The
heating source in the Eden­
Pure® has an A-1 insurance
rating. It also has zero clear­
ance, w hich means you can
push it up against the Eden­
Pure® w ithout burning. Tests
prove the unit does not trans­
mit any energy into the atmos­
phere that will burn or harm

# Never Be Cold Again with


# the “Cadillac of Heaters”


# Over 3 million EdenPURE heaters sold since 2006


# Comfortably and evenly heat nearly any size room


# in minutes without reducing humidity or oxygen

Media Services Special Report
Never be cold again with
the EdenPURE Advanced
Infrared Portable Heater,
which has been considered
the “Cadillac of Heaters” for
nearly a decade because of
its unparalleled quality and
superior heating abilities.
Since 2006 these incredi-
ble heaters have been satisfy-
ing the heating needs of over
3 million happy customers.
The world-famous Eden-
PURE provides a superior
kind of heat that is comfort-
able and soft. The safe infra-
red heat of EdenPURE gen-
tly heats its anti-microbial
copper tubes, where the heat
transfers to passing air by ac-
tually “riding” the humidity.
Since it works with the
natural humidity of the room,
the warm air spreads evenly
and quickly throughout the
room, from fl oor to ceiling
and wall to wall. This kind
of heating also allows for the
warming of objects in the
room, making the warmth
more effective and longer
lasting.
Unlike the EdenPURE’s
unmatched fl oor to ceiling
and wall to wall, evenly dis-
tributed warmth, most cheap
space heaters and imitations
keep the heat concentrated
in the center of the room
and lose most of the heat up
to the ceiling, producing a
very uneven, ineffi cient and
uncomfortable heat. If you
aren’t sitting within a few
feet of these old-style heat-
ers, it is hard to tell if they are
even working.
Other space heaters also
deprive the air of its humidity
by producing that all too fa-
miliar dry heat. This typical-
ly will leave your skin, and
sinuses dried out, and your
clothes staticky and your hair
unmanageable. Not only is
this extremely uncomfort-
able but the dry air will leave
you more susceptible to ill-
ness.
In addition to depriv-
ing the air of humidity,
most heating sources reduce
oxygen levels as well. Us-
ing combustion as a heating
source, they suck up much of
the surrounding oxygen and
sometimes replace it with
harmful gases.
Thankfully, the Eden-
PURE doesn’t remove the
oxygen from the air. Eden-
PURE’s infrared heat is the
safest form of heat because it
never gets to burning temper-
atures. Therefore, it doesn’t
emit poisonous gases or
harmful radiation like other
heating sources might.
Also, the way that the
EdenPURE produces heat
makes it absolutely safe with
no risk of starting a fi re. This
is welcoming news because
the popularity of space heat-
ers has risen and they have
become one of the leading
causes of residential house
fi res.
The EdenPURE heater
does not reach burning tem-
peratures, which means the
outside of the unit will never
get hot and is completely safe
for kids and pets. As a matter
of fact, the infrared heat pro-
duced by the EdenPURE is a
natural form of heat, similar
to the sun’s warmth. You will
actually see your pets being
attracted to the EdenPURE
heater and sometimes laying
or sleeping around it or even
on top of it.
Since EdenPURE’s orig-
inal successful launch nearly
a decade ago, many fl y-by-
copy the “Cadillac of Heat-
ers” but have been unable to
match its quality.
Beware of the cheap,
wannabe knockoffs because
their performance just cannot
compare to the EdenPURE
and they will not hold up like
the time-tested and trusted
EdenPURE will.
Today, readers of this pa-
per have the opportunity to
receive the largest discounts
ever on brand new 2015
EdenPURE Infrared Portable
Heaters.
This special offer expires
night companies have tried to
in 72 hours. If you order after
that, we reserve the right to
either accept or reject order
requests at the discounted
price. See the attached Spe-
cial Reader’s Direct Discount
Voucher to take advantage of
this savings opportunity.
All orders are protected
by EdenPURE’s “no ques-
tions asked” 60-day money-
back guarantee as well as its
2-year manufacturer warran-
ty and EdenPURE’s National
Service Network.

# How It Works & Why It’s Better

1. Electricity ignites powerful
infrared elements which
heat patented anti-
microbial copper tubes.
INSIDE
VIEW
3. The heat “rides” the natural
humidity in the room allowing it
to disperse evenly from fl oor to
ceiling and from wall to wall.
2. The copper tubes heat the passing air, producing a “soft heat” without reducing oxygen or humidity in the air.

# Public slashing heat bills


# Free giveaway launches new Heat Sui*ge mobile fireplace that actually uses less


# energy than a coffee maker. Leave it on all night, eveiy night and never be cold again.

It easily rolls into any room

## to throw an instant heat wave


## with no chimney, no vents, no


## wood, no smoke, and no mess

By Mark Woods
Universal Media Syndicate
(UMS) Everyone hates high heat bills.
But we’re sick and tired of turning down the
thermostat and always being cold.
So, just imagine a delivery truck arriving
at your door with a beautiful fireplace that
instant ly let’s you feel bone-soothing heat in
any room.
Well now ifs really happening. Starting
at precisely 8:15 am today, new Heat Surge
Fireless Flame Power Units are actually
being given away free to the general public.
The only thing local readers have to do is
call the National Distribution Center before
the deadline at midnight tomorrow with
their order for the fireplace mantle that best
fits their budget.
And everyone who does is being awarded
a Heat Surge Power Unit absolutely free.
This free giveaway announcement for
readers of this newspaper is for the next
2 days only.
It’s all happening because Heat Surge
wants to make sure everyone gets these
all-in-one Mobile Fireplaces that are now
being delivered directly to the homes of
those who beat the deadline so they can
immediately start saving on their heat bills.
“We can barely kt»ep up ever since we
released this advertising announcement.
Now that ifs cold out, everyone’s going to be
getting them. Our people are working their
fingers to the bone to be sure everyone gets
their delivery in time to still save a lot of
money,” said Timothy Milton, National Ship­
ping Director.
“This mobile fireplace is the latest home
decorating sensation that actually gives
you a beautifully redecorated room while
it quickly heats a nice size room from floor
to ceiling and from wall to wall. It’s the
only way to dress up any room, stay really
warm and slash your heat bills all at the
same time,” said Josette Holland, Home
Makeover expert to the rich and famous.
The free Heat Surge Power Units are be­
ing encased in a choice of two smart look­
ing fireplace mantles. But, here’s the biggest
surprise. The Heat Surge company has even
arranged for readers to get their Fireless
Flame Power Units encased in real Amish
built solid wood fireplace mantles. They are
being handmade in the USA in the heart of
Amish country. They are even hand rubbed,
stained and varnished. You just can’t find
custom made Amish heirloom furniture like
this in the national chain stores.
Now everyone is trying to get a mobile
fireplace because they are perfect for homes,
apartments, basements, condos, mobile
homes, workshops and even a grand manor.
With this kind of flexibility, anyone can
have a fireplace in just seconds. That’s be­
cause all you do is just plug it in.
Even people in California and Florida
will be flocking to get them so they will nev­
er have to turn their furnace on all winter.
And since it uses less energy than a coffee
maker the potential savings are absolutely
incredible.
The patented Heat Surge Fireless Flame
gives you the peaceful flicker of a real fire
without any flames, fumes, smells, ashes
or mess. They are so popular because they
require no flue, no chimney and no vent.
“A house with a wood burning fireplace
is typically worth at least $5,000 more. So
starting at just three hundred ninety seven
dollars the beautiful imported fireplace
mantles are a real steal. Everyone who sees
this full size fireplace is so impressed be­
cause ifs big enough for even Santa to get
down,” Holland said.
“We are trying to make sure no one gets
left out. So, for now we’re turning away all
dealers to let local readers get the ones they
want, as long as they call within the next
2 days," confirms Milton. “Everyone is try­
ing to get them so if the lines are busy please
keep trying. We promise to get to every
call,” he said.
Those who miss the deadline will pay a
lot more to heat their homes this winter

being loaded full of MIRA‑COOL air coolers and soon will be ready to go. The new MIRA‑COOL air cooler is a real steal at just

cool this summer. But just turning

the MIRA‑COOL air cooler which

so you can turn down the central

on their electric bills.

this summer. But just turning on your air

The Cool Surge® eco-friendly air cooler helps

but runs for just pennies a day. That’s because
it uses about 96% less electricity than a typical
air conditioner.
And here’s the best part, readers of this

one FREE when they order one, and cover

Surge portable air cooler that easily rolls from
room-to-room so you can take the ice cooled
air with you anywhere. That way, everyone
who gets them first can immediately turn
down the air, save on their electric bill and
beat the sweltering heat.
The Cool Surge uses the same energy as a 60
watt light bulb, yet throws off ice cooled air to
keep you cool all day and night. The potential
energy savings are absolutely incredible.

and at night, just roll it into your bedroom and

HOW IT WORKS:The
Cool Surge portable
air cooler is a work of engineering genius
from the China coast so advanced that no
windows, vents or freon are required. It’s as
easy to use as a baby’s vaporizer and even
includes two sets of the reusable glacier
ice blocks. That gives you a total of eight
hours of extra cooling power. It uses the
same electricity as a 60 watt light bulb, yet
it blasts out ice cooled air. The hi-efficiency
motor cools the air in an average sized
room up to ten degrees so you’ll instantly
feel cool and refreshed. The 3 cooling
levels and auto shut off timer put all the
comfort controls at your fingertips. It’s so
impressive that it even comes with a full
year limited warranty and a 30-day Money
Back Guarantee.

# Home Energy Costs

Source: EPA Energy Star
■ Air conditioning
costs home owners $11
billion every year and
window air conditioner
units cost up to $500.00!

idential units to the public

that it is the best air purifier in
the world.

common oxygen, which is O
2

3

activated oxygen contacts the

. Q. But why do they give
ozcne levels in air pollution
alerts? Does ozone cause
an allergic reaction?
A. Absolutely not. Ozone
relieves allergies. That alert
is a big misunderstanding.
Nature~increases ozone in
high pollution conditions to
balance out pollution. So the
weather services measure
ozone levels to determine
how high the pollution
because ozone is easy to
measure.
Q. There are so many air
purifiers on the market.
How does the PROZONE 8
differ?
A. You cannot compare
the PROZONE 3 with any
othef air purifier on the mar-
ket. That would be like com-
paring a diamond to a lump
of coal.
The PROZONE 3 has a
patented technology and other
air purifiers do not have it.
Other air purifiers fall into 3
categories. One is forced air
filtration systems where the
filter has to be changed. Two,
are electrostatic filter systems
where an electrically charged
plate snares a few types of
pollutants. But, the electrical-
ly charged plate has to be
cleaned. And, three, as afore-
mentioned, electric sparks
ozone air purifiers which pro-
duce oxides of nitrogen that
form an acid in the air which
is corrosive and toxic. The
electric spark can cause
explosions and it 'will interfere
with radio and T.V. signals.
Typical air purifiers require
the air to be brought to and
pulied through the unit, either
by a fan or electronic charge.
This causes the pollutants to
be drawn through the area to
the machine. They do not
eliminate pollutants at the
source. Therefore they are
very inefficient.
The PROZONE 3 patented
activated oxygen generator
disperses activated oxygen
like guided missiles through-
out the room. It seeks out
and destroys pollutants at
the source without the pollu-
tants having to come to the
actual machine.
Q. What about the air
purifiers that claim to have
no moving parts, no fans,
and no filters? Does it
operate on the same prin-
cipal as the PROZONE 8 ?
A. No. Those units are
electrostatic filters. You must
pull out the electrostatic plate
and wipe it off. The air has to
go through the unit and
therefore there is no way it
can come close to cleaning
the air to the level of the
PROZONE 5 .
If those units have an ultra-
violet bulb, they will kill some
fungus and bacteria. But if
they do not have an ultraviolet
bulb, when you go to wipe
them off, fungus and bacteria
that you are wiping off is alive
and can be harmful. Those
units produce some ozone
but, again, it doesn't produce
enough to be effective and it
also can produce oxides of
nitrogen which can be harm-
ful. Those units have no fan.
They say it moves air with an
electronic charge. There is
no way to purify the air in a
room without a fan. Electron-
ic charge air movement is
very minimal.
Q. Does the PROZONE 3
have anything you have to
clean, is there anything
you have to replace, and
does it run quiet?
A. There is nothing to
clean and nothing to replace.
And, the fan runs super quiet.
Q. What is the range of
pollutants that the PRO-
ZONE* takes out of the air?
A. It removes nearly all
organic and inorganic pollu-
tants.

urine, cooking odors, skunk

and creosote from fireplaces,
it also kills viruses.
The PROZONE 3 removes
the following inorganic pollu-

ene chloride, phenols, PCBs,
humic acid, DIMPs, explosives
such as TNT, glycerols,
kepones, methy! ethyl key-
tones, acetone from fingernail
filings, siyrene. all types of nitre
compounds, formic'acid, ben-
zoic, butanes, ethanes, pen-
tanes, propanes, methanes,
alcohols, cyanides, detergents,
phosphates and many more
too numerous to mention here.
The Wall Street Journal
recently reported that there is 5
times more air pollution in a
house than there is in the open
air outside the house. Every
day you breathe all these pol-
lutants into your lungs and

gen in the air and you will be

gen. Also, the air is ionized

ionized air makes you more

The odor elimination power

mites, and other pollutants

lens and dust mites. Yet, at

in the presence of the PRO-
ZONE-.
Q. Will the PROZONE 8
get rid of carbon monox-
ide?
A. Yes. Many people do
not realize that most houses
have carbon monoxide but it
is not to a level detectable by
a carbon monoxide detector.
Bui, this carbon monoxide
can be very toxic and dam-
aging to your health. The
PROZONE 2 removes this low
level carbon monoxide.
Q. How much electricity
does the PROZONE 3 use?
A. Only 50 watts. There-
fore, you use no more electric-
ity than a 50 watt light bulb.
Q. Is the PROZONE®
totally safe to use?
A. Definitely yes. The same
PROZONE 3 air purifier tech-
nology is used by the Federal

. A. The PROZONE 2 comes

# Finally, new advanced sw in g method


# enables weekend golfers to learn in 30


# minutes to hit 230 to 270 yard drives,


# straight down the middle, nearly every time.


# And Dramatically improves wood and iron play, too.

By Jerry Heard
PGA Golf Professional
South Seas Plantation
(Captiva Island, FL)
I am writing to notify golfers
about a recent development here at
The Heard Golf Academy that I
believe is the biggest advancement in
golf in the past 50 years. After years
of intense research and experimenta­
tion, I have finally developed a golf
swing that I believe not only pro­
duces the longest and most accurate
driver, wood and iron hits ever but
also is the quickest and easiest to
master.
We have named this new
advancement “The Heard Super
Swing.”
I am personally testifying to you
today that this new advanced swing
has dramatically improved my game,
even though my old swing carried me
to many PGA Tour championships. I
have also personally witnessed that it
has dramatically improved the game
of many amateur golfers to whom we
have taught it here at the Heard Golf
Academy.
The Heard Super Swing was
developed from a number of sources.
You are probably well aware of
the new swing method used by Mo
Norman that has been widely publi­
cized in the golf magazines. There is
also a major golf school that indepen­
dently and scientifically developed
the type of swing used by Mo
Norman. This type of golf swing is
based on the naturalization of the golf
swing that better adapts to the human
body.
But we found this more natural
golf swing, although much easier to
learn, still had its drawbacks with
regard to distance and several other
factors concerning the ability to work
the ball left to right and up and down.
The Heard Golf Academy has
also been working on our own new
advanced golf swing over the past 5
years. We have also found major
flaws in the standard golf swing
which is generally referred to as the
“Vardon Grip” golf swing.
The “Vardon Grip,” as you know,
has the club being held in the crease
where the fingers meet the palm in
the left hand. The right hand is then
crossed extensively over the left hand
and then the last finger of the right
and first finger of the left are inter­
locked or overlapped. The problem
with the “Vardon Grip” is that it caus­
es unnatural swing motions with the
human anatomy and causes the swing
to come in on multiple planes, which
unnecessarily over-complicates the
swing making it difficult to master.
Most amateurs never master the
“Vardon Grip” swing and seldom
improve their game no matter how
many years they play.
But we found that the new natural
swing also had major flaws. The
stance, address and length of the
backswing caused distance and con­
trol problems as mentioned.
For the past 2 years, we have
modified the natural-type swing and
we have added in new advancements
to the golf swing that we had been
experimenting with over the past 5
years.
What we came up with, we
believe, is the ultimate golf swing,
The Heard Super Swing. We have
been able to teach many amateur
golfers this swing in a matter of min­
utes. I have seen driver, wood and
**rv „ J
iron shots improve almost instantly.
They were able to master this swing
in a matter of days and in some cases
in a matter of hours.
With The Heard Super Swing, the
distance and accuracy of the wood
and iron shots of these amateur
golfers improved so substantially that
I was literally shocked. One amateur
golfer I taught used to drive the ball
only 150 to 180 yards with numerous
far left or right shots and numerous
ground balls. After being taught The
Heard Super Swing, the same golfer
started hitting the ball straight down
the middle, 200 yards to 250 yards
and over 250 yards in some cases. I
have seen some amateur golfers drive
the ball 270 yards using The Heard
Super Swing.
I saw these same amateurs hit
iron shots that were sprayed all over
the place, with hits going sometimes
low and sometimes high. After being
taught The Heard Super Swing, they
quickly started hitting the ball
straight, high and holding the green
with a backspin.
Although The Heard Super
Swing is the most advanced and most
effective ever developed, it is simple
to use. You never think of more than
one thing at a time. There is a certain
thing you do to modify your grip, a
certain thing you do to modify your
stance and an easy change to the tra­
ditional swing. It’s as easy as 1-2-3,
and that’s it.
Here are just a few testimonials:
This is going to be hard to
believe, but it is the truth. I received
your Video and instruction on
Wednesday, played golf that day
(Wednesday) with my old swing and
shot 105, my handicap is 27. Then,
after watching the video and reading
the instruction Wednesday evening, I
went to the driving range Thursday
and hit a bag of balls, then played
golf on Friday using the new swing
and shot 89, also with my first hole in
one in sixty years. The change was
almost unbelievable if I wasn’t doing
it myself.
E.M.
Portsmouth, VA
I would like to take this opportu­
nity to thank you for the recent Golf
lesson showing me the Jerry Heard
Super Swing. I am 48 years old and
have been struggling with the game
of Golf for over 35 years.
As with most weekend golfers, I
have tried just about every technique,
gadget and golf tip on the market
with minimal results. My handicap
has varied from IO to 15, but with no
consistency or even confidence. The
simplicity of this swing, as well as the
method of explaining it in layman’s
terms, has enabled me to finally strike
the golf ball with the accuracy and
confidence that I have strived for all
these years. In my first round of golf
using this swing, I was able to hit
every fairway off the tee and most
greens in regulation.
I truly feel like a born-again
golfer! Thank you very much once
again.
DW.
Captiva Island, Florida
I feel like I owe you an apology
for having just reluctantly ordered
yesterday and having played one
round of golf after reading the
book, I must say that you have me
convinced that your new concepts
are totally valid!
With no practice prior to the
round, owing to the press of time on
the first day of daylight savings time,
I shot a round at just three over par
on a course that usually has my num­
ber and on which I seldom break 80.
Contact with the ball was “on-
center” on almost all shots from the
driver down to chip shots, and,
except for not making a putt of con­
sequence all day long, the round was
like a dream come true! My tendency
for a long time has been to come
down over and outside the ball with a
series of weak hits on the heel of
most all clubs — not so today, for
almost all shots were solid with a
beautiful draw action which seemed
under control consistently.
Keep up the good work and
thanks a million!
J.M
Montgomery, AL
In 1995,1 injured my back which
required corrective surgery. I thought
my golfing days were over.
In the fall of 19%, one of Jerry
Heard's instructors told me he could
teach me to play golf without reinjur­
ing my back. He said I would need to
develop better golf techniques. Jerry
and his staff took the time and
patience to teach me a better tech­
nique — and an easy method of
developing a consistent golf swing.
The Super Swing was easy to
understand. I am once again enjoy­
ing my retirement years playing golf.
your new book and tape, having
said to myself, “don’t bother, it will
just be more of the same, etc.” —
after having received the packet

## Jerry Heard, former PGA Tour player, best-selling


## golf instruction book author, and head of Ti. e


## Heard Golf Academy at South Seas Plantation on


## Captiva Island, Florida, has now developed “The


## Heard Super Swing" which enables average


## golfers to hit long, straight drives after only 30


## minutes of instruction. This new advanced swing


## also improves wood and iron play and can cut 10


## to 17 strokes off a weekend golfer’s score.

27


Page 6/Section 2 Daily Herald
Tuesday, May 21,1996
©I996S-029I OFI090R-4IHS® Advertisement
Media Service Inc.

# GOLF BULLETIN:


# Chicago scientist develops new superior golf


# swing that produces much more distance and


# accuracy and is amazingly easy to master


# Many PGA pros are switching and most average


# golfers cut strokes off of their scores immediately

By John Whitehead
(Canton, OH) Jerry Heard,
one of the top Tour pros ever to
play the game, best-selling author
of the book The Golf Secrets of
the Big-Money Pros, and Heard
Academy founder, has conducted
real-life experiments with average
golfers and tour pros using the
Natural Golf Swing System™.
Results have been amaz-
ing. Not only has Jerry added 10 to
15 yards to his drives and is hitting
more accurate shots consistently,
but he has seen amateurs who
haven't played in months immedi-
ately hit longer straighter shots
and cut strokes from their game.
The Natural Golf Swing
System uses the "Natural Palm
Grip™" and Swing techniques as
its base. It was developed by a
Chicago scientist and gives every
golfer the highest probability of
hitting strong, accurate shots con-
sistently. It eliminates confusing
and conflicting instructions by pro-
viding an easy-to-learn, repeatable
golf swing.
Moe Norman, who many
feel may be the best ball striker
ever, independently also devel-
oped the Natural Golf Swing that
validates the scientific analysis.
What is so fascinating is
that, independent of one another,
Norman's discovery of the Natural
Golf Swing was guided by instinct,
Natural Golfs by science.
The 4 basic principles of
the Natural Golf Swing System™
are the palm grip, wide stance,
arm/shaft single axis and facing
the ball at impact. So consistent is
Moe's swing that he once hit 1,540
drives all landing inside a 30 yard
landing zone.
You can have the same
consistency as Moe using the
Natural Golf Swing System™.
Here is how the Natural
Golf Swing was developed. In
1984, a Chicago physicist, Jack
Kuykendall had the goal of cutting
12 strokes off his handicap. He
read the hottest books, bought the
best equipment, took lessons and
practiced 5 hours a day. Two years
later, he had gotten worse.
But he was determined to
find a better way, so he abandoned
the stone age "Vardon grip"
method and used his training as a
physicist to scientifically analyze
the golf swing and developed the
single axis "Natural Golf Swing
System™."
Golf instruction has been
basically the same for some 40
years. Instead of asking what is
the best way to hit with a stick a
round ball that's on the ground,
we continue trying to copy the per-
ceptions of the best players.
Unfortunately, this method has
failed to help golfers achieve their
potential. The average golf handi-
cap has remained static for more
than twenty four decades, and
fewer than 2.5% of all male golfers
will ever achieve a handicap of five
or less.
His findings were that the
classic instructions; conventional
finger grip, feet at shoulder width,
strong body coil, etc. were pre-
venting golfers from developing a
simple, easy to repeat swing.
Using scientific analysis of
the body's mechanical move-
ments, he developed a swing that
was in sync with the laws of
physics and thus nature, "The
Natural Golf Swing System™."
The club is held in the palms of
both hands, not the fingers. This
eliminates an extra angle between
the club shaft and the arms that
occurs in the fingertip grip. The
Natural Palm Grip™ eliminates the
angle allowing a natural, powerful,
consistent golf swing.
With the Natural Golf
Swing System™ you also use a
modified stance, take a unique
address position, stand farther
from the ball, shorten your back-
swing, do not clear your hips and
face the ball at impact
"Vardon Grip"
Moe Norman ironically independently developed a
similar swing himself. Moe is considered the best
golf striker in the world. Moe and the "The Natural
Golf Swing™" were the subjects of a 25-page article
in Golf Digest recently.
With "The Natural Golf
Swing System™", he was quickly
able to break par. The Natural Golf
Swing System™ enables any player
to improve his/her golf game.
He then founded Natural
Golf with the purpose of sharing
the breakthrough, Natural Golf
Swing, with other frustrated
golfers.
Natural Golf reports "that
the Natural Golf Swing System™
— is so optimally designed that
golfers will play to a higher stan-
dard sooner and retain their good
games longer.
Players at Senior PGA
events and on the Canadian PGA
Tour are using it We are confident
that in a few years we will have
players on the other tours, male
and female, playing our system,
and that they will have a significant
edge on the competition."
Here are excerpts from just
a few testimonies on "The Natural
Golf Swing System™." ^
"/ have been golfing for over
35 years competing against and
beating some of the best players of all
time - so I was more than a little
skeptical.
But after testing and seeing
what the natural swing can do I
have changed my grip and swing to
take advantage of the Natural Golf
Swing System™."
-Jerry Heard
"I have to tell you how much
I love the natural way. I have played
golf for 35 years with handicaps
ranging from 14 to 28 in recent
years. I was almost ready to quit the
game out of frustration until I
ordered your material.
Every day now I cannot wait
to go out and play."
- Elsie Collins
Dallas, TX
"Showing you why Natural
Golf is a valid way to consider golf-
ing was my duty as a responsible golf
professional."
-John Elliott
Golf Digest Schools Staff
"A stroke of genius."
Wall Street Journal
"After an hour of instruc-
tion, moments of magic ensued.
Using the Natural grip, set up, and
swing, I hit a half dozen shots high-
er, straighter and longer than usual.
The sense of controlling a wood felt
great."
- Bruce Selcraig
Men's Journal
"..At was only a matter of
time until the golf swing itself was
On the left, the popular "Vardon Grip" that has been embraced by the golf world since the early 1900's. Scientific analysis
proves this grip does not comply with the laws of physics and as a result, it requires very complex rotary motions to correct-
ly hit the ball. On the right the advanced "Natural Palm Grip", the cornerstone of the Natural Golf Swing System™. This
grip does comply with the laws of physics and as a result, movements are reduced creating a simple single axis, 3 lever,
dominant arm power system.
With the "Natural Palm Grip™," the left hand holds on, the right provides power. Notice that the right hand grips the club
just as you would a hammer.
PGA Pro and best selling golf author Jerry Heard
has incorporated Natural Golf Principles into his
swing. Heard also heads up the Heard Golf
Academy on Captiva Island, Florida with another
branch in Canton, Ohio. Heard conducted experi-
ments at the Heard Golf Academy to test the The golfer on the right is in the traditional "Vardon Swing" setup. The golfer on the left is
"Vardon swing" versus the "Natural Golf swing". in the "Natural Golf Swing™" setup. Notice the natural palm grip, wide stance and single
The "Natural Golf swing" proved to be far superior.

# NITROSW ING revolutionizes golf training and is “steroids for your golf swing”


## By Jotm Whitehead, Media Services

Pro Tour Golf has announced a
major breakthrough that dramatically
increases the distance of your drives
and improves your overall golf game.
Ifs called NITROSWING.
In a scientific experiment the NI­
TROSWING has proven to increase
the drives of everyday average amateur
golfers by I (X) yards. Even PGA Tour
Pro Martin Roesink dramatically im­
proved his drive distance by using the
NITROSWING.
The NITROSWING is the first
ever golf exercise device to utilize mul­
ti-sensory integration training with
high speed resistance to learn the golf
swing in a rapid manner and to train the
muscles that perform the golf swing for
big distance off the tee.
The NITROSWING was devel­
oped by Certified Personal Trainer,
Frank Campitelli. With experience in
strength training for golfers for over 20
years, his clients greatly improved the
distance on their drives and golf game
from the programs he created for them.
Understanding the golf swing and how
the body works to create golf swing
power, he designed the NITROSWING
and used it to train himself to propel
golf balls well over 400 yards and 220
mph.
For more information and a quick
education on how to improve the dis­
tance of your drives and cut strokes
from your golf game, here is my exclu­
sive interview with former PGA/Euro­
pean Tour Pro and golf instructor Mar­
tin Roesink.
Q. What is your golfing back­
ground?
A. I have been involved in golf for
about 60 years. I have been on the PGA
and European Tours as a professional
golfer and have been teaching golf for
the last 40 years.
Q. How did you initially get in­
volved with the NITROSWING?
A. I was giving a lesson at a
client’s home on his new indoor simu­
lator and met his personal trainer,
Frank Campitelli Before we started the
lesson, Frank was there hitting some
drives with some unbelievable power
and speed.
When I looked at Frank’s data, I
was shocked by the numbers. His
swing speed was in the 150 MPH range
and his ball speeds were around 215
mph. His carry distance was just short
of 400 on some of the hits and I waf mm
tngued by how he learned to do tits.
My client told me that Frank built
a swing trainer called NITROSWING
that increased his swing to these ex­
treme speeds. He said Frank was going
to do a study on regular golfers and he
asked if I would give my professional
opinion and evaluate the NI­
TROSWING.
Q. What did you think when you
were first asked to observe and eval­
uate?
A. Obviously, I was a total skeptic
since I have seen pretty much every­
thing, and this would likely be another
golf gimmick.
But seeing Frank swing made me
curious. Since Frank doesn’t even
golf, I thought it was even more inter­
esting as I have never seen anyone hit
balls that hard and fast before that was
not a world champion long driver. I
knew guys that did long drive, but nev­
er saw these kinds of numbers. It’s
very rare.
Q. Once you agreed to evaluate
the NITROSWING, what happened
then?
A. At first I was going to evaluate
the training program, but I did not
know much about it. I got to see some
of the results that the other students
were getting and thought they were
pretty amazing.
Some of the test subjects were
adding 20 mph to their club head speed
and 60 yards to their drives My inter­
est and intrigue replaced my skepticism
pretty quick.
The (est was set up with an indoor
golf simulator monitor that recorded
everything and even backed it up with
portable radar monitors that provide
swing speed, ball speed, distance, and
averages. It was very accurate and un­
biased. It was also videotaped so there
wasn’t any fudging the numbers.
However, the best way to get a real
evaluation would be to get involved
more and get my hands on the NI­
TROSWING. Frank thought it would
be best for me to go through the pro­
gram and get involved just like the test
subjects. So, I baselined 25 drives at
the range and went through the NI­
TROSWING program just like the test
subjects.
Q. So you got to try it?
A. Oh yes. After seeing the results
of others in such a short time and talk­
ing to Frank about high speed resis­
tance training doing a swing move­
ment, I wondered if it would work for
me. I also wanted to try it because the
NITROSWING machine looked differ­
ent from the other swing training prod­
ucts and had some unique features on it
that the other swing trainers I had tried
before did not have.
Q. What was different?
A. Well, the first thing I noticed
was it didn’t use weights, it used nitro­
gen gas pressure. The other thing was
that you used a golf handle that has a
laser pointer inside connected to a high
strength polymer rope. Instead of
pulling directly on the movement arm,
you pull the laser handle and it leads
the lever arm with a multiple pulley
system. It had more freedom of move­
ment and I guided the handle, instead
of the handle guiding me.
Most golf training aids are too re­
strictive and control your movements.
Martin Roesink, age 72, former PGA/Euro­
pean Tour Pro and teaching professional,
gained 25 yards and 7.5 mph swing speed.
“The NITROSWING is by far the best golf
swing teaching, developing, and building
product golf has ever seen. No other swing
trainer, instruction video, or any golf lesson
can do what the NITROSWING can do for

Through the exercise on NITROSWING, I have I had ail but completely given up on using my
been able to increase my driving yardage by driver before trying the NITROSWING.
more than 30 yds. At 63,1 am how driving the
ball an average of 264 yds., something I
thought was impossible. Even the shots
against a stronger type wind are traveling

pertinent to the golf swing. Therefore, you can’t help but ob­

My results were staggering. I could not be­
to maybe gain some strength in my swing and
lieve the improvement in not only the pow­
some accuracy on my drives and was pleasant­
er, precision and overall control, but also in
the sound that the club was making when

a blast using NITROSWING. I always wondered

tured the maximum amount of energy from

how to use them correctly. I gained at least 40 yards on my dri­
technology provided me with an instant ad­
ves, way more of my drives are in the fairway, and I lost at least
vantage as I was increasingly more explosive for larger pe­
25 pounds during the first month. Darrick Eakin
riods of time. I gained 60 yards on my drives. George Onul
These average golfers ere employed by SCI, parent company of Pro Tour Golf.
I have very little upper arm strength due to
having Multiple Sclerosis; therefore my dri­
ving distance was not good. I hoped the NI­
TROSWING would help build the strength in
my arms. When I first started I was barely
driving 75 yards, now I've been driving 105
yards at the driving range. Jane Kochis
With the swing motion being free and
unguided on the NITROSWING, you
are forced to make the correct swing
direction, mechanics, and swing plane,
and the laser handle lets you know if
your are doing it right.
Most other swing guides prohibit
you from learning since you don’t have
to do anything to make the correct mo­
tion. Then when you take away the or­
dinary guiding device, you still can’t
do it correctly. It is good theory that
guiding you in a repeating way will
make you do it right, but it does not.
Control must come from your input,
not from the device.
Q. Describe your first time on
the NITROSWING. What was it
like?
A. It was amazing! It was so
smooth and the motion was very realis­
tic compared to swinging a club to im­
pact. At first I was swinging slow with
easy resistance, but once Frank added
resistance, he told me to sw ing it like I
would as if I were going to hit my dri­
ver, as fast as I could. As soon as I let
my body do what it likes to do in a fast
swing motion, I could not stop smiling!
I felt better when I did it fast. That’s
when I knew it would work. I used to
be very quick, so when I did it fast, it
felt perfect, like it should. Then Frank
turned the laser "on'* and that’s when I
realized how important the laser was in
learning to swing fast and in the right
direction. I always knew that swinging
faster creates direction problems and
that is why golf instructors tell you to
slow down, but the laser corrects that.
Your eyes help in training the swing
movement.
Q. Explain what that means,
“your eyes help in training the swing
movement”.
A. When I started swinging fast, I
was paying attention to where my
hands were going and what it felt like.
As soon as the laser was “on” and I was
watching the laser dot movement, I re­
alized I was not as smooth and straight
as I thought I was.
So I focused more and got better at
repeating the correct swing path as I
controlled the laser dot path to the tar­
get ball. Within IO or 15 swings, I
could hit the ball with the laser while
swinging fast again. Once you are good
at swinging fast with the laser "on”, hit­
ting a golf ball seems so much easier
with a club. I became unaware of what
my body was doing and became fo­
cused on what the laser needed to be
doing. It really sharpened my skills.
Then Frank showed me the slide
clip action that makes a “click” sound
when you get the handle tip through
impact during release.
Q. What is the slide clip? What
does it do?
A. This is very important. The
handle has a sliding attachment that
moves up and down the handle shaft at
the correct moment during the release
and impact. The slide clip moves and
makes a “click” noise that you can feel
too. I realized that if you did not hear
or feel the click you did not release the
handle and get your hands through im­
pact. It makes you get your "hands
through” and provides timing feed­
back. Absolutely amazing. In all my
years of golf, I have never seen a de­
vice have all these elements put togeth­
er correctly. Just like hitting a ball, you
see it, hear it, feel it, time it. Frank says
that is called multi-sensory integration
learning. Combining that with the high
speed free floating rotational resistance
of the machine, I call it awesome.
Q. Was the training on the
At my golf skill level, the NITROSWING has ac­
celerated my golf drive progress and will con­
tinue to improve with more practice. By break­
ing down and performing the driving exercises
along with the proven outcome of accuracy and
distance, the NITROSWING has greatly helped
maximize my performance off the tee increas­
ing my drives by 58 yards. Robin Bacopoulos
NITROSWING hard?
A. No, not at all. The resistance is
adjustable and the training session last­
ed 30 minutes. During the workouts I
would do about IOO to 200 swings.
Some swings would have easy resis­
tance and other swines I would do with
Nigh resistance
I also did drills with one hand
swings, my feet together, my hands
apart, or just parts of the swing. Actu­
ally it was fun and challenging at the
same time. I could feel the swing mus­
cles really working. It’s definitely a
workout and it addresses a lot of differ­
ent skills.
Q. You went through 20 thirty-
minute workouts. What do you think
now?
A. Originally, I really didn t think
I would like it. I didn’t think it would
work or have any benefit. How could
some fitness guy come up with a “golf
training” product when he doesn't
teach golf? But I met Frank, watched
him absolutely crush golf balls, and
was impressed enough to listen to what
he said about training. So my curiosity
got me involved enough to participate.
And boy am I glad I did!
Q. Why is that?
A. After my training sessions, we
tested at the range again I added 25
yards and added 7.5 mph with my club
speed. I feel much stronger now and I
think if I keep doing it, I can add anoth­
er 25 yards. I want my 300+ yard dri­
ves back.
Q. Would you consider this the
ultimate golfer’s distance tool?
A. Yes, but it is WAY more than
just a distance tool for golfers. Once I
started training on it, I saw things that
Frank did not see since he does not
teach golf. What he thought was trivial
was the laser and slide clip on the han­
dle giving immediate feedback. I saw
this as a major breakthrough in teach­
ing the golf swing. The NITROSWING
makes learning simple and effective for
anyone.
Q. So you went from skeptic to
advocate?
A. Yes. I was probably worse than
most about being a skeptic because I
teach golf and played professionally.
The things that are available to teach
rarely have merit.
When I was asked to evaluate the
NITROSWING, I was armed to shoot
holes in it. But I must say, the NITRO­
SWING is bulletproof. I now have a
NITROSWING in my garage and I use
it regularly.
Q. So the NITROSWING works
for everyone?
A. Read the testimonials! Train­
ing works for male, female, beginner
and expert just like any sport. As Frank
pointed out, the NITROSWING is a
golf specific speed and power training
device and the physical adaptations
created are golf specific. All other
sports have their specific tools of the
trade. Now golf has the NI­
TROSWING!
Q. There are many swing train­
ers on the market, why is this better?
First, to learn on-the-fly with im­
mediate sensory feedback is incredibly
important. This is exactly what we as
golf teaching professionals were look­
ing for. Second, the way the NITRO­
SWING brings your hands to the top of
the back swing correctly and gets you
started from the exact same point at the
top every time is priceless Third, you
control the laser handle back to the tar­
get ball for timing which is genius.
Fourth, the rotational resistance is
smooth and doing it at a faster speed
When I heard the NITROSWING would be able
to increase my swing speed, I was all in. I
have seen at least a 50 yard improvement
over my pre NITROSWING drives. I used to hit
250 yard drives and am now hitting 300 yard
drives consistently. I firmly believe anyone
playing the game of golf will see improve­
ment using this machine. David Hazel
teaches a faster swing sequence. You
are not just developing the muscles that
swing the club, you are learning how to
move faster, control the direction of
hand movements, and time the impact
into the ball. Anyone can learn to do

learning simple and effective.
Q. The NITROSWING is a
teaching device too?
A. It's the best one ever. It has all the
correct elements to learn the swing, de­
velop your swing, and build your swing.
One of the test subjects actually never
golfed before. After IO hours of swing­
ing on the NITROSWING, he went from
a 119 yard average to a 181 yard aver­
age. He learned to swing on the NI­
TROSWING. lf I had one of these to
teach golf it would be so much easier to
get the student to learn fast. Even a pro­
fessional golfer can benefit by being able
to drive the ball further and that lowers
strokes. As a golf teaching pro I can on­

NITROSWING provides a different type
of intense interaction that I can't provide.
You have to learn how to hit a ball with
speed. It s part technique and part effort.
You acquire technique and you develop
effort on this one machine 100% of the
subjects improved accuracy and dis­
tance. even me, and I'm a pro
Q. How much is this worth to a
golfer?
A. IO hours w ith a golf instructor
is a minimum $600 on lessons alone.
To hit the ball 50 yards further, the
training could cost thousands of dollars
and take years For the beginner it will

The smart golfer will get one of these

Q. Any final thoughts on the NI­

A. I think the game of golf is final­

## )


# 29



Advertisement

# Immediately hit longer, straighter and more


# accurate shots without changing your swing...


# So effective, even a robotic hitting machine gained 12 yards and more accuracy.

byJohnWikes
Media Services, Canton, Ohio
The small device pictured to the
right is going to revolutionize golf
and can dramatically improve your
golf game.
This small, nondescript device is
expected to make a bigger impact on
the golf industry than graphite,
titanium or ovei sized clubs.
Without any changes to your golf
swing, without practice sessions,
without expensive private lessons,
you can improve your golf game. In
fact, it will do for you what has been
done in the past for only a select few.
Now, thanks to 20 years of
research and development by Lloyd
Hackman, a retired engineer in Ft.
Myers, FL, you can have the same
advantage that the pros have and,
because of our exclusive
arrangement, you will be one of the
first non-professional golfers in the
country to get it.
As you know, a major part of the
power you generate during the golf
swing is from the shaft loading and
unloading. How your shaft loads and
then unloads is a function of your
swing. How much you benefit from
it is a function of the stiffness of the
shaft you are using.
It has always been accepted that
the faster you swing, the stiffer the
shaft; and the slower, the more
flexible. But, that alone is not true.
Since the club is a spring system
with a weight (club head) on the end,
each club has a frequency, like a
tuning fork, that is measured in
cycles per minute. The stiffer the
shaft, the higher the frequency. Just
as each club has its own frequency,
each golfer's swing has a timing that
should match the club's natural
frequency. It is this natural
frequency that determines the
response of the club head from the
time of release, or maximum load,
back to a point where the club shaft
returns to a straight position. When
the club shaft returns to the straight
position, the club head obtains the
maximum speed due to shaft flex.
The pros have known this for
years. However, they have the luxury
of visiting corporate testing ranges
and mobile vans to have their swing
examined with all the latest, high-
tech gadgets.

## In fact, a major shaft


## manufacturer recently


## admitted that using swing


## speed alone to determine


## shaft flex is inaccurate.

Why should you care? Look at
the illustrations above. If your shaft
unloads too early (before ball
contact) or too late (after striking the
ball), the stored energy never gets
transferred to the ball, resulting in a
loss of tremendous power.
In addition, you will hit off-line
shots because the club face is not
square at impact.
Remember, this is not conjecture
or opinion, rather the facts from
scientific tests and data analysis. The
shaft must return to the straight line
position at impact for maximum
distance and accuracy.
To achieve this position, it is
critical that you use the shaft flex
that matches your swing. However,
it is estimated that current shaft flex
ranges will not fit more than 50% of
the players.
Unfortunately, shaft manufactur-
ers can have a variation of 15 cycles
or more between their flex range
(ladies', regular, stiff or X).
Such a wide range is not close
enough to provide maximum
performance for each individual
golfer.
The Fit-Chip allows us to match a
shaft to a given swing with plus or
minus three cycles per minute of
accuracy.
In order to identify a player's
swing frequency, the point in the
swing at which a player reaches
maximum acceleration (not to be
confused with maximum club head
speed) needs to be determined.
Various players obtain this peak
acceleration at different times. Some
players initiate it immediately at the
top of the swing, while other players
start down slowly, then accelerate
during the downswing. Still others
accelerate more at the bottom of the
swing with wrist action. The
different swings have different time
lapses between maximum
acceleration and ball impact. Since
the goal is to achieve the impact of
maximum speed at ball impact, the
flexed shaft needs to return straight
at impact. Therefore, a player's
swing frequency is determined by
the time between maximum
acceleration and ball impact.
The Fit-Chip is an instrument the
size of a package of chewing gum,
containing an accelerometer sensor,
computer chip and batteries, which
is placed on the shaft of the club. As
the player accelerates the club during
the swing, the accelerometer in the
package records an acceleration
value at each millisecond. The data
is recorded until impact with the
ball. Once the ball is impacted, the
Fit-Chip analyzes the data for the
time between maximum acceleration
and impact during a player's golf
swing. With this timing information,
club frequencies can be tuned to
match a player's natural swing
frequency.

not effect your swing. You can have a club represent standard club set frequency. Notice

The shaft flex is stored energy. The shaft To achieve maximum distance and If the shaft releases early, the stored If the shaft releases after impact, the
kick (when it snaps back to the straight accuracy, the shaft must unload to a energy dissipates before it reaches the energy, again, never gets to the ball. With

achieved when the club frequency
matches the player's swing
frequency.
While major focus has been
placed on design of the club head,
the overlooked secret in club design
is the shaft. Most golfers have at
least one "favorite club," a club that
he or she hits better than others. The
goal is to make every club in the bag
play like the golfer's favorite club.
There are occasions when players
with a lot of talent, good swings and
high club head speeds need to have
their swing matched with lower
stiffness clubs. We have also
experienced just the opposite. Older
players that were playing with low
stiffness shafts were found to need
higher stiffness. Golfers vary widely
as to their swing. There is no right or
wrong swing, but the swing which is
natural to the player is the right one.
It is this swing that the Fit-Chip will
match and design clubs for.
In fact, I recently had the
opportunity to fit a robotic hitting
machine and by matching the correct
shaft to its swing, added 12 yards in
distance and improved accuracy.
The most popular of the current
fining techniques is clubhead speed.
This is an easy measurement to
make. The theory used in this system
is that the faster the player
swings,the stiffer the shaft he needs.
For one who is an engineer and
understands the physics of a golf
club, it is not hard to understand why
this system does not work.
- Lloyd Hackman
Inventor, Fit Chip
• • •
/ have been playing golf all my
life and, like all pros, have long
recognized the importance of having
the right shaft. However, until now it
was a matter of trial and error -
until we found the shaft that felt and
performed right.
I was intrigued by the Fit-Chip
system and agreed to try it. After a
few swings, Lloyd told me my results.
I had my doubts, but asked him to
build me a dub to these specific-
ations.
The results are nothing short of
amazing. I am hitting longer and
straighter shots. I can feel the club
exploding through the ball at impact.
And, I am swinging at my own
natural tempo In fact, the club
forces me to stay in tempo, which is
a very important part of a consistent
golf swing.
Since that time, I have
recommended that many amateurs
and professionals try the Fit Chip
System. No one has been dis-
appointed.
- Jerry Heard
Golf Professional
• • •
Thank you very much for making
my golfing life much better. The

the fact that I was not using the
proper shaft flex in my golf clubs.
After changing to the proper shaft

This makes every other custom
fitting system obsolete. No driver
I've ever used, regardless of brand,
works as well as the driver I'm using
now that was specified by using the
Fit-Chip. My drives are longer and
my swing stays more consistent. The
game has too many gimmicks as it is,
but this Fit-Chip really works."
- Paul Dolman
Teaching Professional
• • •
Finally, you can easily and
inexpensively have a club custom
built for your particular swing.
You simply snap the Fit-Chip
onto your existing club. By pushing
a button, you record what length
club you are swinging, then hit a
minimum of 10 balls at home or at
the range Return the Fit-Chip, and
our computer system will process the
recorded data to determine your
natural swing frequency.
Through this announcement, you
can request your own custom fitting
by following the instructions on the
coupon below
After completing your swings as
instructed, return the Fit-Chip in the
shipper provided. Your personal
swing data will then be computer
analyzed, charted and mailed to you.
Your chart will detail your
optimum natural swing frequency
for an entire set of clubs (D-pw).
In addition, you will receive
detailed information on how to have
your current clubs refitted and how
to obtain a new driver or utility wood
built to your specifications at
discounted prices.
Due to tightly controlled and
limited availability, fitting requests
are on a first come, first served basis.

# How to be a basketball star and play


# big even if you are shorter in height


# Two 5 feet-10 inch college basketball stars reveal their secrets to jumping


# higher, running faster, moving quicker and shooting higher percentages

By John Whitehead.
Media Services
(Akron. OH) Here are the secrets
to being a basketball star even if
you arc smaller in height.
These secrets can make better
basketball players of boys or girls
of all ages, from grade school to
college
These secrets have been
revealed by two of the best NCAA
Division I college basketball stars
in the entire nation. Jami Bosley
and Jimmal Ball.
Bosley and Ball are both only
5 feet IO inches tall. Yet, through­
out their basketball careers, they
routinely outplayed super-tall bas­
ketball players, even those in the
67" to 6’9 range.
You need to have a certain
amount of natural ability to be a
star in sports. But. it is being
proven beyond a doubt that certain
resistance exercises and drills can
dramatically improve athletic per­
formance. One of the most eye
opening proofs is how many majtir
league baseball players have dou­
bled their home run output with
special resistance exercise.
Bosley and Ball are examples
of what special exercises and drills
can do for basketball performance.
Their special exercises and drills
have enabled them to jump higher,
run faster, be quicker and shoot the
basketball with greater accuracy.
Both Bosley and Ball can
slam dunk the basketball. In fact,
you may have seen Jimmal Ball in
The 2000 Intersport Slam-Dunk
Competition that was nationally
televised during the 2000 NCAA
Tournament. Even though Ball
was the smallest player in the con­
test, he came in fourth. He beat
out players who were as tall as
6
'
8
".
Bosley was rated the 14th best
shooting guard in the entire nation.
Bosley led the Mid-American
Conference in free throw shooting
with an exceptional 86.7 percent­
age. Bosley was also the second
leading three-point shooter in the
Mid-American Conference at 42
percent. He was the third leading
overall scorer in the Mid­
American Conference at 18.6
points per game. Jimmal Ball was
a four-time all conference player
and once scored 44 points in one
game. Ball averaged 14 points per
game. Ball was number one in
steals in the Mid-American
Conference.
How was all that possible
from two players 5’IO" tall when
most of their opponents were
much, much taller? Both Bosley
and Ball stated. “If our opponent is
6 inches taller than us, but we can
jump IO inches higher than our
opponent when we play basketball.
we are, in effect, 4 inches taller
than our opponent.”
Bosley and Ball’s exception­
al vertical leaps, speed, quickness,
maneuvenng and shooting accura­
cy did not come by accident.
Bosley and Ball developed
Both Bosley and Ball were
exceptional defensive players. And
both were exceptional scorers.
highly advanced exercises which
Ball said, “As just one exam­
ple, I was recently working with a
12-year-old who is only shooting
50% from the free throw line.
Also, on his jump shots from 12
feet to 18 feet, he was only making
3 out of 35 shots. After only a few
hours of our drills and techniques,
he made 9 out of IO from the free
throw line and 20 out of 35 12 foot
to 18 foot jump shots.”
These exercises, drills and
techniques can be done in a home
and in a driveway basketball court.
All of Bosley’s and Ball’s
advanced exercises, drills and tech­
niques have been put into a book
and an accompanying videotape.
The book and tape were made in
conjunction with Biotech Research.

titled. Mow. Jp fig A Basketball
Star And Play Big Even lf You Are

the book and tape for only $39.
But, if you order in the next IO
days, you can get the book and

enabled them to jump higher, be
quicker, and run faster. They also

drills that made them much more
agile and acrobatic on the basket­

# Women line up for great new book:


# Disenchanted Evenings: A Girlfriend-to-Girlfriend


# Survival Guide for Success in Relationships with Men

By Laura Fisher, Media Services
Barb Ewing and Maria Slide, authors, are pictured on
the cover of their book, Disenchanted Evenings: A Girl-
friend-to- Girlfriend Survival Guide for Success in Rela­
tionships with Men.
(Canton, OH) Women across the
nation are lining up to get the new
book Disenchanted Evenings: A
Girlfriend-to-Girlfriend Survival
Guide for Success in Relationships
with Men by Barb Ewing and
Maria Sude.
The book is a collection of
actual experiences of many women
across the nation with boorish,
inconsiderate and self-centered men
that the authors call “frogs.” These
experiences include worst dates,
marriage episodes and common
behavior patterns of men.
Ewing stated, ‘The idea for the
’book came when Maria and I were
on a business trip together and were
discussing some of the disappointing
behaviors of men. Personally, I had
just received a ‘termination notice’
from my most recent beau via e-
mail! I mean, no card ... no phone
call ... no bottle of wine ... no last
supper! A classless e-mail! I was
horrified and turned to Maria, befud­
dled and said, ‘Honestly, Maria, we
need to write a book!’ She whipped
out her Franklin Planner and began
taking copious notes. We jotted
down over 65 coping strategies, sur­
vival tips or other eccentricities of
men before we reached our destina­
tion -just 20 minutes away!"
Sude said, “We are seasoned
veterans on the battlefields of love.
We have turned ours and other
women’s romantic mishaps into cop­
ing strategies for any reader who has
been shocked to find an army of
frogs hopping across a room where
she was certain Price Charming once
stood.”
Ewing added, “We are not men
haters. But we just found it so funny
that, although our experiences were
different, there were such common
behavior traits among men. We then
started talking to other women about
their bad dates and experiences with
men and saw more and more of
these common denominators. It real­
ly compelled us to write this book.”
They wrote an initial book that
got such a great reception in their
local town. Canton. Ohio, that they
decided to write an expanded ver­
sion and publish it nationally and
worldwide.
Though the book lakes full aim
at men, punch lines often ricochet
foibles as follows:
“Because I'm a guy, I will
always think what you’re wearing is
fine," reads an entry on the chapter
entitled, ‘A Peek Inside the Good
Old Boys’ Club.’ I thought what you
were wearing five minutes ago was
fine; either pair of shoes is fine.
Your earrings are fine. Your shoes
are fine. Fine ... fine ... fine ... Now
leave me alone; I'm watching the
game.”
The book is loaded with jokes
about the common behavior of men.
Here are just a few:
off distinctly female relationship
Question: How do you keep
your husband Ipom reading
your 8-man?
Answer: Rename the mad
folder "instruction Manuals"
Question: Why do men Hie
BMWs?
Answer: They can sped IL
Word Origins ol the Maior
Problems of Women:
Menstruation
Menopause
Mental breakdown
"GUTnocology
IM—MI-------------------« . ram mopfnoius
Why are mon Mio blenders?
You need one but you're not
quite sure why.
God created man before cre­
ating woman...
but doesn't every artist need
a rough draft before creating
a masterpiece?
Here are a few of the many bad
experiences of women collected by
the authors that are in the book.
A vivacious blonde, excited
about the opportunity to go on a first
date with an attractive man whom
months, is elated to learn that he is
taking her to one of the most expen­
sive and upscale restaurants in their
city. After a couple of rounds of
cocktails and delectable appetizers,
she excuses herself to go the ladies’
room, wanting to freshen her make­
up before the main course arrives.
As she returns to her table, she is
horrified to find her "Prince Charm­
ing" talking to two attractive women
at a nearby table. The “frog" has
even exchanged business cards with
one of the women, which includes
the woman’s HOME phone number!
Horrified, the disenchanted blonde
runs out of the restaurant and hails a
cab!
Submitted by K.H.
Boston, MA
An attractive brunette, having
gone on twenty-four blind dates in
five years, reluctantly agrees to go
on Blind Date #25, since her older
brother is the one playing “match­
maker.” Although her brother hasn’t
been in close contact with Blind
Date #25 in years, he remembers
him as an attractive and fun-loving
gentleman. Prior to the date, the
brunette and Blind Date #25 chat on
the telephone. She learns he has
recently been arrested for DUI, but
she admires his honesty in revealing
such a personal thing. As a result,
he asks her to come to his apartment
and pick HIM up. Reluctantly, but
with a sense of understanding, she
agrees. As she pulls up to his apart­
ment in her brand new car, her con­
she has had her eyes on for several
science is gnawing away at her,
wondering if she has made the right
decision ... she cautiously walks to
the door of his apartment to meet
Blind Date #25-and soon uncovers
the REAL reason why she was asked
to come onto the premises-he is
under HOUSE ARREST and is
unable to leave his domain!! Horri­
fied, she tells him she is having an
allergic reaction to the cologne he is
wearing, and puts the “pedal to the
metal” of her car, speeding away
faster than the speed of light, never
to be seen in that neighborhood
again!!
Submitted by S.S.
Philadelphia, PA
Excited about the opportunity
to reacquaint with friends whom she
hasn't seen throughout the winter, an
attend the Spring Ring at an exclu­
sive country club in northeastern
Ohio. Dressed to the “nines” in her
country club best, sjie excuses her­
self, toward the end of the evening,
to go to the restroom. To her horror,
she finds herself locked in! IN vain,
she frantically pounds on the door
and yells for help. Seconds turn into
minutes and minutes turn into hours
... Exasperated, she curls up and falls
asleep on the chaise lounge in the
Ladies' Lounge, her date long gone.
He leaves without her and does not
enthusiastic blonde and her date
tell anyone she is missing. Finally,
she is discovered by the cleaning
crew-ai 2:00 A.M.!! The bartender,
still cleaning up after the party, dri­
ves her home!
Submitted by B W.
Hartville, OH
A beautiful, entrepreneurial
woman, seemingly happily married,
returns home from a romantic dinner
with her husband. As she hastily
climbs into bed, she notices a sexy
silk bra, peeking out from under the
sheets. She quickly scrutinizes the
bra more closcly-only to discover ...
IT ISN’T HERS!!
Submitted by M.P.
Akron, OH
Another part of the book tells
women how to spot a “frog.” Here
are a few of the tips: 1. He knows
his way to the golf course but not to
the grocery store. 2. He spends more
quality time with his buddies than
with you. 3. He conveniently forgets
to call you when he’s going to be
late. 4. Commitment to him is as for­
eign as Saddam Hussein. 5. He sel­
dom remembers birthdays, anniver­
saries or other special occasions. 6.
Beer is a staple in your refrigerator.
So are empty ice cube trays. 7.
Guy's Standard Time (GST) i.e.
Sports and sex are his ways of keep­
ing time. 8. You can count on one
hand how any times he has apolo­
gized.
Disenchanted Evenings: A Girl-
friend-to-Girlfriend Survival Guide
for Success in Relationships with
Men by Barb Ewing and Maria
Sude, is published by The Hanford
Press. The regular price of this
paperback book is $12.95 plus $3.95
shipping and handling. But for read­

UNIVERSAL MEDIA SYNDICATE
