and seem to defy the laws of aging with their So, even with the clock ticking local read­
active lifestyle. ers still have the advantage of being among
Doctors and scientists have discovered that those who can get their hands on this medi­
their secret to an active lifestyle is a diet that cal breakthrough. ■
increases their body’s production of an amaz­
ing molecule called Hyaluronate.
Nobody can put it in a pill to make people
live longer. But, scientists at PatentHEALTH,
an innovative U.S. health care company, have
successfully added this amazing molecule to a
‘feel good’ joint pill called Trigosamine*.
This remarkable oral tablet is so impressive be­
cause it contains Hyaluronate which has the abil­
ity to retain fluid up to 1000 times its own weight.
It has the potential to increase lubrication in the
joints allowing them to move with ease.*
“Using Trigosamine is like taking a can of oil
and applying it directly to your joints,” said Dr.
Joseph Dietz, Director of Health Science, Research
and I)evelopment for PatentHEALTH. *
And thanks to the luck-of-the-draw, read­
ers of this newspaper are among those who
can get it right now. That’s because this area
has already been assigned a toll-free Regional
Health Hotline. But the catch is the hotline is
set to close in just 72 hours.
“We recommend that those living in this area
call now to get their share,” said Valerie Moore,
Director of the Regional Health Hotline.
“Right now, we’re shipping out everything
we have on a first-come-first-served basis.
We may not be able to meet everyone’s de­
mands as word continues to spread across
the country,” she said.
Trigosamine’s key ingredient is present in
'human joint oil’, which is medically known as
synovial fluid.
This fluid reduces friction in the joints allow­
ing for effortless motion. It not only lubricates
the joints but it also acts as a comfortable shock
absorber.
“Synovial fluid is part of what allows young
people to be highly active without having sore
joints. But, as the body ages the production
of synovial fluid declines which can force the
joints to grind together resulting in nagging
discomfort," Dr. Dietz said.
The Trigosamine supplement (pronounced
Tri-go-sa-mean) combines Hyaluronate with the
essential blend of glucosamine and chondroitin.
This blend is available without a prescription in
once daily tablets.
It has been clinically shown that this essential
dose of glucosamine and chondroitin helps to
build healthy cartilage in the joints and allows
for increased flexibility and range of motion.*
This impressive combination works to allevi­
ate uncomfortable joint dysfunction by promot­
ing elasticity, allowing joints to move freely and
with greater flexibility*
A clinical study conducted by the United
States government found that glucosamine
and chondroitin, similar to those present in
Trigosamine, had a remarkable 79.2% effec­
tive rate for those with moderate to severe
joint discomfort. *
It was also announced at an American Col­
lege of Rheumatology meeting that the combi­
nation of glucosamine and chondroitin showed
promise among persons with moderate to
severe discomfort.2
“Even though there is no pill that can make
you live longer, the clinical trials have been con­
sistent. The essential blend like the one pres­
ent in Trigosamine has been proven safe and
is extremely effective for joint health,” said Dr.
Dietz*
The tough part now is how to get it.
“Everybody wants it,” said Moore.
“The first drugstores to get this formula

Adapt works so well

found.
The adaptogens in
Adapt were discovered in
the 1950s and were thor-
oughly researched and test-
ed for over 45 years before
being released to the public.
1,200 European scien-
tists in over 3,000 studies
with 500,000 people found
that these powerful all-nat-
ural adaptogens have proven
to be completely safe and
totally effective at naturally
boosting your immune sys-
tem, increasing your energy
levels, lowering your stress
levels and improving your
focus and. concentration.
Adapt is amazing.
Anyone and everyone could
benefit from taking it.
Just imagine improving
your immune system so that
you could better fight colds,
flus and infections.
How about having the
energy of a kid again; what
a wonderful benefit that
would make in your life.
Problems focusing...
gone. Stress... gone. You
can even start meeting your
weight loss goals and opti-
mum health objectives when
taking Adapt.
When you take Adapt it
has been shown that you
can:
• lower your Cortisol
levels during times of
stress
• boost your immune
system
• increase your energy
levels
• lower your stress
levels
• improve focus and
concentration
In fact, I found Adapt to
be so amazing when I tried
it for a month that 1 went to
the doctor who created it to
get even more facts.
Here is part of my inter-
view with Stan D. Headley,
M.D., Chief MedicaJ Officer.
First I want to tell you,
Dr. Headley has been found
to be the kind of physician
that actually empowers his
patients to be positive and
proactive in maintaining
their own health through a
lifestyle oriented around
preventing disease rather
than treating symptoms with
pharmaceuticals.
Dr. Headley is recog-
nized nationally as a vision-
ary in integrative wellness.
He is a board-certified
Naturopathic Physician and
Doctor of Medicine with
nearly 20 years of clinical
research and medical teach-
ing experience.
Dr. Headley and his
team work with practices
that started adding in com-
plementary therapies to treat
acute and chronic condi-
tions, documenting success
in particular for patients
with autoimmune disorders,
heart disease, cancer, dia-
betes, arthritis, fibromyalgia
and hormone related imbal-
ance.
Dr. Headley is also
experienced in FDA clinical
•.trial development.
Here is our interview:
Q. What are Adapto-
gens?
A. Discovered by Russ-
ian Scientists, Adaptogens
are specific plant extracts
that control excess Cortisol
levels during times of stress.
Cortisol in excess
amounts is highly toxic'and
attacks muscle mass and
organs, lengthens recovery
time and diminishes
strength as well as the
immune system.
That is why Adapt is so
beneficial to all adults of all
ages, sizes, race and genet-
ics... to help conquer the
battles in life that nothing*
else can seem to conquer.
Q. How were the
extracts in Adapt Discov-
ered?
A. During the mid
1950's, the Soviet govern-
ment chartered their Acade-
my of Sciences with the task
of developing a product that
would enhance the perfor-
mance of their elite (i.e.
Olympic athletes, Bolshoi
Ballet, World Class Chess
Players and Cosmonauts).
They pjut 1,200 scien-
tists on the task and they
conducted over 3,000 stud-
ies with half a million peo-
ple.
. Their research went on
for 45 years!
The scientists decoded
thousands of plants and
found 10 rare plants in a far
eastern area called the Pri-
morye.
These plants provided
the basis for achieving the
three objectives they were
looking for:.
First, they had to be
totally non-toxic to human
cells. Second, they had to
support cells at a healthy
state. And lastly, they had
to help the body adapt to
stress as well as control the
production of Cortisol dur-
ing times of stress.
They coined the word
ADAPTOGEN for the
plants that demonstrated
those properties.
And now there is Adapt
so that everyone can benefit
from these natural, yet pow-
erful adaptogens.
Q. How is Cortisol
produced?
A. Stress. Stress trig-
gers the adrenal gland to
secrete the hormone Corti-
sol as a response to any kind
of physical or psychological
stress.
Since stress is a daily
part of our lives, and for the
most part unavoidable, we
all have Cortisol in our sys-
tems.
But with Adapt you can
help control stress levels
and get back to living a
wonderfully happy, healthy
life.
Q. What are the
health benefits of taking
Adaptogens?
A. Since we now
understand the extensive
effects of cortisol'on our
body, it is easy to under-
stand how controlling your
Cortisol levels can greatly
improve your health.
Adaptogens are designed
to help lower Cortisol levels
during times of stress, boost
your immune system, increase
your energy levels, lower
stress levels and improve
focus & concentration.
Once again, the reason
why almost everyone can
benefit from taking Adapt.
Q. Who should take
adaptogens?
A. Anyone struggling
with high stress levels, low
energy levels, challenged
immune systems, problems
focusing, fitness or weight
loss goals and those with
optimum health objectives.
Adapt works for all of
those problems. And it's
simple. Just take 30 sec-
onds out of your day and let
Adapt fight the rest of your
problems for the other 23
hours, 59 minutes and 30
seconds.
Q. How is Adapt
taken?
A. Adapt is a pure liq-
uid extract which comes in a
60 mL bottle and lasts
approximately one month.
Adapt is taken by plac-
ing two droppers full under
the tongue, holding for 30
seconds and swallowing.
This method assures
quick and thorough absorp-
tion and it tastes great.
Q. How long does it
take for Adapt to start
working?
A. Since Adapt is an
extract in liquid form, it is
absorbed sublingually and
through the gut, so most
people feel some effect
within 10-15 minutes.
Q. Are there any side
effects and is it safe? -
A. There are no known
side effects of Adapt and it
has been shown to be com-
pletely safe. But you should
not take Adapt if you have
had an organ transplant
since it can act as an
immune system builder. If
you are pregnant, nursing,
or taking heart medication,
consult a physician before
taking Adapt.
Q. What are the spe-
cific ingredients in Adapt?
A. The following is a
list of the active ingredients
in Adapt:
Eleutherococcus Senti-
cosus (Acantho Root) -
Increases immune cell activ-
ity by up to 200%, counter-
acts stress, increases pro-
ductivity and endurance,
and normalizes body sys-
tems.
Schizandra Chinensis
(Chinese Magnolia Vine) -
Counteracts stress, increases
productivity and combats
fatigue.
Aralia Mandschurica
(Manchurian Thorn Tree) -
Enhances mental acuity.
Crataegus Oxyacantha
(Hawthorn Fruit) - Improves
physical and mental
endurance, and promotes
cardiac stability.
Viburnum Satgenti
(Cranberry Fruit) - Has anti-
aging and antioxidant
effects as well as enhances
immunity.
Glycyrrhiza Uralensis
(Licorice Root) - Boosts
concentration, reduces
errors, neutralizes toxins
and helps balance blood
sugar.
R h a p o n t i c um
Carthamoides (Maral Root) -
Promotes faster recovery and
improved physical fitness. It
is a primary adaptogen that
enhances muscle develop-
ment, improves performance,
endurance and circulation.
Sorbus Aucuparia
(Ashberry Fruit) - Has Anti-
aging and antioxidant
effects and enhances the
immune system.
Inonotus Obliquus
(Chaga) - Supports healthy
digestion and immunity.
Rhodiola Rosea (Russ-
ian Rhodiola) - Improves
vision and hearing, enhances
mental and physical perfor-
mance, and improves the ner-
vous system.
So as you can clearly
see, bringing ten outstand-
ing, yet different, beneficial
ingredients into one all-nat-
ural supplement is a prayer

U nivf . rsai M edia S yndicate *
Pharmacists around the country are
bracing for the rush of people expecting to
get one of the newest breakthroughs in
medical science called FLUIDjoint.
What calcium is to your bones
FLUIDjoint is to your joints.
Its being compared to “human joint oil"
for adults because of it's ability to deliver
powerful micronutrients to the human joints.
Just imagine a formula that will help
your bcxiy to reduce joint discomfort,
stiffness and improve flexibility to
enhance daily living activities.
Scientists have identified and condensed
the micronutrients that your body can use
and put to work within days.
With the special micronutrients in
FLUIDjoint the only “effects" experi­
enced are more mobility, comfort and
improved joint health.
It’s called FLUIDjoint. But the trade
name for it is Mi(roNutricnt-2-lnmni-
noglobulin-lgd-Anti bodies. This brand-
new supplement is a huge breakthrough
for those concerned about joint function,
because the clinical results show that the
remarkable health benefits are significant.
“ Ft.Mil)joint's effect was far superi­
or than Glucosamine in every clinically
measured joint parameter. A remark­
able 90% of the people who use
FLUIDjoint can expect to experience
an improvement in joint function.
FLUIDjoint is safe and effective for
continuous , long term use, according
to the clinical results. ”
John L. Zenk, MI)
Principal Investigator
Certified American Board of Internal Medicine
The bad news is that most drugstore
shipments of FLUIDjoint are not sched­
uled to begin until the holidays. But for
those who want it first, we are providing

# FLUIDJOINT

Clinic At
Tests and
STUDDS
B y John L. Zenk, M.D. - Principal Investigator
Minnesota Appeifd Research Center,
and Michaei A. Keskowski, P h .D.
( abstract summary ) A randomized, double blind study was designed to
evaluate the active ingredient FLUIDjoint and it’s effect on symptoms of pain
and stiffness in subjects with osteoarthritis compared to glucosamine sulfate
and placebo.
Subjects with clinically diagnosed osteo­
arthritis were randomized into three groups and
given either a placebo sugar pill, glucosamine
sulfate, or the active ingredient in FLUIDjoint
daily for six weeks. Symptoms of joint pain,
stiffness and difficulty with activities were
quantified by Western Ontario MacMaster Uni­
versity Osteoarthritis Index (WOMAC).
At the completion of the study the
FLUIDjoint group had highly significant
improvement in symptoms of joint pain, stiff­
ness, and the activities of daily living in addi­
tion to an overall improvement. No serious
adverse effects were noted and no safety relat­
ed changes in the chemistry parameters.
The results of the study confirm that FLUIDjoint when given twice daily
results in significant improvement in joint pain, stiffness, and the activities of
daily living in subjects with osteoarthritis.
( relevant data ) The clinical test results support the indications of The
Ohio Survey, a landmark study of the safety and efficacy of some of the
micronutrients now available in FLUIDjoint. The Ohio Survey's 8,000 case
histories reveal the potential power of these micronutrients, and is in addition
to clinical tests.
A team of scientists have designed, conducted, and completed well-controlled
clinical trials using independent clinical research organizations or major research
universities to determine the benefits of FLUIDjoint’s micronutrients.
In one of the double-blind multi-center studies by 14 board-certified
Rheumatologists at an independent clinical research organization, the data con­
firmed marked improvement in regard to morning stiffness, joint mobility and
comfort levels.
A FREE copy of the FLUIDjoint Official Report is available by calling
1-800-781-3422. Ask for Dept. R1388. «
For Complete References see Current Therapeutic Research. Vol. 63, No. 7, July 2002. Dr. Lee Randolph
Beck a biologist and former professor of the University of Alabama Medical School is currently the Chief
Scientific Officer, and Dr. Robert C. Stoher, is the Chief Research Officer for the producer of the milk biolog­
ics ingredients. John L. Zenk, M.D. the former Chief of Medicine at St. Francis Hospital, Minnesota, is cur­
rently retained as the Chief Medical/Scientific Officer of the licensee of the milk biologics ingredients.
•THESE STATEMENTS HAVE NOT BEEN EVALUATED BY THE
FOOD AND DRUG ADMINISTRATION. THIS PRODUCT IS NOT
INTENDED TO DIAGNOSE, TREAT, CURE OR PREVENT DISEASE
the phone number and information on
who has it so you can get it right now.
“FLUIDjoint goes directly to the carti­
lage and helps joints move freely, helping
to preserve cartilage and improve joint
function,” explains John L. Zenk, M.D.
“FLUIDjoint combines micronutrients
that work with our own Nxlies immune
systems to slow the cycle of cartilage
destruction, leading to joint dysfunction."
“The major problem is that our
immune function declines as we age.
FLUIDjoint provides the valuable
micronutrient support needed to help
protect our joints," Dr. Zenk said.
I alike popular pill remedies that peo­
ple take after they have pain from inflam­
mation. FLUIDjoint helps prevent
swelling in the joints before it starts.
Each chewable dose of FLUIDjoint is so
good it tastes just like a tablespoon of a vanil­
la milkshake. That makes most people happy
because they can get rid of all those huge
supplement pills they choke down everyday.
For most, FLUIDjoint provides rapid
results. A noticeable improvement in joint
performance can be seen in levs than 14 days
of taking the daily dosage. You can take it
anywhere because no refrigeration is needed.
In a normal, healthy joint, the cartilage of
one bone glides freely over the cartilage of
the opposite bone aided by lubrication of
fluid, which is compared to the joints “oil."
Each place in your body where bone
meets bone is a potential spot for the
grinding agony of joint pain, arthritis,
stiff fingers or sore knees.
Over time, wear and tear on the joints
causes the cartilage to break down. So just as
you maintain the oil and grease that keeps
your car’s parts moving freely, maintaining
lubrication in the body’s joints is essential.
Until now, many people have flocked
to remedies that contain Glucosamine,
Chondroitin. MSM or Collagen.
Yet, Glucosamine and Chondroitin
have a common drawback, they do not
work for everyone.

understood that pain can interrupt every aspect of
your life.

look and function on a day-to-day basis.

tion of powerful ingredients to be delivered quickly and

cine formulation for the temporary relief of minor ar­
thritis pain,” said Dr. Joseph Dietz,
f Researchers designed the social trans-dermal

device that curves to the exact shape of your knee, working with the
human anatomy to aid in the relief of uncomfortable swelling and pain
without cutting off circulation, hampering movement or causing uncom­
fortable swelling. The KneedlT Pain Relieving Knee Band allows for
normal circulation and blood flow.

“Synovial fluid is part of what allows young
people to be highly active without having sore
joints. But, as the body ages the production of
synovial fluid declines which can force the joints
to grind together resulting in nagging discom-
fort,”saidDr.JosephDietz. 1

# develops rub on cream that relieves

By John Whitehead, Media Services
(Palm Springs, CA) A pow­
erful pain killer is now avail­
able to the public without a
prescription thanks to a Cali­
fornia Medical Doctor,
Dr. Robert Darras, M.D.,
has developed a rub on
cream which relieves pain in
as fast as 5 minutes.
Many chronic and acute
pain suffers who have tried
everything available for pain
relief in the past, reported
that Dr. Darras’ cream is the
only product that ever
relieved their pain.
Dr. Darras’ cream relieves
pain from arthritis, back, bur­
sitis, carpal tunnel, ten­
donitis, fibromyalgia, hip
pain, injuries and much
more.
Dr. Darras used his
patented pain relief cream on
his patients in case studies.
He then had other Medical
Doctors use it on their
patients. The results were
beyond expectations. The
patients spread the news
about the cream to their
friends and relatives and the
demand intensified.
For 14 years, Dr. Darras’
pain relief cream was only
available at Medical Doctor’s
offices. Dr. Darras has now
made his patented pain relief
cream available to the public
without prescription. It is
being distributed by Biotech
Research under the brand
name of PainNOTIM.
The following interview
with Dr. Darras will be of
great interest to pain sufferers.
Q. Pain relief products
are usually developed by
drug companies. How did
you, a Medical Doctor, come
to develop PainNOT ™?
A. About 17 years ago,
many of my patients were
complaining that nothing on
the market worked to relieve
their pain. They knew I was
an innovative doctor who
held a number of patents on
medical products. So they
asked me to develop a pain
reliever that worked with no
bad side effects.
Q. How long did it take
you to come up with your
pain relief cream?
A. It took over two years. I
went to a biotech company for
their resources and assistance.
We wanted to keep the product
all-natural. After a lot of hard
work, money, and much trial
and error we were successful.
We were able to combine
tested natural substances that
relieved pain. We also added
other substances that forced
the active ingredients through
the skin to the damaged areas
that were causing the pain.
We made all this into an easy
to apply cream that anyone
could use.
Q. Did your pain relief
cream work immediately
on people to relieve pain?
A. Yes, it did. I first tried it
out on my patients in case
studies and it worked beyond
what I was expecting. A num­
ber of my patients, who were
in constant pain and never had
experienced pain relief before,
literally became exuberant
with joy.. They wanted to

ical Doctor’s patients. It

Q. What is the differ­
ence between PainNOT™
and ingestible pain reliev­
ers on the market?
A. Typical ingestible pain
relief drugs only relieve pain
by temporarily interrupting
the pain impulse in the
nerves. They do not go to the
source of the pain. These
pain relief drugs can produce
harmful side effects like nau­
sea, bleeding and internal tis­
sue damage.
PainNOT™ works by
going to the source of the pain
and the cause. Most pain is
caused by inflammation which
then causes so much swelling
that it puts pressure on the
nerves. PainNot™ quickly
reduces the inflammation and
thus reduces the pain.
When there is excessive
inflammation, blood flow is
reduced to the area. When
PainNOT™ reduces the
inflammation, blood flow
increases to the damaged area
which also speeds up healing.

compare with other pain

people 15 and over. It is second
only to heart disease as the leading

Arthritis can make simple
tasks such as walking, dressing,
bathing or even opening ajar diffi­
cult or impossible.
And. if Arthritis is not treat­
ed, over time the bones that make
up the joint can lose their shape
and cause more pain and limit
motion further.
Early symptoms of arthritis
of the hand include joint pain that
may feel dull or just like a mild
burning sensation.
Arthritis isn’t picky with its
prey either. It affects all age

Q. What is Plantar Fasciitis?
A. The Plantar Fascia is a
large ligament structure that sup­
ports the longitudinal arch of your
foot. It is a tough, fibrous band of
connective tissue that runs from
the heel bone all the way to the
ball of your foot protecting the
ball of your foot, your toes, arch
and heel. Plantar Fasciitis is when
this crucial area becomes
inflamed, irritated or hurt.

Encino, California — It’s esti-
mated that in the United States alone 30
to 35 million people have one or more
discolored toenails. And that yellow,
thick, crumbling nail is not just limited
to your toes. However, new reports state
that researchers on the West Coast have
developed a product that finally cures
100% of the most common fungus
called onychomycosis to restore nails on
both your feet and hands to their beauti-
ful color and feel.
Fungus Free Nails is all natural and
completely safe with no side effects. It
was designed and developed by medical
doctors and researchers in California. In
fact, we asked Dr. Marc Selner, who
tested the product in the lab at USCF
Medical School, to tell us more about
this revolutionary product.
How does Fungus Free Nails work
and what makes it different from
other products that claim to cure nail
fungus?
Dr. Selner — Fungus Free Nails can
penetrate the skin because of the patent
pending carrier system that can actually
go through your nail in order to deliver
the antifungal cure to the nail bed. The
reason other products are ineffective is
because they are water soluble solu-
tions. Water cannot penetrate the skin
(more importantly the toenail, which is
thick layers of skin). Just apply one thin
coat of Fungus Free Nails twice daily.
Dr. Selner, why and how does
Fungus Free Nails penetrate the nail
where other topical products do not?
Dr. Selner — Once again, Fungus
Free Nails penetrates the nail because it
isn’t a water soluble solution. Our prod-
uct incorporates a naturally occurring,
non-toxic, organic solvent that carries
with it the necessary fungicidal essential
oils to the nail bed in order to kill the
fungus that is living, growing and
spreading there.
In layman’s terms how can Fun-
gus Free Nails promise to “cure” ony-
chomycosis or nail fungus?
Dr. Selner — Because Fungus Free
Nails actually works as demonstrated in
clinical trials and it is manufactured ac-
cording to the Homeopathic Pharma-
copoeia of the United States. In fact, all
the ingredients are on the FDA’s Gener-
ally Regarded as Safe (GRAS) list. This
is a one of a kind revolutionary cure for
nail fungus.
According to a recent Wall Street
Journal report dated February 22, 2011,
toenail laser treatment can cost from
$750 to $1,500 for a treatment course. In
fact, the article went on to say that,
“Solid evidence of the lasers’ effective-
ness is scant.”
Fungus Free Nails is an all-natural,
completely safe with no side effects
way to kill nail fungus. There is no bet-
ter product on the market today. You can
get started curing those ugly, yellow,
thick and crumbling toenails by ordering
Fungus Free Nails today.
Nail fungus can be cured and Fun-
gus Free Nails will do it guaranteed or
your money back. In fact we are so con-
fident that you can return even an empty
bottle and you will receive a full refund.

## Oct. 11

Prep football: Most teams play
on Thursday this week. Local
games (all 7 p.m., unless other-
wise indicated) are Central
Catholic (4-2) at David Douglas
(3-3), Benson (0-6) at Wilson
(5-1), Roosevelt (4-2) at Franklin
(1-5), Cleveland (3-3) at Madison
(3-3), La Salle (4-2) at Madras
(3-3), and Falls City (0-5) at
Portland Lutheran (0-5), 3 p.m.
College soccer: The Portland
Pilot women (6-3-2) have their first
West Coast Conference match at
Gonzaga (6-6-0) at 3 p.m.

## Oct. 12

Blazers: Preseason game No. 2
is at Phoenix, 7 p.m. PT. The Suns
were 10th in the West at 33-33
last season. Now minus Steve
Nash, the Suns are a bunch of no-
names, but Clyde Drexler says they
could finish fourth or fifth in the
conference this season.
Winterhawks: Portland (4-3-1-
0 through Tuesday) plays at fast-
starting Prince Albert (7-0-0-1), 6
p.m. PT
Prep football: Grant (3-3) plays
at Aloha (6-0), and Jesuit (5-1) is
at Southridge (3-3), both 7:30
p.m.; Sunset (3-3) is at Lincoln
(0-6), 7 p.m.; Parkrose (2-4) goes
to Milwaukie (4-2), 7 p.m.;
Portland Christian (6-0) travels to
Gaston (3-2), 7 p.m.
College soccer: The Big Sky
women’s regular-season race hits
the home stretch, with first-place
Portland State (4-1-1) playing host
to Idaho State (2-2-1) at 3 p.m. at
Hillsboro Stadium. ... The Portland
men (3-1-0 WCC) kick off a home
weekend with a 7 p.m. Merlo Field
match against Santa Clara (3-1-1).
Those two teams and San Diego
are tied for first in the conference.
College cross-country: UP men,
tied for fifth in the national rank-
ings, compete at the Wisconsin
Adidas Invitational.
College volleyball: Corban
(1-10 Cascade Collegiate
Conference) is at Concordia (7-4),
7 p.m.; Northwest Christian (5-6)
at Warner Pacific (6-5), 7 p.m.

## Oct. 13

ranked Linfield (4-0, 1-0) plays
host to Whitworth (5-1, 1-1) at
1:30 p.m., and Pacific (2-3, 1-1)
welcomes Pacific Lutheran (2-2,
1-1) to Forest Grove for a 1 p.m.
tilt. Pacific is coming off a 62-21
win at Puget Sound (the most
points scored by the Boxers since
they shut out Albany College 62-0
in 1930). PLU stopped L&C 31-14
at Griswold Stadium. ... Division II
Western Oregon (3-3, 3-2 league)
is at home at 1 p.m. against Great
Northwest Athletic Conference foe
Dixie State (3-3, 3-2 after a win at
St. George, Utah over visiting
Central Washington 29-21). The
Wolves are on a three-game win-
ning streak.
Winterhawks: A six games-in-
nine nights swing through Canada
concludes with a 6 p.m. PT game
against Swift Current (3-1-3-1).
Portland then is idle until Oct. 20,
when Seattle (3-3-0-0) returns to
the Rose Garden, where the
Thunderbirds spoiled the Hawks’
season opener, winning 5-2 on
Sept. 21.
College soccer: The UP women
College football: No. 10 Oregon
State (4-0) is at BYU (4-2), 12:30
p.m. PT. The Cougars are 4-0 at
home. ... PSU and Oregon have
byes. The Ducks play Thursday, Oct.
18 at Arizona State, 6 p.m. ...
Lewis & Clark (4-1, 1-1 Northwest
Conference) is at 24th-ranked
Willamette (5-0, 1-0) at 1:30 p.m.
The host Bearcats lead NCAA
Division III in passing yardage
(393.8 per game). Also in the
Northwest Conference, fourth-
(17th in RPI) welcome BYU (fifth in
Pac-12). ... Concordia (7-4 confer-
ence) has a home league match
with Northwest Christian (5-6) at 7
p.m., while Corban (1-10) invades
Warner Pacific (6-5) at 7 p.m.
RPI, 11-1-1) to Merlo Field at 7
p.m. The Cougars’ lineup includes
junior transfer Cloee Colohan, a
midfielder-defender who was hon-
orable mention all-WCC last sea-
son with Portland.
College cross-country: The
Warner Pacific Open, which starts
with Junior Olympics races at 10
a.m. at Lents Park, includes PSU
and UP, along with Concordia and
other Cascade Collegiate
Conference teams for a CCC pre-
view meet. . ... The Lewis & Clark
Invitational, featuring the Pioneers’
22nd-ranked women, starts at 11
a.m. at McIver State Park.
College volleyball: The No.
5-ranked Oregon Ducks (14-1, 5-1
after last week’s five-set home loss
to No. 4 Stanford) take on second-
ranked Washington (14-0, 5-0) at
7 p.m. at Matthew Knight Arena.
The Ducks will be coming off a
match the night before at home
against Washington State (0-6

## Oct. 14

College soccer: The PSU
women play their next-to-last regu-
lar-season conference game at 1
p.m. against Weber State (3-2-0)
at Hillsboro Stadium. The Vikings
entered the week with a two-point
lead on Sacramento State (3-1-2),
and those teams will meet Oct. 19
at 1 p.m. at Hillsboro Stadium. ...
The UP men complete their home
weekend against Saint Mary’s
(1-2-1) at 1 p.m. at Merlo Field.
5K run for $5: The latest in the
Portland Parks & Recreation series
of $5, 5-kilometer runs runs is 9
a.m. at Pier Park. Ages 17 and
under are free. Call 503-823-
2525 to register.

## Oct. 15

Blazers: The Kings are still in
Sacramento, and that’s where the
Blazers will play at 7 p.m. Former
UO point guard Aaron Brooks has
made the Kings his third NBA stop
and is battling Isaiah Thomas and
Jimmer Fredette for playing time.
Ex-Blazer forward Travis Outlaw
averaged 12.8 minutes per game
with Sacramento last season.

## Oct. 16

Prep soccer: Wilson is at
Cleveland in a key PIL 5A boys
game. Also in the league, Franklin’s
boys visit Madison at 4:15 p.m.
The PIL 5A girls slate has
Cleveland at Wilson, 7 p.m., and
Madison at Franklin, 4:15 p.m.

## Oct. 17

Blazers: Portland’s fourth of
eight preseason games will be its
first at home; Golden State visits
the Rose Garden for a 7 p.m.
tipoff.
Central
Catholic’s Xavier
Griggs hauls in a
two-point
conversion pass
from Kael
Kryger as the
Rams defeat
Gresham 37-0
last week and
improve to 2-0
in Mount Hood
Conference play.

ONSTOTT

# New Joint Relief Supplement Guaranteed to Beat

# AND GLUCOSAMINE 10-T0-1 TO STOP YOUR JOINT PROBLEMS

By: S. Litten, Media Services
Attention: Those who have
achy knees, stiff shoulders, throb­
bing hands,back troubles and
morc.please listen...
There is a new joint supple­
ment available known as Flex-
PRO MD with solid clinical trials
that prove it works... or your
money back.
People who have had joint
discomfort for years are now wak­
ing up in the morning and nothing
hurts them anymore... at all.
Yes you can be pain free in
just days from now.
FlexPRO MD is guaranteed to
beat the supplement you’re cur­
rently taking or you get 100% of
your money lack.
It is a patented, small.easy-to-
swallow geltab and it has been
proven to beat chondroitin and
glucosamine 10-to-l to stop your
joint problems.
It is only one small supplement
a day, but it has a long list of bene­
fits. WitfrFlexPRO MD you get:
• No more suffering
• Healthy cartilage
• Better Joint Lubrication
• Much less discomfort
and stiffness
• Better flexibility
• Much more comfortable
muscle movement
•Plus you can stop free
radical damage on your
joints and muscles to
prevent further problems
• And it is an amazing sup­
plement for your eyes,
skin, hair and nails too
FlexPRO MD is a shock
absorber and a lubricant for
your achy joints. It is clinically
proven to improve and restore
damaged cartilage and stop chron­
ic swelling.
The new supplement known
as FlexPRO MD is so inexpensive
that anyone can use it to stop their
suffering from joint stiffness,
immobility and discomfort.
With FlexPRO MD,clinical
trials shbw that joint agony and
torture can be a thing of your past-
no more soreness, irritation or ten­
derness in your joints - no more
torment or throbbing or stinging
when you move... Just a wonder­
ful renewed joy for your life.
FlexPRO MD is being called
a worldwide miracle because it
works wonders for anyone who
wants stronger, more flexible
joints.
You see, the secret to this new
miracle supplement is that it works
to stop stiffness and discomfort
while lubricating your joints and
building healthy cartilage giving
you flexibility and freedom.
FlexPRO MD is everything
your joints need to feel better
plus... it stops the free radicals that
are responsible for the breakdown
of your body in the first place!
FlexPRO MD literally adds
space within your joints so your
bones don’t rub together and it
actually helps build cartilage so
your bones are healthier and you
can move better without pain.
FlexPRO MD can literally
make someone in their 70s feel
like they’re 30 again.
FlexPRO MD not only builds
healthy cartilage and ends your
joint problems... but it keeps any
problems you have away for good
by stopping free radical damage.
When we spoke to the creator
of FlexPRO MD, he explained it
to us like this...
‘•FlexPRO MD lubricates
your pints so they work like a fine
oiled machine so you get rid of
your worst stiffness.
Your body runs much like a
car... it needs to be taken care of
with oil and lubrication... you
wouldn’t take your car out and run
it without oil right?
Well your body is the same
way... if you try to run it without
the oil it needs (cartilage and joint
fluid)... you are not going to get
veryfar... yourj oints need oil and
lubrication to run smoothly just
like an automobile - only your
body needs cartilage and joint
lubrication. FlexPRO MD does
all of that in one very small easy-
to-swallow geltab. Plus it protects
your eyes and skin from sun dam­
age and is a huge benefit to your
hair and nails. ''
So, in a nutshell, FlexPRO
MD works for all causes of joint
problems PLUS fights the free
radicals responsible for joint prob­
lems rn the first place.
It works like no other joint for­
mula out there. It works better,
faster and is complete for all your
needs... not just stiffness or dis­
comfort... but for everything
including healthy cartilage, lubri­
cation, better flexibility... trust me,
you will feel amazing.
Once you try it, you won’t
believe how you feel.

# RELIEVE PAIN WITHOUT DANGEROUS DRUGS


# New advanced heating pad from Canada


# brings pain relief in as fast as 30 minutes


# Hospital studies show it relieves pain from arthritis, back, bursitis,


# carpal tunnel, tendonitis, hemorrhoids, migraines and more

By John Whitehead, Media Services
(Saskatchewan, Canada) An
advanced heating pad devel-
oped in Canada is bringing
users a wide range of pain
relief. Finally you can get pain
relief without dangerous drugs.
Some users report relief
from arthritis pain and other
pain in as fast as 30 minutes.
This remarkable heating
pad was developed by
Thermotex Therapy Sys-
tems Ltd. located in Cal-
gary, Canada. It was then
made available to the pub-
lic in the remote Canadian
province of Saskatchewan.
Virtually no advertising
was needed to sell the
Thermotex heating pad in
Saskatchewan. As soon as
a few people tried it and got
such dramatic results, they
spread the word like wild-
fire. In a short period of
time over 30,000 people in
the sparsely populated
Saskatchewan Province
were using the Thermotex
heating pad.
The Thermotex heating
pad is safe to use and its
use has no known side
effects.
The Thermotex heating
pad is now being offered to
the public in all of Canada
and in the United States.
Thousands are being sold
with rave reviews from con-
sumers. Testimonials from a
few of these consumers are
also published on this page.
Media Services inter-
viewed the president of
Thermotex Therapy Sys-
tems Ltd. Francis Docherty.
This interview follows:
Q. What types of pain
does the Thermotex heat-
ing pad relieve?
A. There are four sources
of pain. One is inflammation
characterized by redness, heat
and swelling. Two is muscle
stiffness, soreness or spasms.
Three involves the toxic condi-
tions caused by various toxins
such as lactic add. And, four is
stress or hypertension caused
by unpleasant physical or psy-
chological conditions. Unlike
drugs, which only target one
source of pain, the Thermotex
heating pad relieves pain from
all 4 sources.
Q. How does the Ther-
motex heating pad pain
relief differ from pain
relief produced by drugs?
A. Drugs only relieve
pain by interrupting the nat-
ural pain impulse. But
drugs may produce harmful
side effects like nausea,
bleeding or worse. The
Thermotex heating pad
goes directly to the source
of the pain for relief.
Q. Is the Thermotex
heating pad safe to use?
A. The Thermotex heat-
ing pad is a registered
medical device and it is
totally safe to use.
Q. How do you com-
pare the Thermotex heat-
ing pad with other heat-
ing pads?
A. You cannot compare
the Thermotex heating pad
with other heating pads that
are available all over the
world. That would be like
comparing a Rolls Royce with
the cheapest automobile.
Other heating pads only
heat the surface of the skin
and a few layers below. The
Thermotex infrared heating
pad can rapidly help a per-
son who is in pain because
of the way that the infrared
waves penetrate the various
layers of the skin and mus-
cles to a great depth in order
to reach the nerves and tis-
sues where the actual cause
of the pain originates.
Customers who used the
Thermotex heating pad know
the difference between Ther-
motex products and "the oth-

The Thermotex Infrared Heating Pad.
to the muscles,

nd pressure.

ers." They tell us that they will
never give up their Thermotex
heating pads for a "million dol-
lars" once they have used the
Thermotex heating pad even
one, single time.
Q. Can you elaborate
more on how the Thermo-
tex heating pad relieves
pain?
A. The infrared energy
that emanates from the
Thermotex heating pad
penetrates the skin and
muscles all the way to the
bone. It safely and gently
heats the tissues and
increases the blood supply
at the affected area.
The natural response of
the body to the increased
temperature is to try to main-
tain a condition of homeosta-
sis. That means that the
body automatically tries to
lower the temperature in the
area. Therefore, it expands
blood vessels to increase
blood flow.
When the Thermotex
heating pad delivers heat to
the tissues, the blood vessels
actually increase in diameter
via a change called vasodila-
tion. Then oxygen and nutri-
ents in the bloodstream are
able to pass through the
walls of the blood vessels
more easily and initiate the
process of healing the dam-
aged cells and tissues.
In addition, toxic sub-
stances causing inflamma-
tion and pain in the damaged
cells can then pass back into
the bloodstream much more
easily. The toxins are then
filtered and eliminated by
organs such as the kidneys,
the lungs, and the digestive
tract. As the damaged,
inflamed areas receive the
increased supply of blood,
the cells are nourished and
cleansed and inflammation is
reduced. A person then
experiences pain relief.
The heat also relaxes
muscles and expands other
tissue to relieve tension
and pressure on nerves.
Q. Will a Thermotex
infrared heating pad
relieve carpal tunnel
pain?
A. Carpal tunnel syn-
drome is the result of inflam-
mation of the carpal tunnel in
the wrists. A Thermotex
infrared heating pad helps to
reduce the inflammation by
increasing the blood flow to
the area.
Q. How can a Thermo-
tex heating pad relieve
pain related to arthritis?
A. Most types of arthritis
cause inflammation and
stiffness, and a Thermotex
heating pad is an ideal form
of pain relief.
The infrared heat that
emanates from a Thermotex
infrared heating pad pene-
trates the body all the way
into the joints, thus increas-
ing the blood flow to the tar-
get area. It also expands tis-
sue to relieve pressure. The
increased blood flow also
helps to flush away lactic
acid buildup and reduce
inflammation that is a result
of the arthritic inflammation.
Q. Does a Thermotex
infrared heating pad cure
arthritis?
A. There is no cure for
arthritis, but a Thermotex
infrared heating pad can
relieve the pain and stiffness
and can help some people to
resume normal activities.
Q. What are some
examples of various ail-
ments whose pain could
be relieved through the
use of a Thermotex heat-
ing pad?
A. There are many con-
ditions and ailments for
which a Thermotex heating
pad can help to relieve the
pain including: Arthritis,
back strain, Bursitis, Carpal
Tunnel Syndrome, consti-
pation, Crohn's Disease,
Dupuytren's Contracture,
earaches, Fibromyalgia,
golfer's or tennis elbow,
hemorrhoids, hip pain,
intestinal cramps, lactic acid
build-up, menstrual cramps,
migraines, muscle spasms,
Osteoarthritis, Plantar
Fasciitis, repetitive strain
injury, Rheumatoid Arthritis,
Rotator Cuff injuries, Sciati-
ca, shoulder problems,
sinus problems, spastic
bowel, sports injuries,
sprains and strains, tendini-
tis, tension and stress,
TMJ, and whiplash.
Q. Can you use a
Thermotex heating pad
on broken bones?
A. Several of our cus-
tomers have informed us
that they, and also their
doctors, have felt that their
Thermotex heating pads
have helped them to speed
up the healing process that
is related to broken bones.
!n that regard, they were
able to use their Thermotex
heating pads in order to
create heat that permeated
through their casts.
Q. Can a Thermotex
heating pad be used to
help a child?
A. A Thermotex heating
pad can safely be used on
children, but we suggest that
you use the lowest setting,
while regularly checking the
area being treated and mak-
ing sure that the child is feel-
ing no discomfort.
Q. Can a Thermotex
heating pad be used to
help a pet?
A. Yes, a pet can be
helped with the use of a
Thermotex heating pad.
When a Thermotex heating
pad is used on a pet, we
recommend that you wrap
the heating pad with a cot-
ton towel, and make sure
that the cord is protected
so that it cannot be chewed
by the pet.
Q. Can you use a Ther-
motex heating pad for as
long of a period of time as
desired?
A. Yes, you can't use a
Thermotex heating pad for
too long of a period of time.
A Thermotex heating pad
should be used for a mini-
mum period of 30 to 45 min-
utes, and there is no recom-
mended maximum time limit.
Q. Are there any times
when I should not use the
Thermotex heating pad?
If you have a disease,
injury or condition, includ-
ing but not limited to those
listed below, before begin-
ning to use the Thermotex
heating pad be certain to
consult with your health
care professional concern-
ing it.
Specifically do not use in
case of: pregnancy, malig-
nancy (including skin
lesions), desensitized areas
(no feeling), circular dis-
eases, edematous areas,
scars or burned areas,
active tuberculosis, adrenal
suppression, lupus, multiple
sclerosis, diabetes, hemo-
philia, surgical implants.
Q. Is the Thermotex
heating pad guaranteed?
A. Yes! Every Thermo-
tex heating pad comes with
a 60 day money-back guar-
antee, and if it does not
relieve your pain, we will
gladly refund your purchase
price.
Q. is there also a war-
ranty on the Thermotex
heating pad?
A. Yes. Every unit comes
with a one year limited war-
ranty on all parts and labor.
For a free copy of the written
warranty send a self-
addressed, stamped enve-
lope to: BioTech Research,
7800 Whipple Ave. N.W.,
Canton, OH 44767.
End of interview.
For those who wish to
obtain a Thermotex heat-
ing pad, the following is
provided.
The Thermotex heating
pad will not be available in
U.S. stores on a wide
basis for an indefinite peri-
od of time until distribution
is established and large
enough production lines
are built to handle the
required amount of stock.
In the meantime, those
who want to obtain the
Thermotex heating pad
can order direct from Ther-
motex Therapy Systems
Ltd.'s U.S. distributor,
BioTech Research*, in
Canton, Ohio by using the
Special Reader's Discount
Coupon on this page. If
you order within 10 days of
the date of this publication,
the discount provided by
this coupon is $75. If you
order after 10 days, you
may use the coupon to
order the Thermotex heat-
ing pad at the regular
price. The Thermotex heat-
ing pad can pay for itself
many times over in savings
on pain medicine.

Q. How do the Pain
NOT'" Patches work to
relieve pain?
A.
The ingredients cool
and reduce inflammation. Then
the ingredients gently warm the
damaged area deep to muscles,
joints and bones.
• The natural response of the
body to the increased tempera
ture is to try to maintain a con
dition of homeostasis. That
means that the body automati
cally tries to lower the tempera
ture in the area. Therefore, it
expands blood vessels. to
increase blood flow.
When the PainNOT'" Patch
delivers heat to the tissues, the
blood vessels actually increase
in diameter via a change called
vasodilation. Then oxygen and
nutrients in the bloodstream are
able to pass through the walls
of the blood vessels more easily
and ,carry toxins away from the
damaged issue.
In addition, toxic sub
stances causing inflammation .
and pain in the damaged cells
can then pass back into the
bloodstream much more easily.
The toxins are then filtered and
eliminated by organs such as
the kidneys, the lungs, and the
digestive tract. As the damaged,
inflamed areas receive the
increased supply of blood, the
· cells are nourished and
cleansed and inflammation is
reduced. A person then experi
ences pain relief.
The heat also relaxes mus
cles and expands other tissue
to relieve tension and pressure
on nerves.
Also, the patches are
made with cloth fabric which
breathes. Typical patches are
made of rubber which cause
perspiring.

# Hot New Pain Relief


# New treatment significantly blocks pain with no side effects and without disrupting your daily activities

By: B. Michael John, Media Services
You can now signifi­
cantly reduce your knee
pain with a hot new pain
cure.
Studies find you can
now end your knee pain!
You can start enjoying
your favorite day-to-day
pleasures again.
Go shopping, walking
or jogging without knee
pain... Garden, go to
church, play with your
grandchildren or go golf­
ing without knee pain...
Do all of the things you
used to enjoy and... get
your life back free of
knee pain.
The new knee support
known-as C-Power is
great for both men and
women of any and all
ages.
C-Power is extremely
lightweight, wonderfully
comfortable and gives
you, as an individual, just
the support you need.
Everyone has been
asking... "How can this
knee support be so great
and so much different
than others?"
Well, the scientific
team that created the C-
Power explained it like
this...
The C-Power Knee
Support has the "power"
of the amazing pain
reliever; Capsaicin
woven right into each
fiber of the support.
Capsaicin is the com­
pound found in red chile
peppers that makes them
hot. Capsaicin has been
found to be a very effec­
tive pain reliever and it's
actually in the material of
the C-Power.
weight and does not have'
any metal or hard plastic
components to pinch, nib
or irritate your skin. It
is made from a non-
allergenic, itch-proof
material that is complete­
ly machine washable.
And, after you wash
it, the power of the cap­
saicin stays put to keep
giving you the pain relief
you need.
So, whether you're
just going grocery shop­
ping or going to the golf
course, the C-Power
gives you the support
you need to be comfort­
able all day long.
It gives you greater
flexibility.
You won't even
notice it's there once you
put it on because it is so
comfortable and so light,
yet extremely supportive.
It is guaranteed to
help end your knee pain
while you wear it.
With C-Power, you
get all the power of a
great knee support plus
the power of capsaicin;
the proven pain reliever
without any side effects...
just relief.
It doesn't mat.ter
whether your knee pain is
caused by a fall, arthritis,
torn ligaments, overuse in
your younger years, run­
ning, walking... it doesn't
matter. What does matter
is the support you can get
from C-Power.
Now of course cap­
saicin will not burn you
or irritate your skin, it's
not that hot. But it does
warm and soothe your
knee in a way that noth­
ing else can.
Two new studies
show that you can signifi­
cantly reduce your pain
with capsaicin.
A recent Harvard
study showed that cap­
saicin blocked pain with­
out any side effects.
And a recent study
done at the University of
Arizona showed that cap­
saicin neutralizes a pain
neurotransmitter in your
nerve fibers so pain does-
n't register from your
brain to your knees.
Which means... you won't
have knee pain while
wearing the C-Power.
The C-Power is also
so amazing because it
helps your knees absorb
the shock of everyday liv­
ing. It insulates, warms
and soothes your knee
joints.
The C-Power is light­
-­
: It's support that really
works... it's the support
and pain relief you've
been looking for.
Do your knees ache as
soon as you get up in the
morning? Then put on
the C-Power!
Do your knees ache
when you walk or run?
Then use C-Power!
If your knees bother
you any time of the day
or night, then C-Power is
definitely for you.
It comforts your knee
pain and comes with a
secured velcro area so that
you can adjust the pain
comfort to your liking.
It's powerful yet com­
fortable!
We realize how
many knee supports
there are out there, but
there is nothing like the
C-Power.
It has one of the most
powerful all-natural pain
relievers built right in so
it works like nothing else
out there. You don't need
over-the-counter pain
pills, patches, disgusting
smelling ointments... you
just need the C-Power
with the power of cap­
saicin built right in.
C-Power works for
everyone.
It insulates, warms
%

# 67



Are you tired of hard
water problems like:
• Unsightly scale on fix-
tures, toilet bowls and
showerheads
• Scale build-up in pipes
• Poor lather from deter-
gents and shampoos (using
3-4 times the suggested
amounts)
• Clothes that look dingy
and feel harsh after washing
• Hard-to-remove film on
glass shower doors, walls
and bathtubs
• Hair that feels sticky and
looks dull
• Dry, itchy skin
• Soap scum on sinks and
appliances
• Hot water heater that heats
up more and more slowly
due to scale build-up?
If you answered “yes” to
any of these questions, you
are the perfect candidate to
try the ScaleRID Electronic
Hard Water Treatment Sys-
tem in your home for the
next 120 days.
If you don’t get RID of
your hard water problems,
you will receive a complete
refund.
But that won’t happen
because ScaleRID is the
most advanced, effective
electronic hard water treat-
ment system you will find
for such a low cost. It’s also
the easiest to install.
Q. But how exactly
does it work?
A. The ScaleRID, which
is about 4” x 6” and weighs
less than 3 pounds, treats
hard water with a patented
technology that induces
variable electric fields with
a continuously changing
frequency. This field causes
the dissolved minerals of
calcium and magnesium to
crystalize and remain in
suspension, instead of
adhering to the walls of
piping, faucets or heating
elements.
These minerals, now in
suspension, flow with the
water and are discharged
down the drain (see dia-
gram and our ScaleRID
white paper at www.sca-
lerid.com for more details).
Q. How is ScaleRID dif-
ferent from salt-based
water softeners?
A. In a salt-based water
softener, an ion exchange
takes place and the hard
ions in calcium and magne-
sium trade places with the
soft ions from the salt
poured into the tank period-
ically.
Water softeners must
constantly regenerate to
keep the ion exchange
flowing and must have salt
added at least monthly.
Most of the salt used for
regeneration gets flushed out
of the system and may be
released into the soil or
sewer. The process can be
damaging to the environ-
ment, not to mention
wasting 80-150 gallons of
water a week and adding
unhealthy salt to your water.
Q. What makes Sca-
leRID so special com-
pared to other electronic
water treatment systems?
A. International Home
Shopping (IHS) just com-
pleted a comprehensive
upgrade of ScaleRID to
make it 1) the easiest to
install; with our new exclu-
sive Quick Connect Coil
you can have your ScaleRID
up and running in about 10
minutes, 2) one of the most
advanced; with our new
computer chips to replace
the integrated circuits, the
ScaleRID is the most effi-
cient device for its cost, 3)
the least expensive; even
with all our improvements
we actually lowered our
prices so that everyone with
hard water problems can get
RID of them simply, safely
and inexpensively.
Q. Without regenera-
tion how will I know the
ScaleRID is working?
A. You will get the most
important benefit: you will
not be bothered by hard
water problems. Within the
first week, you will see the
elimination of new scale
deposits and loosening of
existing scale. Soap will
lather easier; your skin will
feel softer and your hair
cleaner and more manage-
able. Spots on dishes and
glasses will be reduced.
After 2 to 4 weeks, water
will get hotter faster due to
improved performance of
your water heater. You will
notice the reduced amounts
of soap, shampoo, deter-
gents and cleaners you need
to use to get the jobs done.
Cleaning of surfaces, espe-
cially chrome, baths and
sinks will be easier. Your
water pressure may
improve without scale clog-
ging your pipes.
Q. This sounds too good
to be true; does ScaleRID
really work?
A. The science behind
ScaleRID has been around
for years. There are hun-
dreds of thousands of units
operating in 40 countries.
But thanks to IHS, every-
one can now utilize this sci-
ence because ScaleRID is
so easy to install, so effi-
cient and effective and so
reasonably priced.
Q. What is the differ-
ence between the SR-1000
and the SR-2000?
Both have the exact
same capability to rid your
home of scale. The big dif-
ference is that the ScaleRID
SR-1000 is for moderate to
hard water and comes with
one Quick Connect Coil.
The ScaleRID SR-2000 is
for very hard water or for
homes/duplexes with large
water usage and comes
with two Quick Connect
Coils.
You cannot afford not to
try ScaleRID in your home
for 120 days. If it’s not for
you, return it for a complete
refund. YOU RISK NOTH-
ING.
Just think how you’ll
enjoy not lugging those salt
bags around, but still enjoy-
ing all the great benefits of
soft water.

ScaleRID vs. Salt-Based Water Softener Comparison

ScaleRID’s coil produces an electric field using a complex modulating frequency wave that produces an impulse
which changes the electrical and physical properties of the scale-forming molecules. This causes the adhesive
properties of the calcium carbonate crystals and other minerals to repel rather than adhere to pipes and fixtures.
The crystals remain in suspension and just go down the drain. This action stops any further build-up of scale and,
because the solubility of the water is increased, existing scale is taken back into the water and gradually removed.

By John Whitehead,
Media Services
(Canton, OH) It is being
hailed by many as the biggest
development in exercise in the
past 50 years.
This development is a new,
advanced super-compact home
exercise device set that reduces to
insignificance the time and incon-
venience required for proper
anaerobic exercise. It also makes
anaerobic exercising much easier
and much more pleasant.
Studies at major universities
including Pennsylvania State Uni-
versity, Uppsala University and
Stanford University have proven
that anaerobic exercise, using
weights for resistance, bums over
500% more fat than aerobic exer-
cise (see Figure 1).
This new device set gives you
the best anaerobic exercise weight
resistance for the least expense
and least storage space. It proper-
ly and effectively exercises every
muscle in the body.
This new device set is the
SuperShaper™ and Super Step-
perBench.™ The remarkable
SuperShaper™ and Super Step-
perBench™ can replace a full
gym. yet are so compact that they
store under a bed. They enable
you to do weight resistance anaer-
obic exercise anywhere, including
your bedroom or bathroom.
The gimmick home exercise
machines such as ski machines,
flex band machines and rowing
machines provide only low quali-
ty exercise that cannot properly
shape your body. The Super-
Shaper™ and Super Stepper-
Bench 1111 provide the high quality
exercise of a full gym.
This new equipment utilizes
an advanced program, The
Campitelli Advanced 10-Minute
Speed Exercise Method. For only
10 minutes a day before you
shower, only 5 days a week, you
will be able to eliminate excess
fat; eliminate a pot belly; gain a
stronger, more attractive, muscu-
lar body; gain stronger bones;
gain better organ function, includ-
ing better sex drive; increase your
mental abilities and you will
become much more attractive.
Those are the scientifically proven
results one can get from proper
anaerobic weight resistance exer-
cise. You will also gain a great
deal of athletic ability, including
being able to drive a golf ball 30
yards or more farther.
It is a myth that anaerobic
exercise done with weights will
put bulky male-type muscles on
women. Women do not have the
hormones for that to happen. The
female bodybuilders seen on TV
bodybuilding contests get those
muscles by taking hormonal sup-
plements and doing super-exten-
sive weight training that is not
necessary to achieve weight loss
«r.d a well-shaped body. Women
can add muscle without increas-
ing size because muscle weighs so
much more than fat. Women will
actually reduce their size with this
program and the SuperShaper.™
The women's 10-minute pro-
gram is designed to provide
women with the desirable female
body which consists of a smaller
lower body, smaller calves, small-
er, shapely thighs and hips, lifted,
rounded buttocks, flat abdomen,
larger bustline, and small but firm
arms.
The men's 10-minute program
is designed to give the desirable
V-shaped torso for the man, flat
abdomen and other desirable male
appearances.
Frank Campitelli's methods
cut the time of the actual exercise
session needed for good results.
This has been done in two ways.
First, the exercise routines are
more advanced than old-style
exercise routines and accomplish
more in the same minutes of actu-
al exercise engagement. Second,
doing these advanced routines 10
minutes a day eliminates the
requirement for rest periods
between exercise sets. This rest
period elimination also provides
aerobic exercise benefits in addi-

pain from arthritis, back,

mess, odors, and stain prob­

dients in layers of fiber. When

dients then penetrate deeply
through the skin to the source
of the pain and muscle, joints
and bones. The patches come
in a variety of sizes.

the PainNOT™ Patches on

or on small areas such as fin­
gers and toes. The patch is

wraps that are on the market.

ther. They took the ingredi­
ents that brought the pain re­
lief from the Oriental medi­
cine remedies and put them
in a remarkable patch. This
patch has the ingredients in
very advanced forms of fiber.
When the patch is applied,
the ingredients are released
over a long period of time
through the skin deeply into
the muscles, bones and joints
to the source of the pain.
There are many benefits
to a pain relief remedy that
goes directly to the source of
the pain.

ly to the source of the pain?

You can now sit and
get fit, and get the bene-
fits of exercise without
taking extra time to work-
out. This is important
because major medical
studies show sitting is a
leading cause of health
problems in the U.S. and
is even harmful to those
who exercise.
With The Life Chair™,
you can turn sitting thatsʼ
harming your health into
“active sitting”. This will
help you lose weight, get
a stronger smaller core,
and shrink and firm your
thighs, hips and glutes.
You will also feel better
and live longer.
How could something
seemingly as harmless as
sitting be this dangerous
to your health? It will make
total sense to you once
you know the reasons.
It all starts with the fact
that sitting produces negli-
gible muscle activity which
causes many health prob-
lems.
Lack of muscle activity
reduces blood circulation
and digestive system func-
tion. This causes many nu-
tritional problems including
lack of nutrients to the cells,
lack of cleansing of toxins,
the build-up of triglycerides
(bloodstream fat), the build-
up of plaque in the arteries,
and build-up of toxins in the
colon. Sitting also causes
blood to collect in the lower
body which can cause
blood clots.
Long periods of sitting
causes loss of muscle
mass. This is because the
body is programmed that
you USE IT OR LOSE IT.
When you break a bone
and put your arm in a cast,
the muscles wither quick-
ly. Astronauts who go into
space for a short period of
time, because of weight-
lessness, experience re-
duction in muscle mass
and in bone mass.
In a nutshell: SITTING
CAUSES YOUR BODY TO
TOTALLY MALFUNCTION.
But when you engage
in “active sitting” with the
Life Chair™, the opposite
happens. The body per-
ceives that stronger mus-
cles are needed so it
strengthens and firms the
muscles. This in turn
strengthens and main-
tains or increases bone
mass. To maintain and in-
crease muscle and bone
mass the body must acti-
vate organs. Therefore or-
gans become more pro-
ductive and healthy. It is a
positive chain reaction.
The Life Chair™ pro-
vides adequate muscle
activity while sitting which
you hardly notice. It gives
you the benefits of exer-
cise without going to a
gym or disrupting your
work or daily entertain-
ment. You donʼt have to
take the time to exercise.
The Life Chair™ is su-
per comfortable. Many
users say it is more com-
fortable than regular chairs.
You sit on air with a plush
padded backrest. You do
not pedal all the time. You
only pedal in short intervals
or when you want.
With The Life Chair™
you can burn an addi-
tional 75 calories with
“active sitting”. Depend-
ing on how much you sit
to read or watch TV you
could burn up to 70,000
calories in a year and
lose 20 lbs. You will also
shrink and firm your
thighs, abs, hips and
waistline. Your heart and
cardiovascular system
will be strengthened and
your energy and mental
clarity will improve.
The Life Chair™ con-
sists of a patented method
to have a core stability ball
in a configuration that
forms a comfortable chair.
It also has what has been
found to be one of the best
muscle activity and circu-
lation providers which is a
pedal device.
The exercise ball en-
courages muscle activity
virtually all over the body.
But you hardly notice it.
This is because while
you are comfortably sit-
ting, your body is con-
stantly maintaining its
balance on the exercise
ball. This causes benefi-
cial muscle activity, es-
pecially in the most im-
portant area which is the
core of your body. This
will improve your bal-
ance, breathing, posture
and lower back health.
The pedal device of-
fers you the option of
pedaling whenever you
want. This adds a great
deal of muscle activity
and circulation benefits.
You can now replace
sitting thatsʼ harming your
health with “active sitting”.
Youʼll get the benefits of
exercise without taking
the extra time to workout.
This will help you lose
weight, get a stronger,
smaller core, shrink and
firm your thighs, hips and
glutes. You will also feel
better and live longer.

## 73



EdenPURE ® is announc-
ing its partnership with
BedJet ® , an advanced new cool-
ing and heating system for your
bed that can save you money
throughout the year, while giv-
ing you the most perfect sleep
you’ve ever had.
Because of this special part-
nership with TV-famous BedJet,
a special $100 discount is being
offered to readers of this pub-
lication. This special discount
ends in 10 days from this publi-
cation date.
BedJet is the first personal
climate system that lets you cool
or heat your bed to a desired
temperature within a matter of
3 minutes. It’s not an electric
blanket or a fan. BedJet is a
quiet, ultra-rapid climate con-
trol system. It’s designed by a
former NASA contracted engi-
neer, whose work on providing
climactic control for space suits
helped him design this revolu-
tionary sleeping system.
BedJet works by transferring
warm and cool air throughout
your bedsheets by the process of
convection. And much like the
life-saving climactic controls on
NASA space suits, BedJet is a
personal climate system. BedJet
is designed to give you total con-
trol of your sleeping comfort.
Good sleep is one of the most
important parts of a healthy life-
style. When sleep patterns are
interrupted by body temperature
changes, it can be very harm-
ful to your health. Sleep loss
is proven to impair judgement,
make you forgetful and can
even lead to heart disease, heart
attack, high blood pressure and
diabetes.
Do you wake up at night
to kick the covers off or to add
another layer of clothing? If so,
then you have interrupted sleep.
So before you start to feel the
negative effects of sleep loss,
try personal climate-controlled
BedJet for the perfect sleep.
With EdenPURE’s BedJet,
you’ll never get too hot in the
middle of the night because your
mattress retains heat and makes
you sweat. And, why would
you turn your air condition-
ing up at night just so you can
sleep? That’s a waste of energy,
especially because it’s cooler at
night. With one touch on your
remote or phone app, BedJet
fills your bed with comfortable,
refreshing air for the perfect
sleeping temperature.
Did you know that The
Department of Energy says that
you can save up to 4% on your
heating bill for every degree your
thermostat is lowered? Now you
can turn down your thermostat
when it’s cold at night, saving
on heating bills. And instead of
getting into a freezing cold bed,
with socks and layers of clothes,
imagine BedJet gently warm-
ing your bed, wrapping you in
warmth like hot towels from the
dryer.
BedJet works with your
existing bedsheets and takes
only one minute to install.
Unlike electric blankets that can
take up to an hour to raise your
bed temperature by 20 degrees,
BedJet raises the temperature of
a king sized bed by 30 degrees in
just minutes. And with BedJet,
there’s no worry about poten-
tial harm and burns while you’re
sleeping, like with electric blan-
kets.
Even though it produces
such powerful heat, the BedJet
emits warm air equivalent to the
safe temperature of your home
HVAC air register vent. But
safety doesn’t end there. The
BedJet contains a sophisticated
microprocessor that constantly
adjusts to maintain consistent
and safe temperatures. This
microprocessor also ensures
BedJet automatically shuts off
if there is a blockage or problem
of any sort.
In line with EdenPURE’s
other healthy home products,
BedJet has a lifetime washable
air filter. The only maintenance
your BedJet will ever need is
cleaning its lifetime filter once
every three months by running it
under some water.
And because of its patent-
pending acoustic damping
technology, BedJet runs much
quieter than even a window air
conditioning unit or a fan.
BedJet can either be con-
trolled with a remote or a phone
app, allowing you to turn it to
your desired temperature before
you get in bed, even from anoth-
er room!
And BedJet’s timer system
ensures that you can shut it off at
any time of the night. You can
even set it to wake you up with
a warm or cold blast of air in the
morning.
You can even customize
your BedJet experience. The
BedJet Dual Zone Climate Con-
trol System allows you to stay
toasty warm at night while your
partner can adjust their settings
for a cooler night’s sleep. Talk
to a representative to see how
to turn your BedJet into a Dual
Zone Climate System.
The regular price of BedJet
is $499.00 plus $21.00 shipping
and handling. However, read-
ers of this publication are being
offered a never-before-seen dis-
count of $100. For the next 10
days of this publication date,
you can get a $100 discount and
FREE shipping and handling,
bringing your total to $399
delivered. This is an unbeliev-
able price that makes owning a
BedJet even easier.
TO CLAIM THIS DIS-
COUNT, you must call 1-800-
390-5044 or send in the Dis-
count Instructions to the right.
If you and your partner require
different temperature zones,
please call 1-800-390-5044 and
ask about the BedJet Dual Zone
Climate System.
BedJet by EdenPURE ® car-
ries a 60-day satisfaction guar-
antee. If you are not totally satis-
fied, you can return it for a full
refund, return shipping is paid.
It’s like you’re getting to try
BedJet out free for 60 days.

or convenient at-home

it emits 4.5 SCFH of disin-
fectant power into your
water.
The EdenPURE® Port-
able Water Purifier runs
at full power on two 9-volt
batteries that can be
recharged with a pocket
book-sized, lightweight
solar panel included with
each unit. Or just plug it
into an outlet.
Bottled water isn't the
answer. A four-year
study by NRDC has
shown alarming inconsis-
tencies in purity. Some
brands were even shown
to contain bacterial cont-
aminants.
And bottled water can
be expensive, costing
more than gas and milk.
Make your own purified
water at home for mere
pennies per bottle.
The EdenPURE® Port-
able Water Purifier
comes in a portable

enough to fit in a kitchen
drawer.
Ozone is an all-
natural, safe water disin-
fectant. The EPA has
approved its use in water
treatment facilities and
the FDA has approved it

# Living Organisms potentially


# present in untreated domestic water

ORGANISM DISEASE SYMPTOMS
Bacteria
Escherichia coli Gastroenteritis diarrhea, nausea, vomiting, cramping
Leptospira Leptospirosis headaches, muscle ache, chills, fever
Salmonella typhi Typhoid fever poor appetite, headaches, diarrhea
Salmonella Salmonellosis food poisoning, diarrhea, vomiting
Shigella Shlgeiiosis bloody diarrhea, cramps, vomiting
(bacillary dysentery)
Vibno cholerae Cholera watery diarrhea, low BP, rapid heart rate
Protozoa
Batantidium coli Balantidiasis chronic diarrhea, pain, bloody stools
Cryptosporidium parvum Cryptosporidiosis fever, weight loss, diarrhea, dehydration
Entamoeba histolytica Amebiasis jaundice, anorexia, diarrhea, pain
(amoebic dysentery)
Giardia lamblia Giardiasis gas, diarrhea, fatigue, cramps, nausea
Viruses
Enteroviruses (72 types. Gastroenteritis, diarrhea, nausea, vomiting, cramping
e.g., polio, echo, and heart anomalies, heart anomalies (medically diagnosed)
Coxsackie viruses) meningitis high fever, stiff neck, confusion, nausea
Hepatitis A virus Infectious hepatitis nausea, rash, pain, jaundice, diarrhea
Norwalk agent Gastroenteritis diarrhea, nausea, vomiting, cramping
Rotavirus Gastroenteritis diarrhea, nausea, vomiting, cramping
for food industries
throughout the nation for
removal of disease
causing bacteria, viruses
and germs. Ozone also
helps to eliminate chlo-
rine, pesticides and other
toxic chemicals from your
drinking water.
Ozone, as emitted from
the EdenPURE® Water
Purifier, is considered the
safest form of water purifi-
cation because it does not
leave the dangerous by-
products that chlorine
does. The cleaning power
of ozone gives you the
purest drinking water avail-
able without harsh chemi-
cals.
The breakthrough tech-
nology used in the new
EdenPURE® Portable
Water Purifier is currently
being used throughout the
world at major companies
for its super purifying
power. These companies
include major Amusement
Parks, Glamorous Hotels,
Renowned Zoos and
manufacturers of commer-
cial and home spas.
For more information
on the EdenPURE® Port-
able Water Purifier, here
is an interview I had with
the chief water analyst
with BioTech Research:
Q: What is Ozone?
A: Ozone is a natu-
rally occurring form and
contains three oxygen
molecules. Ozone has
been clinically proven to
kill 99.9% of all water-
borne disease causing
bacteria and viruses.
Ozone has been used for
over 110 years, since
1893, to purify water
systems throughout the
world. The largest ozone
purification system is
currently being used in
the city of Los Angeles.
Q: How does Ozone
disinfect?
A: Ozone is highly
unstable, and in the world
of molecules this means
that ozone is going to
immediately attach Itself to
other molecules in the
water, causing them to
oxidize. It is a super
powerful oxidizing agent
because it willingly gives
up one of its molecules to
become a more stable
oxygen. And because It is
a super powerful oxidizing
agent, it is toxic to most
watertx)me organisms.
Through oxidation, the
cellular walls of the
organic materials to
which it attaches is cut
into, like a sharp blade
cutting through a tomato.
By exposing the inside of
these organisms, the cell
almost immediately dies
off.
Q: Is Ozone safe?
A: Ozone is completely
safe in the upper atmos-
phere and in water. Ozone
should never be inhaled
directly and, when used with
the EdenPURE® Portable
Water Purifier, should
always be placed in the
water before starting the
system. Once the ozone is
diffused through the water, it
quickly becomes regular
oxygen before it bubbles to
the surface.
Because of its insta-
bility, ozone cannot be
stored and must be used
on site to purify water,
making the ultimate
portability of the Eden-
PURE® Water Purifier a
major benefit whether
you are using it in your
kitchen, while camping,
backpacking or in your
RV holding tank water.
Q: l\/ty water looks
good and comes from the
city. Why do I need the
EdenPURE® Water Puri-
fier?
A: There are two
major problems in this
question. First, "my
water looks good."
Microorganisms like
bacteria and viruses that
cause disease are not
visible to the human eye.
Secondly, your city
water has to travel
through miles of under-
ground pipes after it has
been cleaned and sani-
tized at the water treat-
ment plants. Along these
hundreds of miles ot
pipes, your water can
pick up any number of
contaminants. The EPA
even allows prescribed
amounts of contaminants
In your water. These
delivery pipes are some-
times over 100 years old
and are made from
multiple materials like
lead, copper, PVC and
ceramic. They can be
corroded and breaking
down, leaving deposits in
your water.
For the most part, cities
do an acceptable job of
cleaning the water, but
many must add chlorine to
help combat the nasty
contaminants. But chlo-
rine leaves dangerous by-
products in your water.
Q: I already have a
water filter. Why should I
get the EdenPURE®
Water Purifier?
A: The EdenPURE®
Portable Water Purifier Is
an excellent final step to
purify your drinking
water. Water filters do
not kill bacteria in your
water. Aside from the
EdenPURE® Water Puri-
fier, the only other type of
unit that can is a distiller.
Distillers are often
cheaply made and need
a great deal of mainte-
nance for upkeep and
cleaning. They are big,
bulky and generally
require special plumbing
where they take up valu-
able countertop or under
counter space. AND
distillers remove all the
healthy minerals and vita-
mins you need In your
water.
The EdenPURE® Water
Purifier is completely
portable, maintenance-free
and requires no special
hook-ups. It has the ability
to purify more water, faster
and on demarxl.
Q: Why would I want
to travel with the Eden-
PURE® Portable Water
Purifier?
A: Whether you are
camping, RVing or trav-
eling to another country,
the EdenPURE® Portable
Water Purifier is an
important defense to
keep you and your family
healthy. No one knows
for sure where the water
you're drinking has come
from or how well It has
been treated.
If the water In your RV
holding tank was
obtained from a spigot,
was it filtered, and what
was the source of the
water? And If It has been
sitting In your holding
tank for a long period of
time, have the bacteria

1 liter s 2 minutes

and viruses multiplied to

And we've all heard
stories about avoiding the
water in foreign countries.
Well, this is because they

The EdenPURE® will
