# PURGE DRINKING WATER OF BAD


# TASTE AND SMELL IN 30 SECONDS


# Lower chlorine taste and smell, prolong the life of a pot of coffee,


# increase high oxygen content, lengthen bloom life of flowers


# Readers of this publication get a $75 discount

Health and Wellness Center
CANTON, Ohio
The Health and Wellness Center of
International Home Shopping in
Canton, Ohio is releasing a remarkable
technology that magically turns your
water into a pleasurable, useful experi­
ence for $$$ less than other purification
systems.
This breakthrough technology will
even decrease the chlorine taste and
smell in your water. With users report­
ing huge changes in their water, the
Magic Living Water Ceramics are now
available to you.
This state-of-the-art Magic Living
Water Ceramic will even provide you
with increased levels of High-Oxygen
content. By doing this, your body's liv­
ing cells get energized and work toward
a healthier you.
It is important that you have a com­
plete understanding of the Magic
Living Water Ceramic, how it works,
why it is important and how the Living
Water Ceramics can help you. Please
read through these important questions.
Q: What do the Magic Living
Water Ceramics do?
A: This nano-technology ceramic
"cleanses" your water, creating healthi­
er water for you, your family, your pet
and even your plants.
Q: But how can I use them?
A: Truly Magic Living Water
Ceramic's uses are endless. Let's just
run through a few of the huge benefits:
• First and foremost, in your Drinking
Water. The Magic Living Water
Ceramics can be used to reduce the
total amount of chlorine in your water -
both in taste and smell. And if you
have city water, you are very familiar
with the taste and smell of chlorine;
especially when the water gets warm.
• Deodorizing: help deodorize your
refrigerator, car or any smelly area.
• Removes Stains: the Magic Living
Water Ceramic has a cleaning effect.
Be sure to watch your containers to see
them remain stain-free.
• Wine: the spiciness and rough taste
of wine will decrease, making for a
more enjoyable glass of your favorite
vino.
• Coffee: ever had the desire to make
a pot of coffee, only to have it turn
before you can finish it? With these
ceramics, your pot of coffee will
remain fresh longer.
• Milk: make your milk more tasty
and improve the level of absorption.
An open container will even last longer
without spoiling.
• Flower arrangements: tired of spend­
ing huge amounts of money for beautiful
fresh flowers that do not last long enough
to enjoy? A Magic Living Water Ceramic
placed in the water of your vase will
increase the bloom time of many flowers.
• Potted Plants: placed in the soil of
your houseplants, the ceramic will
encourage growth and healthiness.
• Leftovers: include a Magic Living
Water Ceramic in the container with your
leftovers and lengthen the storage time.
• And so much more ...
Q: How do the Magic Living
Water Ceramics work?
A: The reaction created by the
nano-materials in the Magic Living
Water Ceramics allows the water mole­
cules to release the "junk" like chlorine.
Q: More technical?
A: Far Infrared Radiation is emitted
from the light from the sun as well as
animals, plants, rocks and humans. Far
Infrared Radiation is invisible to the
naked eye but can be viewed with spe­
cial scopes. Generally speaking, the
human body can emit this radiation
with 5um~30um wavelength. It is a
natural occurrence we live with on a
daily basis.
The Magic Living Water Ceramics,
with its nano-material make-up, also
emit Far Infrared Radiation With a
wavelength of 6um~14um. This wave­
length is responsible for changing the
molecular structure of liquids and
gases. This wavelength has a vibration
frequency of 1,000,000,000,000 times
per second (10 12 times/sec).
This ultra fast frequency "shakes"
the water molecules, forcing them into
their original state of two hydrogen
molecules and one oxygen molecule or
H 2 0. This resonance displaces other
molecules that don't belong in the
make-up of water such as chlorine.
You asked for it.
Q: How long do they take to
work?
A: The time will vary depending on
what you want to accomplish.
Scientific studies show that the amount
of solvent or dissolved oxygen increas­
es 8% in 30 seconds. The level of chlo­
rine in water decreases 30% in only 30
seconds.
Anions, or negatively charged ions,
increase 50% in 3 minutes. When the
presence of negatively charged ions in
your water are absorbed into your body
they attach themselves to positively
charged toxin ions within the cells to bal­
ance the cells. By forcing this balance,
the cells' optimum efficiency is achieved
allowing the cells to extract nutrients and
dispose of unwanted waste.
In this ideal state where the ions are
balanced, your cells renew their energy,
renewing overall energy levels for a
result of a general feeling of well-
being, both physical and mental.
Q: Are the Magic Living Water
Ceramics safe?
A: Yes, if used properly. Although
it is important to know the Magic
Living Water Ceramics should not be
swallowed and they should be kept out
of reach of children.
Q: Will they hurt me?
A: No, not if used properly. The Living
Magic Water Ceramic is safe for use.
Q: Are the Magic Living Water
Ceramics guaranteed?
A: Absolutely. If you do not expe­
rience a difference in the way you feel
after 60 days, return the unit and all the
components to us for a full refund of
the purchase price. There is no risk.
For those who wish to obtain the
Magic Living Water Ceramics, the fol­
lowing information is provided.

By: S. Hufford. Media Services
Just standing on a vibra­
tion platform for only 10-12
minutes a day can give you
amazing life-changing bene­
fits.
Could there possibly be
a device that can provide all
the benefits listed in the box
to the right in only IO min­
utes a day?
This remarkable device
is called the HealthForce
3000 and it provides you
with advanced vibration
technology which is being
used across the country and
around the world for strength
training, improved blood cir­
culation. mobility, pain
reduction and much more.
The origin of this tech­
nology goes back over 40
years when scientists of the
former Soviet Union began
to use vibration technology
to train athletes for the
Olympics.
Later, it was used by
cosmonauts and today
NASA’s Johnson Space
Center uses vibration tech­
nology to help astronauts
maintain bone density after
returning from space.
Vibration technology is
now being used in major
medical, rehabilitation and
therapeutic centers across the
country, as well as the
nation’s top health clubs,
professional sports facilities
and private gyms.
The gyms in yourcity
probably have vibration
devices, but such a commer­
cial machine can cost
$10,000.00 or more.
BioTeeh’s big breakthrough
is successfully redesigning
and improving vibration
technology so you can use
this multi-benefit technology
in your living room, base­
ment or rec room for a frac­
tion of the cost of the big
commercial models.
The benefits of this
amazing machine are so
incredible, we wanted to get
more details on the new
HealthForce 3000, so we
interviewed Lead Research
and Development Analyst
for BioTech Research, Dan
Koehler.
Q. Just how does the
HealthForce 3000 work?
A. The secret of this
amazing new machine is in
the vibrations it generates.
You just plug in the machine
and dial the frequency of the
vibrations you desire 26Hz
(26 vibrations a second) to
60 Hzs.
When you stand, sit or in
any way come in contact
with the HealthForce 3000
vibrating platform, the vibra­
tions are gently and comfort­
ably transferred to your
body.
The important reaction
that occurs from the vibra­
tion is that your muscles con­
tract and expand 30 to 50
times per second, which is
much faster than can be
achieved by any other type
of regular therapy or exer­
cise.
Also, vibrations increase
the amount of muscle fibers
being activated. For exam­
Advanced
ple: during conventional
exercise or therapy a maxi­
mum of 40% of your muscle
fibers are used. But with the
HealthForce 3000, 95% or
more of your muscle fibers
Vibration
Technology on the
HealthForce 3000 has helped:
• improve muscle strength
and performance
• accelerate weight loss
• increase flexibility and
range of motion
• enhance critical blood flow
throughout your entire body
• increase secretion of
hormones that are important
in regeneration and repair
processes for the body, such
as HGH (Human Growth
Hormone) and testosterone
• increase the “happy
hormone”; serotonin and
neurotrophine, a substance
that supports your thinking
process
• speed recovery
• reduce lower back pain
• enhance pain reduction
• improve collagen production
• reduce the appearance of
cellulite
• eliminate the effects of stress
• strengthen bones and tendon
tissue
• improve joint mobility
dramatically
are used.
This explains why just
lying, standing or sitting on
the platform for IO to 20
minutes a day is enough to
significantly improve circu­
lation, strength, flexibility
and balance. Your body is
getting a workout totally
through vibration.
Just think what happens
when you do exercises,
stretching or lifting on the
platform. The platform
greatly magnifies the advan­
tage of the workout.
Q. Is the HealthForce
30(H) safe?
A. Yes, the HealthForce
3000 is as safe or safer to use
than other conventional
types of exercise equipment.
We have added the sta­
bilizing bar to improve the
safety of this quality device
so that everyone feels com­
fortable standing or exercis­
ing on the platform.
We do advise everyone
to consult their physicians
before beginning a vibration
exercise program. Some
people will not be able to to
use the HealthForce 3000.
Q. Who can use vibra­
tion technology?
A. A whole spectrum of
people use vibration technolo­
gy from the very fit to the
people who are difficult to
train due to old age, disease,
weight or injury. Many NFL
teams including the New
York Giants, San Diego
Chargers and Tampa Bay
Bucs; NBA teams including
the San Antonio Spurs; MLB
teams including the Atlanta
Braves use vibration technol­
ogy in their training facilities.
Many Olympic trainers
as well as numerous celebri­
ties use vibration technology.
But, vibration devices
can also be found in nursing
homes because they are per­
fect for people who are diffi­
cult to train. Vibration tech­
nology provides a workout
with no damage to bone, lig­
aments and joints.
The American College
of Rheumatology reports that
after 6 weeks of vibration

therapy, nursing home vol­

Q. Are the advantages
to using the HealthForce
3000 other than fitness and
strength increase real?
A. Yes, the advantages
of regular use of vibration
therapy are endless. Studies
show that, by increasing cir­
culation, the vibrations can
loosen up coagulated tissues
and break down cellulite.
Also, due to increased
circulation and stimulation
of the nerves, pain can be
diminished. This technology
has also been shown to
increase bone density and
tendon tissue as well as help
regulate hormones.
A study done in October
2001 shows that it dramati­
cally improves Joint Flexi­
bility.
Another study showed
that this technology helps
with postmenopausal women
and was highly beneficial in
geriatrics.
While other studies have
shown that this technology
helped to accelerate increase
of muscle thickness, recov­
ery and improvement of
muscular flexibility after a
ligament ACL rupture.
The benefits of the
Seventy--something
great grandmother
stretching on the
Health Force 3(HH)
HealthForce 3000 are amaz­
ing. There is just no way
around it.
Q. Is the HealthForce
3(MM) easy to use?
A. Absolutely, we have
engineered the HealthForce
3000 to be not only effective,
but easy to use. It plugs into
any standard electrical outlet,
right out of the box, and
you’re good to go.
Q. Does it use a lot of
electricity?
A. No, the HealthForce
3000 motor draws about .5
amps which is the same as a
standard 60 Watt lightbulb.
Q. Can I move it from
room to room?
A. Yes, the HealthForce
3000 is completely mobile.
The platform is about I foot
by 3 feet and weighs about
35 pounds. It’s only about 5
inches high so, when not in
use, you can slide it under
most beds or stand it on end
in a closet. The stabilizing
bar folds up for easy storage
too.

# You can extend your dog or cat’s life by 20% to 60% longer

By John Whitacre, Media Service
New research has now
discovered how to extend
your dog or cat’s life by 20%
to 60% and avoid many dis­
abilities.
To find out how, I inter­
viewed one of the leading
researchers on pet life exten­
sion and disability avoid­
ance, Dr. Steve Tsengas,
Ph.D. Dr. Tsengas has writ­
ten a book on how to prolong
a dog or cat’s life and avoid
aging disabilities. He has
also developed many life
extension and disabilities
avoidance products. The
interview follows.
Q. Dr. Tsengas, how
long is it possible to extend
the life of a dog or cat using
your methods and prod­
ucts?
A. Depending on the dog
or cat, you can increase their
life by 20% to 60% over
average life spans of the
past. We are not extending a
dog’s or cat’s normal life
with these new develop­
ments. Rather, we are
extending their short abnor­
mal life span and allowing
them to live to their full nor­
mal life span.
It was once believed that
dogs and cats, based on their
breed, had a certain life span.
But the data to calculate their
life span was taken from
household pets.
Research has found that
household pets have a shorter
life span because of the same
things that shorten the life
span of humans. The things
that cause the shortening of
life span in both humans and
animals are bad nutrition,
lack of proper exercise, lack
of mental stimulation and
other mental problems.
Q. Let’s start with
nutrition. I have a dog, and
most of my family mem­
bers have both dogs and
cats. The dog and cat food
we buy claims to be totally
balanced in nutrition. Is
that not so?
A. That is definitely not
so. And, humans have the
same problem, even if
they’re eating a so-called
balanced diet. Here is why.
New scientific research
has now found that most
complex animals, which
would include humans, dogs
and cats, need 122 nutrients
in order to live out their life
span and to live a healthy life
span. It is now proven that
the human life span is actual­
ly 120 years old, not 60
years old.
So why do humans and
their pets die at half their
normal life span? One reason
is that most of us get only an
average of 40 of the 122
nutrients needed to live out a
full and healthy life.
Q. But, how do people,
who think they are giving
their pets a balanced diet,
miss out on the other 82
nutrients?
A. Those other 82 nutri­
ents are missing for a multi­
tude of reasons.
First of all, the soil from
which crops are farmed in
most of the United States has
been depleted of most of the
122 nutrients. Farmers only
replenish about 40 of the 122
nutrients needed to live a full
healthy life span. Another
Dr. Steve Tsengas, shown in a laboratory above, has done a great
deal of scientific research on the life extension of dogs and cats.
big cause of nutrient deple­
tion is food processing and
distribution.
If it takes too long for
food to get to market, many of
the nutrients in crops die off.
Food processing and
refinement depletes many
more nutrients. For example,
the most nutritious part of
wheat, rice, sugar, etc. is sepa­
rated out and we are left with
nutrition void by-products of
the original whole product.
Another major nutrition
depletion culprit is cooking
food. Most cooking, espe­
cially at high temperatures,
kill off many nutrients. Many
pet foods are overcooked.
Q. So then how can we
get the other 82 nutrients
for our pets?
A. In most cases you will ,
have to do it with supplemen­
tation. But, the trouble is,
most supplements do not pro­
vide enough of the missing
nutrients or the nutrients they
provide are not absorbable by
the pet’s body.
I have developed a nutri­
tional supplement line that,
in my professional opinion,
provides the missing nutri­
ents and provides them in
absorbable form by pets.
Q. Okay, now let’s get
to the exercise problem.
How in the world do you
exercise a dog or a cat?
A. There are ways that
you can exercise your dog or
cat. One way to exercise your
dog is a daily walk. The walk
provides quality time and
exercise for you and your
dog. A simple game of fetch
in the yard or park also keeps
your dog active and happy.
On the other hand, cats
are more independent and
when outside prefer to exer­
cise alone. Cats can remain
active if the owner uses a toy
that creates interest like my
Play-N-Squeak Wand.
I also have more
advanced ways to exercise
your dog or cat that I provide
in my book.
Q. Let’s now address
the mental problems. How
does lack of mental stimu­
lation curtail a pet’s life
span and cause disabilities?
research has also found. The
brain deteriorates when inac­
tive. Also, the more your pet
stays mentally positive and
emotionally upbeat, the
healthier you pet’s immune
system. If your pet is
depressed or bored, the
immune system goes down.
Therefore, a happy and
active pet maintains a higher
immune system, resists dis­
ease and has a higher quality
of life.
A. The mind is the same
as the rest of your body, new
Q. How do you stimu­
late a pet mentally?
A. I have developed
interactive toys that chal­
lenge your pet mentally and
physically. The Buster Food
Cube and MolecuBall for
dogs and the Play-N-Treat
for cats provide mental stim­
ulation. We try to challenge
them to figure out “how am I
going to get the treat out of
there?” Your pet will work
with the toy for the reward
of the treat.
Veterinarians recommend
these portion control toys for
both mental and physical
stimulation.
I also provide other
advanced ways to stimulate
your pet mentally in my book.
Q. What other mental
problems shorten life span?
A. Your pet’s body pro­
duces a neurotransmitter
which is a kind of brain food
that assists brain function. If a
mental activity decreases, for
example, if a pet is left alone
for long periods, the body
will cease to product the neu­
rotransmitters. Mental and
physical stimulation decrease.
Bones and muscles atrophy
from the lack of stimulation.
When a dog comes into a
family, it looks upon the fami­
ly as its social structure. Who­
ever feeds the dog and gives it
instruction becomes the alpha
person or leader. Long periods
of separation cause anxiety,
aggression and leads to other
problems like overfeeding and
obesity. These issues all lead
to a poor quality of life and
shorter life span. I tell people
how to avoid these problems
in my book.
Q. You have produced a
Pet Life Extension and Dis­
ability Avoidance Kit.
What is in this kit?
The Pet Life Extension and Disability Avoidance Kit includes breakthrough new products to provide dogs and cats
with mental stimulation. Lack of usage of the brain has now been linked to disorders of the brain and damage to
the health of humans and animals. Pictures above are mental stimulation products in the dog and cat kit. The
products pictured here are treat dispenser toys that make pets use their brains to move the toy in ways that it
dispenses treats.
DOG KIT CAT KIT
Each Pet Life Extension And Disability Avoidance Kit contains: 1) the book, How To Prolong Your Dog or Cat’s Life
And Avoid Many Aging Disabilities, by Dr. Steve Tsengas; 2) a food dispensing toy which helps stimulate the pets
mental abilities; 3) nutritional treats for the toys and 4) a monthly supply of Healthy Daily Support Supplements
which contain natural essential nutrients that are missing in pet food including vitamins, minerals and probiotics.
This kit was developed by Dr. Tsengas and AdventPET. AdventPET is also the authorized distributor.
There are two kits, one
for dogs and one for cats.
Each kit will contain my
book, How To Prolong Your
Dqs or Cat’s Life. And
an innovative pet product
company that helped me
develop these products.
Avoid Many Aging Disabil­
ities. In the book, I discuss
getting to know your cat
and dog with chapters on
domestication and behavior.
There is also other informa­
tive information about cats
and dogs that will enable
humans to better understand
their pets and how they can
take better care of them.
In the book, I also dis­
cuss aging. Aging is not a
disease but rather a gradual,
cumulative degeneration of
physical and mental abilities.
I discuss what is aging, how
does it occur, what can be
done to slow it down and
reduce it’s affect throughout
the pet’s lifetime. I also dis­
cuss how to improve the
quality of life during your
pets golden years.
Each kit contains a food
dispensing toy which helps
stimulate the pets mental
abilities. Also included are
nutritional treats for the toys.
There is also a monthly sup­
ply of Healthy Daily Support
Supplements which contain
natural critical nutrients that
are missing in pet food
including vitamins, minerals
and probiotics.

tor for this kit is AdventPET,

# UttraGuard Protects Illinois Residents From


# Mosquitoes Carrying Deadly West Nile Virus


# TWO pond trap Mis ami rtminates mom mosquitoes than those 50 Ones Its size

By John Whltehead, Media Services
A new revolutionary product
guaranteed to rid yards of harm-
fill mosquitoes is now ready for
residents of Illinois.
This exclusive product is
being distributed in Illinois for
the first time under its brand
name of UltraGuard 11 ' Mosquito
Trap.
It is a specially designed
mosquito trap weighing only
two pounds and was the best
performing trap when inde-
pendently tested against the
markets leading name brands.
The UltraGuard uses a
proven method that is not only
safe for the environment but
also safe for the entire family
including all types of pets.
The design is revolutionary
when compared to other brands in
the marketplace. It is guaranteed
to operate at maximum perform-
ance to rid properties of harmful
mosquito colonies that may carry
the deadly West Nile Virus.
Studies done by the Illinois
Department of Public Health
show 252 human cases of West
Nile were diagnosed in 21 coun-
ties in the state of Illinois in 2005.
The department also recorded 12
deaths in 2005 caused by West
Nile Vims.
This governmental study
also shows a yearly increase of
West Nile cases in the state of
Illinois.
And those are just the report-
ed cases. Many times West Nile
Virus is not even detected
because one's body is able to
fight it off with no noticeable
effects. However, many people
are beginning to show signs of
the virus at a surprisingly
alarming rate.
, Many of the symptoms
include severe headache, stiff
neck, high fever, mental confu-
sion, muscle weakness, shak-
ing, convulsions, paralysis and
even death in the worst cases.
Many Illinois residents
believe the West Nile Virus is
only carried by mosquitoes near
rivers or the Great Lakes.
However, this type of
thought process is completely
untrue. The deadly virus has
caused human illness, and even
death in the state of Illinois for
many years. It continues to
spread into every county and
various life forms have tested
positive in 52 Illinois counties.
In fact, residents who are
perfectly healthy have just as
much a chance to contract West
Nile Virus as someone who has
continuous health problems.
Most people who contract
the West Nile Virus have no
symptoms at all. On average,
only 1 in 100 people infected
with West Nile actually develop
severe conditions.
Illinois residents who want to
keep themselves safe from West
Nile Vims, along with the many
other diseases that mosquitoes
carry, have already began to
request the UltraGuard in record
numbers.
As mentioned, the UltraGuard
is unlike any mosquito trap or
repellent available to the public.
Nat only because it weighs only
two pounds, but also because it
is very effective and focuses on
capturing the female mosqui-
toes, which stops the reproduc-
tion lines of a colony or mos-
quito infested area.
By focusing on the biting
female mosquitoes, the Ultra-
Guard is ridding properties of
the mosquitoes that may carry
harmful diseases such as yellow
tever, malaria and the deadly
West Nile virus.
; The UltraGuard is not like
other types of mosquito traps or
repellents which rely primarily
on dangerous chemicals, harm-
ful carbon dioxide or ineffec-
tive electronic sound waves as a
means of attracting mosquitoes.
During an independent 12-
day study, the UltraGuard Mos-
quito Trap not only caught the
most mosquitoes, but also
achieved maximum perform-
and proves the UltraGuard con-
sistently caught more mosqui-
toes than other leading brands.
The UltraGuard even outper-
formed traps using harmful car-
bon dioxide and dangerous
propane tanks. Those carbon
dioxide traps are said to be the
best because the carbon dioxide
simulates human breath, a natu-
ral attractant of mosquitoes.
However, it is now proven
that these traps are not the best
and the UltraGuard Mosquito
Trap is simply better without
using harmful toxins such as
carbon dioxide.
The UltraGuard beats the
brand names that are found at big
name home and garden retail
stores.
All of those expensive big
name brands promise to reduce
the number of bothersome mos-
quitoes. But in all actuality, the
traps themselves provide little or
no benefit to consumers. Plus,
these ineffective traps can cost
anywhere from a few hundred
dollars to well over a thousand
dollars.
The two pound UltraGuard
Mosquito Trap is very stylish and
ance without using any harmful
'carbon dioxide (CO2) or poten-
tially dangerous propane.
This independent scientific
study was conducted in the out-
back swamp lands of Australia
perfectly matches inside and out-
side decor. Its patented design
allows it to look like standard
patio decorations.
The revolutionary design com-
bines three high tech methods to
attract the female mosquito that
must have blood to reproduce.
First, the upper section uses a
new, proven, multi-frequency,
digital pulse lighting system.
This state of the ail system uses
special multi-color lighting to get
the attention of mosquitoes. In
addition to sending out beams of
special light, the light is com-
bined with a true-to-real-life
pulsing sensation which makes
the female think a potential mate
is nearby. Therefore, while in
search of her mate, the female is
pulled into the UltraGuard by the
high-powered aeration system.
Next, the UltraGuard incor-
porates a high output variable
heating device that tricks mos-
quitoes into thinking they are fly-
ing toward some type of mam-
mal. Now, the female mosquitoes
will think a blood meal is nearby
and once close enough, the Ultra-
Guards high powered aeration
system pulls it inside.
Lastly, small environment
friendly octonal strips are
attached to the inside bottom of
the casing. Octonal is a proven
attractant mixture that kills only
mosquitoes that fly into a cer-
tain area. It is a much safer
attractant than airborne sprays
or pesticides that instantly kill
most flying insects.
The instant killer sprays and
pesticides are often more dan-
gerous to the person using the
product than the actual insect it
is supposed to be killing.
With the UllraGuard Mos-
quito Trap, readers will not
have to worry about being bit-
ten by mosquitoes because
there simply will not be any
around. The UltraGuard, when
used regularly over a period of
time, will virtually eliminate
the entire mosquito population
in the area.
The United States Environ-
mental Protection Agency
(EPA) has stated that mosquito
borne illnesses are among the
leading cause of sickness and
death in the entire world.
In addition, the World Health
Organization states there are well
over 300 million clinical cases
filed each year due to harmful dis-
ease carrying mosquitoes.
Even with great advance-
ments in science and medicine,
mosquitoes still pose a serious
threat to every state and region
of the United States and many
parts of the world.
A common method to fight
mosquitoes is local fogging to
kill mosquito-infested areas.
The main problem other than
being extremely expensive is
that it only kills mosquitoes on
contact and others seem to
always return soon after.
The UltraGuard can even be
operated 24 hours a day with no
harmful chemicals and at virtu-
ally no cost.
For more details on the

UltraGuard, here is my educa-
tional interview with Mark
Collins, Chief of Staff, Product
Development for the IHS
Health and Wellness Center.
Q. What needs to be
known about mosquitoes that
the public may not already
know?
A. Well, there are quite a few
things that people get confused
about when talking about mosqui-
toes.
First, all mosquitoes are not
alike. There are actually over
3,000 different species around
the world and over 170 differ-
ent verifiable species are locat-
ed in the continental United
States.
Next, mosquito adults feed on
all sorts of (lower nectar, juices
and decaying matter. However it
is only the female adults that
thrive on blood.
Female mosquitoes require
the blood meal only for the
development of her eggs.
Plus, people are not always
the primary source for these
blood meals. Horses, cattle,
birds, cats and dogs to name a
few are also acceptable sources
of blood for these female mos-
quitoes.
Q. Why does the Ultra-Guard
Mosquito Trap work so well?
A. It works like no other mos-
quito repellent or trap on the mar-
ket. The UltraGuard Mosquito
Trap works so well because it per-
fectly combines all the elements
that attract mosquitoes.
Plus it is safe and easy to
operate. One never has to
worry about where to put it or
what time of the day to operate
it. This miracle worker can run
twenty-four hours a day, seven
days a week.
Q. What other options do
people have when trying to
get rid of mosquitoes?
A. Most consumers go to
local retail stores to purchase
candles with citronella, assorted
coils and repellent sprays.
They may also purchase
sound wave devices, bug zap-
pers, mosquito magnets, carbon
dioxide producing machines
and even a high powered
propane operated device.
None of the above have
proven to eliminate mosquitoes
for long periods of lime. These
are the types of items that look
good in the store, but perform
terribly when put to work by the
consumer.
End of interview.

# MAJOR DEVELOPMENT


# New lotion gets collagen and hyaluronic


# acid into the skin without $1.000 injections


# Helps renew wrinkled, sagging and


# thin skin to a youthful appearance


# Reduces wrinkles in 15 seconds

By John Whitehead, Media Services
BioTech Research has
announced a major new
development in the war on
skin aging.
This development is a
new lotion that gets collagen
and hyaluronic acid into the
skin without expensive injec-
tions which can cost up to
$ 1,000. It helps renew wrin-
kled and sagging skin to a
youthful appearance again.
This breakthrough new
lotion is AlphaBASICS™.
Users of AlphaBASICS™
show visible skin improve-
ment in only 15 seconds. They
show major skin improvement
in 4 to 12 weeks.
For more on this remarkable
AlphaBASICS'" lotion, here is
my interview with BioTech
Research's Chief of Staff For
Product Development, John
Whitakre.
Q. Mr. Whitakre, what
is AlphaBASICS'" and how
was this sensational new
lotion, developed?
•A. AlphaBASICS" 1 is the
first small molecule form of
collagen and hyaluronic acid.
Medical doctors for many
years have injected collagen
and hyaluronic acid into
facial skin to thicken the skin
and get rid of wrinkles and
sagging. This is because the
molecules in the past were
too large to be absorbed by
topical applications.
Then on November 2,
2000, ABC's Primetime Live
featured an investigative
report by Connie Chung on
the people of Yuzuri Hara,
Japan located in the moun-
tains near Tokyo. Chung
reported that the people in
Yuzuri Hara routinely-live
into their nineties and many
'times over one hundred with-
out disease and remain
youthful looking. Their skin
is smooth, unwrinkled, and it
does not sag even in their
nineties. After numerous sci-
entific studies, the secret of
their fountain of youth was
attributed to getting a small
molecule form of hyaluronic
acid that got ingested and
absorbed from a rare species
of potato that only grows
there in the village.
Scientists here in the U.S.
then initiated a major project to
find other more abundant
sources of small molecule
hyaluronic acid. After a long
laborious process they did find
an abundant source right here
in the U.S. And they picked up
a big bonus. The abundant
source that they found of small
molecule hyaluronic acid also
had a small molecule form of
collagen. They then had to go
through another extensive proj-
ect to extract the hyaluronic
acid and collagen which then
provided the ingredients for
AlphaBASICS' 1 '.
Q.HowdocsAlphaB ASICS'"
work to help renew skin?
A. Many recent clinical
studies have now shown that
two of the leading causes of
skin aging and damage are due
to the destruction of collagen
and hyaluronic acid by free
radicals, harmful enzymes,
harmful histamincs and toxins.
The body produces a min-
imal amount of collagen and
hyaluronic acid. But, this
BEFORE
Free radicals and toxins as we age cause
depletion of collagen and hyaluronic acid
which causes thin, wrinkled, sagging skin.
Molecules of ordinary collagen and ordinary
hyaluronic acid are too large to be absorbed
in the skin adequate amounts. Therefore, in
the past, they had to be injected.
AlphaBASICS™ APPLIED
Molecules of AlphaBASICS" 1 collagen and
AlphaBASICS 1 " hyafuronic acid are small
enough to be absorbed by the skin in ade-
quate amounts. AlphaBASICS" collagen
and hyaluronic acid go into the skin and
provide nutrients to help renew wrinkled
and sagging skin.
ARER
Skin is thicker, less wrinkled and less
sagged. AlphaBASICS 1 " continues to
provide the skin with collagen and
hyaluronic acid to help maintain healthy
and youthful skin.
SKIN SKIN
Molecules: Molecules:
Qc) = Ordinary collagen (BC) = AlphaBASICS" collagen
(H) = Ordinary hyaluronic acid (BH) = AlphaBASICS"" hyaluronic acid
SKIN

# BASICS™ users who got major skin improvements

Wow! I have searched everywhere for a product to seriously help out my dull skin tightening. I then applied makeup and the lotion did not affect my
skin. I was originally skeptical when I heard about AlphaBASICS'" but I am so makeup application at all. AlphaBASICS" lotion is the most sensational skin
glad 1 gave it a chance. It turns out to be the best thing I could have ever done. product I have ever tried. It also has made my skin softer. Nancy Suarez
Along with helping my dry skin, 1 have noticed it helped reduce the fine lines
around my eyes, plus it seems to be improving the elasticity in my skin. This is
the perfect lotion for anyone who wants to look better without having to waste
their time and money on expensive cosmetics. Jean Novak
I was impressed with AlphaBASICS'" lotion the very first time I applied it. I
have wrinkles under my eyes and fine line crow's feet to the sides. Within a
matter of seconds after applying the AlphaBASICS'" lotion the lines under my
eyes and to the side of my eyes were visibly reduced. 1 also could feel my
AlphaBASICS'" lotion is amazing. Within seconds I noticed that the fine lines
under and around my eyes were gone. It plumped up my skin almost immediate-
ly. My makeup went on smoother... even the fingertip that I had applied the
cream with felt soft. I kept noticing and touching my finger tip all day because ft
was so much softer than the rest of my hand. 1 told a male co-worker about how
this lotion softened my skin and he put some on his hand. He then told me he
kept feeling his hand because it was so much softer than the other hand. I would
highly recommend AlphaBASICS'" lotion. Mindy Cataldo
production diminishes as we
age. Therefore, the body does
not have enough collagen and
hyaluronic acid to repair the
damage.
Before, collagen and
hyaluronic acid could not be
provided in adequate amount
by topical solutions because
the molecules of these two
substances from most sources
are too large.
Therefore, as aforemen-
tioned, doctors had to inject
collagen and hyaluronic acid
into the skin to achieve repair.
Q. Why is collagen and
hyaluronic acid so impor-
tant to skin?
A. Collagen is the basic
building block and the glue
that holds other body tissues
together for nearly all tissues
of the body including skin.
Hyaluronic acid retains skin
moisture and functions as a
lubricant between the con-
nective tissues of the skin.
Hyaluronic acid also func-
tions as mortar between cells
in skin.
Q. What clinical studies
were done to prove the effec-
tiveness of AlphaBASICS 1 "?
A. There were a number of
clinical studies to prove the
effectiveness of AiphaBASICS'"
to improve skin. There were also
clinical studies that show the
AlphaBASICS'"collagen and
hyaluronic acid was definitely
being absorbed
Studies were carried out
on AlphaBASICS™ helping to
renew wrinkled and sagging
skin. These studies took high
resolution photographs before
the subjects started taking
AlphaBASICS'" and then
took photographs after differ-
ent time periods.
Q. What kind of results
were obtained from these
studies on the effectiveness
of AlphaBASICS'"?
A. In the studies on skin
improvement, most users
showed visible skin improve-
ment in only 15 seconds and
major skin improvement in 4
to 12 weeks.
Q. Have there been clin-
ical studies on the safety of
AlphaBASICS"?
A. Yes. These studies
showed no side effects for the
dosage used to achieve skin
improvement. Studies were
then conducted on doing over-
doses of AlphaBASICS™. It
was found that the dosage
could be increased to high lev-
els without any negative side
effects.
Q. I understand you are
running a sale today for
readers of this publication.
What is this sale?
A. AiphaBASICS'" ingre-
dients are very expensive and
time consuming to produce.
Therefore, AlphaBASICS™
will not be in stores for an
extended period of time. In
the meantime, readers can
order AlphaBASICS'" directly
from BioTech Research and
have it delivered by parcel
service to their homes.

cation can get AlphaB ASICS'"

# Dear Kathy

BY
KATHY GALLO

# MY SECRET HAS BEEN


# EXPOSED!

y Dear Kathy, my sister has a new 2 carat ring. She claims it
is real. It looks real. Can I ask her or is that in bad taste?
• Curious in Cuyahoga Falls, Ohio
Never, ever ask a woman if her jewelry is real. Always assume it
is. It is impossible to tell a high quality Cubic Zirconia from a
mined diamond with the naked eye, even a jeweler would need
magnification to tell the difference. So always assume it is.

Continued from previous page
described as an old soul," she says. "He's
mature and insightful. He can be in the mid-
dle of a chaotic situation and it will not take
him over.... Hollywood is not his entire life.
He has his friends outside the scene. He
attends church. ... It's part of his life."
That's not just puffery. Thomas proudly
shows off his pink- and green-highlighted
European history book. "Kinko's loves me,"
he says. "I'm highlighter nuts." He's waiting for
his PSAT results and honestly anxious about
taking the SAT. He wants to be accepted by
a top school, but not because he's a pinup.
"People have said, 'Oh, you're a celebrity
and that will help you get into a school,' "
Thomas says. "My answer has always been:
'OK, great, so I get into a school based on my
name. But how will I fare once I'm there? If I
can't be competitive, it's a waste of my time.'"
"I'M MAINTAINING CONTROL OF MY LIFE"
The decision to walk away is loaded with risk.
Certainly, young stars such as Jodie Foster and
Brooke Shields left for college and returned
to find success. But countless heartthrobs
become whatever-happened-to fodder. "His
decision is a most precarious one because he
has a home base there," says TV Guide's Matt
Roush. "Every time you have a flop movie,
you can always go back to the show. So he's
taking a chance on eroding his popularity."
The only people surprised by Thomas'
decision are those who don't know him. He
Check out more great
photos of Jonathan
Taylor Thomas at
www.usaweekend.com.
repeatedly stresses that Hollywood is an
industry, not a lifestyle. "I'm maintaining
control of my life," he says. The only jewelry
he displays is a modest silver ring — on his
finger, not some other body part. "I'd never
let this business dominate me or my family.
... Unless you control what you give and
what you take, it will consume you."
Like fellow child star Ron Howard, he'd
love to direct, but says he might forsake Holly-
wood altogether for law or politics. Mean-
while, he plans to take on movie projects as
long as they don't interfere with his studies.
On his final day of Home Improvement,
Thomas enjoys his last chance to cut up with
his co-stars. His surprise entrance prompts
big screams and applause from the live audi-
ence, as does his final bow. But as he walks on
the Taylors' carpeted steps for the last time,
heading out the door, Thomas doesn't look
back. Like Randy Taylor, he found out a long
time ago there's a lot to discover in the world.
Something beyond smash hits and stardom,
a world with real snow on its rooftops. C3

## 91



effort at robotic exploration of other
worlds. This is not just a matter of catering
to a widespread passion for exploration
and discovery; if we didn't have an ounce
of adventuresome spirit in us, it would
still be prudent and cost-effective to ex-
plore the planets (see box).
But, most of all, NASA needs to make
the connection of spaceflight with in-
ternational understanding and world
peace. I do not see any other activities—
such as Star Wars (SDI), appeals to na-
tional prestige or promises of techno-
logical spinoffs—that can provide a po-
litical justification for NASA suitable for
the 1990s. But protecting the environ-
ment, forging a common purpose with
othernations—especially former adver-
saries—and re-exciting the exploratory
imagination of people all over the world
constitute a sufficient political payoff to
justify a major, consistently funded Amer-
ican space program.
When you pack your bags for a big
trip, you never know what's in store for
you. The Apollo astronauts on their way
to and from the Moon photographed their
home planet. It was a natural thing to
do, but it had consequences that few fore-
saw. For the first time, the inhabitants
of Earth could see our world from above
—the whole Earth, the Earth in color,
the Earth as an exquisite white and blue
world set against the vast darkness of
space. Those images have awakened our
slumbering planetary consciousness; they
provide incontestable evidence that we
all share the same vulnerable planet—our
only home in the entire solar system.
They remind us of what is important and
what is not. The Saudi Arabian astro-
naut Prince Sultan Salman al-Saud, af-
ter his observations of the Earth from
the Discovery shuttle in 1985, recalled:
"The first day or so, we all pointed to
our countries. The third or fourth day,
we were pointing to our continents. By
the fifth day, we were aware of only one
Earth."
We may have found that perspective
just in time, just as our technology threat-
ens the habitability of our world (see box).
Whatever the reason we first mustered
the Apollo program, however mired in
Cold War nationalism it was, the ines-
capable recognition of the unity and fra-
gility of the Earth is its clear and lumi-
nous dividend, the unexpected gift of
Apollo. What began in deadly competi-
tion has led us to see that global cooper-
ation is the essential precondition for our
survival.
Travel is broadening. It's time to hit
the road again. HI
CarlSagan of Cornell University briefed
the Apollo crews before their missions
to the Moon and in 1969 received NASA's
Apollo Achievement Award. He is pres-
ident of the Pasadena-based Planetary
Society, the largest space-interest group
in the world.

# "I haven't aged in 20 years. I


# have a secret creme that makes


# me look forever younger!"

PARADE MAGAZINE-JULY 16,1989'PAGE 7

# Use it! You wont believe your eyes,


# but your minor and jealous friends


# will be the proof!


## by Zsa Zsa Gabor

Dahling, I'll tell you a secret.
Look at my face. All my jealous friends tell me I never
look my age. My skin looks 20 years younger than I
am. I haven't aged in 20 years. I always look younger.
Because I have a secret that makes my face look forever
younger — and beautiful.
You see me on television. Those closeups and those
lights show everything.
But on my face you never see anything but fresh, clean,
soft skin. No puffy eyes. No unsightly fine line wrinkles.
Even a beautiful chin and neck area. My face always
looks smooth and young.
Because I do something special — and I look like a
young woman under the brightest lights . . . and even
when I'm naughty and dance all night.
Now, I have another surprise.
Lots of my friends here in Hollywood never look their
real age. Rich and famous people who would kill me
if I revealed their names. They always look good. And,
I'll tell you the truth — we all share the same secret of
how to look years younger. I call it my "face saver."
They call it the "star maker." You'll call it "amazing."
But before I tell you who uses the secret — and how
you can have it — I must tell you what it is and how
it can change your life.
Dahling — it's a mahvelous creme that helps fight the
signs of aging. Just a few precious minutes each night
— and you look like you may have discovered the
Fountain of Youth. Take my word for it. My face and
my looks are something I never joke about.
Imagine, a wonder creme that helps smooth out fine
line wrinkles. That even may fade away years from your
appearance. That moisturizes and nurtures your
skin . . . pampers it ... beautifies it and protects it. And
even puts back what nature, time, and naughty living
take away.
Listen to me, dahling. I know about fancy cosmetics
and expensive cover-ups. They can't do much.
Ah, but my secret — see what it does for your face.
Go ahead, try it on problem areas like crow's-feet near
your eyes, wrinkles around nose and mouth, bags under
eyes and those terrible frown and laugh lines.
Then watch the amazing change that takes place every
night. See my secret help transform your appearance into
a smoother, younger look. You won't believe your eyes,
but your mirror and jealous friends will be the proof.
And the best dahling — are you ready for this? —
you'll love the results. You'll look mahvelous. Everyone
will want to know your secret. But dahling, you don't
tell them it's my creme.
Look af me. / luveat aged in 20 yeus. I always look younger.
My wonder Create fades away the yeus!
To try my secret, I, Zsa Zsa, make you this special
offer: Send for it, use it for 30 days at my risk. See what
it does for your face. I promise you'll look younger, more
beautiful and more desirable each day, every day. In fact,
I guarantee you'll love it or just return the label and I
will give you back every penny you paid.
It has to be mahvelous, dahling. It has my name on
it. And remember, I guarantee it. To send for my secret
formula, do this:
Rush your name and address on a piece of paper
together with payment for your choice of:
For 6 months economy size only *39.95 zzczo-?
For 60 days supply only *29.9S 22020-70
For 30 days supply only *19.95 22020-71

## What is Collagen? How Does it Affect Skin?

Collagen is a type of protein, fibrous In nature, that connects and supports other body tissues,
such as skin, bone, tendons, muscles, and cartilage It also supports the internal organs and is even
present in teeth. There are more than 25 types of collagen that occur naturally in the body
Collagen is one ot the most plentiful proteins present in the bodies of mammals. Including humans
In fact, it makes up about 25-30% of the total amount of proteins in the body. Collagen is sometimes
considered the glue that holds the body together Without It, the body would literally tall apart
Regular protein foods or protein powders do not contain enough collagen components, such as
the amino acids glycine and proline. Ingesting a lot of collagen from gelatin is benettcial to provide
building blocks for collagen In the body However, supplementing with Collagen Revive is essential
because this ingredient has special properties ot stimulating collagen production in the body
Often, collagen is discussed in relation to the skin. It works with keratin to provide the skin with
strength, flexibility end resilience
As people age, however, collagen degradation occurs, leading to wrinkles and facial sagging.
Therefore, collagen is an important substance to counter the visible effects of aging on the skin.
Some skin care professionals actually advise people on good nutrition and nutritional supplements
to stimulate the production of collagen in skin cells.

In an unprecedented gesture, Elton John
recorded “England’s Rose" and then ear­
marked all his proceeds to fund the Diana,
Princess of Wales’ Charities. To assist in this
effort. The International Showroom of
Undenwold Fine Jewelers has agreed to pur­
chase large volumes of Elton John’s CD to help
ensure Diana’s important charity work goes on.
Undenwold Jewelers will not sell these
CD’s. Instead, they will give them away FREE
to the first 10,000 people who return the

have already paid for your contribution.

your pin will be properly displayed and protected.

## Scientific Double Blind Clinical Pilot Study of


## Dr. Frank Ryan’s Abdominal Fat Reducer

Commissioned by Advanced Supplement Research and con­
ducted by a research group which has an expert staff consisting
of more than 32 board-certified physician investigators and more
than 38 ACRP certified clinical research coordinators. This group
conducts clinical studies for the major drug companies.
Test subjects did not exercise or diet differently. Both treatment
groups were provided calorie restricted diet instructions, were given
a daily dosage of Dr. Frank Ryan’s Abdominal Fat Reducer or Placebo.
Dr. Frank Ryan’s Abdominal Fat Reducer group experienced a 400%
reduction in fat mass, 4 times reduction in BMI at 4 weeks, 4 times
greater weight loss at 4 weeks, 2 times reduction in waist circumfer­
ence and nearly a 50% decrease in calorie and carbohydrate intake.
(To review this clinical study, log on to www.clinicalstudiespubitshmg.coni)

I .) CLA decreases abdominal

by inhibiting this fat-storing en­
zyme LPL. CLA can help reduce

ergy, thereby increasing fat oxi­

A double blind clinical pilot
study was conducted on Dr.
Frank Ryan’s Abdominal Fat Re-
ducer. The study on “AbGone
Extra Strength” subsequently en-
dorsed by Dr. Ryan was commis-
sioned by Advanced Supplement
Research and used a research
group which currently has an ex-
pert staff consisting of more than
32 board-certified physician in-
vestigators and more than 38
ACRP certified clinical research
coordinators. This group con-
ducts clinical studies for the ma-
jor drug companies.
While diet and exercise sup-
port weight loss, the formula in
Dr. Ryan’s Abdominal Fat Re-
ducer demonstrates promising
support for weight loss as well.
The Dr. Ryan group had results
in the right direction showing a
promising reduction in weight.
The weight loss was numerically
larger than the changes in the
group taking the placebo.
At week 4, the test subjects
in the study lost weight and en-
hanced their overall appearance
(by reducing their pot belly)
compared to the group that did
not take Dr. Ryan’s Abdominal
Fat Reducer. Both groups were
given the same dietary instruc-
tions, were provided calorie re-
stricted diet instructions and
continued thier normal physical
routine and did not do additional
exercise.
In addition at week 8, the
study showed that Dr. Frank
Ryan’s Abdominal Fat Reducer
formula increased resting meta-
bolic rate (calorie burning) so that
you lose weight faster. And, the
study found that the all-natural
Dr. Frank Ryan’s Abdominal Fat
Reducer pill helped produce
weight loss safely.
How does Dr. Frank Ryan’s
Abdominal Fat Reducer work?
John Whitehead, spokesperson for
Endless Youth and Life explained.
Whitehead revealed, “It was
found in a number of research
studies on laboratory animals and
later confirmed in human studies,
that a substance called Conjugated
Linoleic Acid (CLA) decreases
abdominal body fat in three ways:
1.) CLA decreases abdominal
body fat mass by decreasing the
amount of abdominal fat that is
stored after eating; 2.) CLA in-
creases the rate of fat breakdown
in abdominal fat cells; and 3.)
CLA increases the rate of abdomi-
nal fat metabolism which decreas-
es the total number of fat cells.
You can think of CLA as a match
that lights the fuse in abdominal
fat. This fuse also increases meta-
bolic rate that can result in more
fat loss. Dr. Frank Ryan’s Abdom-
inal Fat Reducercontains the ef-
fective dose of CLA.
Whitehead said, “There are
also a number of other beneficial
effects to CLA that help decrease
the future storage of fat.”
“CLA interferes with an en-
zyme called lipoprotein lipase
(LPL). LPL is an enzyme that
helps store fat in the body. 2 So,
by inhibiting this fat-storing en-
zyme LPL, CLA can help reduce
the re-accumulation of fat.”
“CLA also helps the body use
its existing abdominal fat for en-
ergy, thereby increasing fat oxi-
dation and energy expenditure.”
Dr. Frank Ryan’s Abdominal
Fat Reducer also contains other
super highly advanced all-natur-
al ingredients that help reduce
abdominal fat. Of course, a
healthy diet and exercise pro-
gram, along with Dr. Ryan’s Ab-
dominal Fat Reducer, could re-
sult in even greater results.
Studies have shown that Dr.
Frank Ryan’s Abdominal Fat Re-
ducer ingredients increase the
rate of fat metabolism, which re-
duces both surface and intestinal
abdominal fat and helps inhibit
future formation of these abdom-
inal fats. 3, 4, 5 One of these ingre-
dients is a very high quality and
potent extract of green tea. This
extract is EGCG, which has been
shown in clinical studies to
quickly increase metabolism
which helps to reduce abdominal
body fat over time. 4 These ingre-
dients start working in 20 min-
utes and were clinically mea-
sured at 60 minutes and at 120
minutes to increase calorie burn-
ing, which is the first step to re-
ducing the pot belly.
Based on the results of this
first double blind clinical pilot
study, Dr. Ryan’s Abdominal Fat
Reducer is available for you now.
Your satisfaction is guaranteed.
Dr. Ryan’s other products include
topicals, which reduce wrinkles
and tighten saggy skin without
plastic surgery. People who order
Dr. Frank Ryan’s Abdominal Fat
Reducer will have access to these
highly advanced products used
by the Hollywood stars.
Whitehead stated, “The in-
gredients in Dr. Frank Ryan’s
Abdominal Fat Reducer are very
expensive. But, for your readers
who wish to order Dr. Frank
Ryan’s Abdominal Fat Reducer
direct, we are offering them a
discount if they order within 10
days.”
Today readers of this publi-
cation can get Dr. Frank Ryan’s
Abdominal Fat Reducer at a ma-
jor discount if they order in 10
days from the date of this publi-
cation. The regular price of a 30-
day supply of Dr. Frank Ryan’s
Abdominal Fat Reducer is $59
plus $3.95 shipping and handling
for a total of $62.95.
But, for this 10-day discount,
readers can get $20 off plus free
shipping and handling and pay
only $39 delivered for Dr. Frank
Ryan’s Abdominal Fat Reducer.
For readers who want to obtain a
30-day supply of Dr. Frank
Ryan’s Abdominal Fat Reducer at
this 10-day discount price, please
see the Weight Loss Discount
Coupon on this page.
There is a strict limit of 3
bottles at this discount price – no
exceptions please. For those
readers ordering after 10 days
from the date of this publication,
we reserve the right to either ac-
cept or reject order requests at
the discounted price.

## How scientists believe new Apatrim ™ works

## Clinical studies show


## how Apatrim works

1. Suppresses appetite*
Apatrim may help suppress the
hunger sensory mechanism
of the hypothalamus.
2. Limits fat accumulation*
Apatrim may hinder the enzyme
Citrate Lyase which helps reduce
fat accumulation in the body.
3. Reduces fat formation*
Apatrim may inhibit the enzyme
Malonyl Coenzyme A which helps
the body in the formation of fat.
NEW APATRIM
Clinical trends suggest it helps inter-
rupt hunger signals so APPETITE IS
SUPPRESSED*
New Apatrim has been clinically tested and scientific trends suggest this
new diet supplement uses multiple mechanisms of action that can assist in
weight loss as illustrated:
By M.J. MOORE
FIGURE 1
Universal Media Syndicate
UMS - Call Center operators are
bracing for the surge of calls from
dieters around the country who will
be trying to get this newly released
diet pill.
This new weight loss supplement,
which is not available in stores, is
every dieter’s dream.
The developers of this remarkable
discovery have named it Apatrim™.
Everyone who has struggled with
weight loss would surely agree;
they would love to lose weight and
inches without changing their diet
or adding exercise to their daily
routine.
Well, that’s exactly what the clini-
cal trial 1 showed and that’s why this
new weight loss supplement is get-
ting so much attention.
Participants in the clinical trial
who took the supplement as directed
got great results and they were in-
structed not to add any exercise or
change eating habits.
Scientists believe that Apatrim
can suppress appetite which may
mean fewer calories being con-
sumed. Consumers should keep in
mind that there is no substitute for
proper diet and exercise when it
comes to losing weight. Meaning-
ful weight loss requires consum-
ing fewer calories than the body
burns.
Apatrim can be taken with com-
plete confidence; there is no danger
of embarrassing side effects.* This
is unlike a recently approved ‘fat
blocking’ diet product where the
potential to experience ‘accidents’
exists.
WHY SO MUCH EXCITEMENT?
Scientists have uncovered an
amazing compound that has a known
ability to naturally control hunger
pangs.*
This compound comes from a
natural plant extract, and is not a
drug. It is the active ingredient in
Apatrim, and has been clinically
shown to get excellent results that
include weight loss and a reduction
in waistline.*¹
A clinical study showed that
participants taking Apatrim’s ac-
tive ingredient lost an average of 5
times more weight than those tak-
ing a placebo. Participants also lost
an average of 1 inch off their waist-
line, with some losing as much as
3 inches in just 4 weeks.*¹
These great results are what’s get-
ting everyone so excited about this
new weight loss breakthrough.
“The initial feedback from every-
one who’s heard about Apatrim has
been incredible, they can’t wait to
start using it,” said Valerie Land,
Director of Call Center Operations.
CLINICAL RESULTS
The U.S. clinical study was con-
ducted in Los Angeles under the
direction of Dr. Ronald M. Lawrence, 2
M.D., Ph.D. a former clinical profes-
sor at the University of California’s
Los Angeles School of Medicine.
The study included healthy, over-
weight individuals between the
ages of 31 and 73. Their caloric in-
take and level of exercise was not
disclosed.
The participants were instructed
not to change the food they were
eating and not to add any exercise;
in other words, no changes to their
daily routine. They were told to take
Apatrim 30 minutes before lunch
and dinner.
The results were stunning.
An amazing 100% of the partici-
pants who took the active ingredi-
ent as instructed either lost weight
or inches off their waistline during
the 4 week study.* In contrast, only
one person taking the placebo lost
weight, just half-a-pound, and not
one reduced their waistline.
Some participants experienced in-
credible results, losing as much as 8
pounds and up to 3 inches off their
waistline.* 1
Apatrim may just be the weight
loss breakthrough that people who
want to lose weight without starv-
ing or suffering through intense
exercise have been waiting for.
And who knows how much weight
people could lose if exercise and a re-
duced calorie diet were added while
taking Apatrim.
HOW IT WORKS
The active ingredient in Apatrim
comes from a plant that grows in
India.
This ‘miracle’ plant is Caralluma
Fimbriata and it has been used
by native tribes in India for centu-
ries to reduce hunger and quench
thirst during times of famine and
drought.*
Until recently, the only way to
get these benefits was to eat the
plant.
But scientists have developed a
proprietary method of extraction
that is protected by U.S. Patent
#7,060,308. This process enables
Apatrim’s manufacturer to put the
plant’s benefits into a pill.
Scientists believe Apatrim’s active
ingredient works by blocking the
hunger signals that are sent from
the stomach to the brain (Figure 1).
The brain then thinks that the stom-
ach is full, causing a reduction in
appetite.*
This can mean less calories being
eaten which everyone knows leads to
weight loss.*
HIGHLY RECOMMENDED
Professionals in the weight loss
industry are recommending Apatrim
to their clients.
Dr. Joseph Dietz, Director of Health
Science, Research & Development for
PatentHEALTH, LLC., the health care
company that developed Apatrim,
was very impressed with the weight
loss and safety data coming from the
clinicals.
“While there is no substitute for
proper diet and exercise, when I saw
the results from the clinical trials, I
immediately recommended that we
use this new compound in Apatrim,”
said Dr. Dietz.
“In addition to these great results,
Apatrim is stimulant free and has no
reported adverse effects.”
“Scientific trends also suggest
that in addition to appetite con-
trol, Apatrim can help block the
enzymes that cause body fat to ac-
cumulate and form,” added Dietz.*
When all the possible benefits
of this weight loss supplement are
considered, it’s no wonder profes-
sionals are recommending it to their
clients.
HOW TO GET IT
Apatrim is now available to diet-
ers in the U.S.; but it is not being sold
in pharmacies. Those that want this
new diet supplement must contact
the company directly.
The company has set up
National Order Hotlines to han-
dle the expected surge of calls
from people who want this
weight loss breakthrough
right now. Consumers must
call the number assigned
to their region and ask for
Dept. AP832. The coun-
try has been divided into
3 regions so everyone
has a fair chance to get
Apatrim.
Initial supplies are
limited and operators
have been instructed
to fill orders on a first-
come, first-served
basis. Those not get-
ting through may have
to wait until more
product is produced,
which could take as
long as six weeks.
Great results, no
embarrassing side
effects and clinically
supported data. It’s
not hard to see why
Apatrim appears to
be the smart choice for
anyone who wants to
lose weight without suf-
fering through intense ex-
ercise or unhealthy diets. (cid:78)

Apatrim, so there are limited
supplies. To ensure everyone has

loss supplement, the company

This will enable everyone to
have a chance to get Apatrim
since the initial supply is limited

below for your region. Operators

By M.J. MOORE
Universal Media Syndicate
UMS - Dieters have always
dreamed of losing weight without
starving or adding exercise.
Well that dream may be about to
come true.
National Order Hotline operators
are bracing for the surge of calls from
dieters that want to get the newly
released diet supplement called
Apatrim.
“The initial consumer response
has been unbelievable, we’re expect­
ing to get a tremendous amount of
calls,” said Valerie Land, Director of
Call Center Operations.
So, what’s all the fuss about?
Scientists have uncovered a
weight loss breakthrough that
is clinically shown to get results
without the addition of exercise or
diets.*1
The developers of this break­
through discovery have just ap­
proved it for distribution.
Apatrim now makes this weight
loss breakthrough available to
dieters in the US.
The key ingredient has a known
ability to control hunger pangs. Be­
cause of this, Apatrim is being called
“willpower in a bottle.”
A clinical study showed that par­
ticipants taking the active ingredi­
ent in Apatrim lost an average of 5
times more weight than those tak­
ing a placebo.
In addition to losing weight, par­
ticipants also lost an average of I
inch with some people losing as
much as 3 inches off of their waist­
line in just 4 weeks. * 1
An amazing 83% of the partici­
pants lost weight without additional
exercise or changing the foods they
ate.*
Dr. Ronald M. Lawrence,2 M.D.,
Ph.D. a former clinical professor at
the University of California’s Los
Angeles School of Medicine con­
ducted the clinical study.
The participants were instructed
not to change the types of food they
were eating and not to add any ex­
ercise. They were told to take Apat-
rim’s active ingredient 30 minutes
before lunch and dinner.
The results were stunning.
Participants who took Apatrim
lost as much as 8 pounds and up to
3 inches off their waistline during
the 4-week clinical study.
This is exciting news for people
who want to lose weight without
starving or suffering through hours
of intense exercise.
How does it work?
Apatrim’s secret comes from its
active ingredient which is an ex­
tract of a plant that is found in India.
The extraction process is propri­
etary and is protected by US patent
#7,060,308.

# Demand soars for newly approved diet pill


# Public has 7 days to get free pills that were the subject of ConsumerLab


# test featured on NBC, Today Show, CNN, Oprah Magazine

BY LAURA FISHER
Unweisol Media Syndicate
Regional Health Hotline operators
are dishing out a full month's supply of
free diet pills to dieters from all across
the country.
Beginning today, for just 7 days only,
consumers will flood Regional Health
Hotlines that have been set up for each
time zone.
They'll be trying to beat the clock in
order to get a free supply of a diet pill
that is newly approved for quality.
This massive support effort is
being coordinated to provide a free full
month's supply of PatentLEAN* to every
adult over age 18 who calls the toll free
hotline. They will only be asked to cover
the cost for just the second month.
The generous program provides
the first month free for those who beat
the deadline. But, the free program
faces possible cuts due to supply chain
shortages.
It all started when a highly publi-
cized ConsumerLabiCom report ap-
peared recently approving the quality of
the diet pill called PatentLEAN".

# New pill targets fat and water in the


# abdomen that cause the pot belly

# of Yale, Pittsburgh, UCLA, and California

By John Whitehead, Media Services
A major new breakthrough
pill with ingredients that tar­
get abdominal fat and water
that cause the pot belly has
been announced by BioTech
Research1®.
The brand name of this pill
is AbGONE'* It is now avail­
able to the public.
AbGON E'“ was devel­
oped from concepts in re­
search conducted at the Uni­
versities of Yale. Pittsburgh,
UCLA. and California, It was
found in this research that fat
in the abdomen is different
than the rest of your body.
And. there are 2 types of ab­
dominal fat, outer fat and in­
testinal fat.
Certain factors cause fat to
collect in the abdominal area
in excess.
But what makes abdominal
fat different from the rest of
the fat in the body also provid­
ed researchers with a way to
reduce it with a number of nat­
ural substances which reduce
both types of abdominal fat.
They also found a way to re­
duce excess abdominal water.
The lead developer of this
remarkable new pill, Ab-
GONE'*, with these ingredi­
ents that reduce abdominal fat
and water. was Rehan Jalali,
nationally recognized nutri­
tionist and author for BioTech
Research .
Here is my eye-opening
interview with Mr. Jalali, Re­
seat cli studies are noted and
referenced in this interview *
Q. Mr. .filial!, how did
you develop this remark­
able AbGONE'" pill with in­
gredients that target fat and
water in the abdomen?
A. Ii took live years to de­
velop the AbGONE'* pill,
We started out by review­
ing large volumes of research
that had been done on why so
much fat is disproportionately
stored in the abdomen. This
research was conducted at
Yale University.2
This research found that
abdominal fat was different
than in the rest of the body.'
From this initial research,
we knew we could develop a
pill to reduce abdominal fat.
We also found that there
were harmful effects of ab­
dominal excess fat and excess
retained water. These includ­
ed the fact that people with a
pot hells had a greater ten­
dency to certain health prob-
Ictus.2 We also found that
they had social difficulties
and had greater rates of un­
employment and divorce.'
Q, It has always been
thought in the scientific
community that you could
not spot reduce fat. Is that
not true?
A. I he ingredients in Ab
GONE do not spot reduce or­
dinary fat. They help reduce
ordinary fat uniformly over the
entire body The ingredients in
AbGON I:* enable the body to
reduce excess water and fat in
lite abdomen that the body
could not reduce before And
they help inhibit the excess
collection of abdominal fat iii
AbGONE'” lead developer Rehan
Jalali is a nationally recognized nu­
tritionist and author who has ap­
peared in NEWSWEEK, Muscle & Fit­
ness, Oxygen, Men's Fitness, Mus­
cle Media and many other maga­
zines and scientific journals. He has
developed over IOO cutting edge
products for the nutritional supple-
ment industry._________________
ond is intestinal fat which is
deep in the abdomen.
the future. Therefore, the ab
domen is reduced in size much
better than bebite
O How is abdominal fat
different from other fat in
the body?
A Abdominal tat is much
more sensitive to a certain
hormone which enlarges the
fat. I will elaborate shortly.
There are basically tw o dit-
ferent typesot fat in the body,
The first is outer fat found un­
der the skin surface. The sec-
Now', this is important.
It is possible to reduce the
surface fat in the body but
still have significant abdomi­
nal intestinal fat.
That is why. even when
people become super thin and
have no visible fat on their
body, they often still have a
pot belly. That is because the
intestinal fat is still collected
deep iii the abdomen.
Q. How do the ingredi­
ents in ANGONE1* help re­
duce abdominal surface and
intestinal fat?
A, We found in a number
of research studies on labora­
tory animals, later confirmed
iii human studies, a substance
called Conjugated Linoieic
Acid (CUA). Studies of GLA
suggest that CLA decreases
body fat in three ways: I.)
CLA decreases body fat mass
by decreasing the amount of
fat that is stored after eating;
2.) CLA increases the rate of
fat breakdown in fat cells; and
3.) CLA increases the rate of
fat metabolism which de­
creases the total number of fat
cells. You can think of CLA
as a match that lights the fuse
in fat. This fuse increases the
metabolic rate of fat that can
result in subsequent fat loss.
Studies have shown that
you cun reduce abdominal fat
within 4 weeks. AbGONE'*
contains a good dose of CLA.
There are also a number of
other beneficial effects to
CLA that help decrease the
future storage ot tut
Q. How can Cl.A help
decrease the future storage
of Tat ?
A. CLA interferes w ith an
en/y me called lipoprotein li­
pase
1
1 .PL i I Pl I'- an enzy me
thai helps store tai rn the
bodylfe. So. by inhibiting this
Lit storing enzyme LPL, CLA
can help reduce the re accumu­
lation of tat.
CLA also helps the body
use its existing fat tor energy,
thereby increasing fat oxida­
tion and energy expenditure.
Q. What is the hormone
that causes fat to accumu­
late disproportionately in
the body?
A. The hormone Cortisol
has been found in studies at
UCLA. Yale and many other

tribute to the collection ot fat

fects Higher levels ot Corti­
sol arc harmful.

found that stress directly in­
creases Cortisol levels to the

# House OKs


# stiff penalties


# for gasoline


# price gouging

WASHINGTON (AP) - Re­
sponding to high costs at the
pump, the House approved leg­
islation Wednesday that would
outlaw gasoline price gouging.
• Many lawmakers said that
may be easier to say than to de­
tect or enforce.
The legislation would penalize
individuals or companies for
taking "unfair advantage" or
charging "unconscionably exces­
sive" prices for gasoline and oth­
er fuels.
Opponents said the language
was too vague and that the Fed­
eral Trade Commission, which
would enforce the law, has not
clearly defined price gouging.
"I don't know what 'uncon­
scionably excessive' means,"
said Rep. Joe Barton, R-Texas.
The bill's chief sponsor, Demo­
cratic Rep. Bart Stupak of Michi­
gan, said he had no doubt the
FTC would be able to determine
price gouging once the agency
had a law to uphold.
The measure would establish
the first federal law against en
r
ergy price gouging. The FTC
now can investigate price ma­
nipulation under antitrust laws.
Currently, 29 states have price
gouging statutes; enforcement
varies widely.
Stupak's proposal only would
go into effect - and then for just
30 days - if the president de­
clared an energy emergency.
The bill calls for penalties of
up to $150 million for compa­
nies and up to $2 million and 10
years imprisonment for individ­
uals found to be engaged in
price gouging.
Twenty-nine state have vari­
ous price gouging statutes, but
the vary widely in enforcement
The FTC has investigated alle­
gations of price manipulation
but failed to find widespread vi­
olations. In a report last year, the
agency said an investigation af­
ter Hurricane Katrina hit in
2005 uncovered 15 incidents
that could have been price goug­
ing. But other factors also could
have explained the high prices,
it said.

of fat that is stored after eating;
2.) CLA increases the rate of
fat breakdown in fat cells; and
3.) CLA increases the rate of

Whitakre also stated, "CLA
interferes with an enzyme
called lipoprotein lipase
(LPL). LPL is an enzyme that
helps store fat in the body. 2
So, by inhibiting this fat-stor­
ing enzyme LPL, CLA can
help reduce the re-accumula­
tion of fat.
CLA also helps the body
use its existing fat for energy,
thereby increasing fat oxida­
tion and energy expenditure."

Q. Are there any side effects
ur risks with the Easy Willpower
Weight lx>ss System?
A. Besides losing all the
weight you've ever dreamed of, all
the side effects are positive:
improved self-esteem, happier feel­
ings, greater energy. better concen­
tration and focus, more assertive­
ness, better sleep, less tension and
stress.
Q. Is it safe?
A. Absolutely.
Q. What exactly is the Easy
Willpower Weight Loss System?
A. First, let me ask if you’ve
ever been driving home from work
and passed the exit or street where
you should have turned to get
home? Of course! Everyone has
been in a deep state of mi n.d where
they pass an exit going home or find
themselves day dreaming from time
to time.
It’s a sense of calmness and
deep thought.
That is how- the Easy Willpow­
er Weight Loss System works.
It is a CD system that takes you
through an extremely safe and nat­
ural state of self hypnosis.
Real hypnosis is nothing like
you see on TV. You will not bark
like a dog, you will not lose all feel­
ing or knowledge of yourself, that
just is not realistic.
Plus, you can bring yourself out
of self hy pnosi s at any ti me.
It is a very easy and relaxing
process that has worked for over
100 .(XX) people with absolutely no
harm or side effects.
That is because self hypnosis is
truly a feeling of calmness and deep
thought.
The Easy Willpower Weight
Loss System is a Gastric Bypass
Hypnosis Surgery which is a
process w here 1 guide you through
a powerful hypnotic experience that
is simulating the actual bariatrics
surgery through a CD.
During the process,you will
virtually go to a hospital and go
through the procedure of having a
band placed on your stomach, sur­
gically.
You will feel as if you are actu­
ally having gastric bypass surgery,
but without risk, pain or side-eftects
and without spending $35,(XX).00
dollars. Most people say after the
“surgery” they feel very good,
relaxed and excited, and physically
they feel a tightening of their stom­
ach.
After the “surgery”, you can eat
regular foods. You don’t need to be
on any special diet, but you will eat
much less and healthier foods. The
suggestions are that you will eat 5-7
spoonfuls or forkfuls at a time, and
eat only when you are physically
hungry.
Some people say they really
feel like their stomach is smaller—
the size of a golf bull.
Q. I’ve never been hypno­
tized. The thought is a little scary
to me, but I can see the huge ben­
efits of this program. What do
you tell people to help them feel

safe about self-hypnosis?
A. Hypnosis is a natural state
of deep relaxation and focused con­
centration.
In that state, your subconscious
mind is more available to sugges
tion. The suggestions are all posi
tive and beneficial. In fact, we all go
in and out of a light state of hypno­
sis each day. when we are falling
asleep at night and when we wake
in the morning.
It’s that very pleasant, in-
between state, where you are aware
of everything and every one around
you, but you just don’t want to
move. You could move if you
wanted to, but it feels so good to
stay where you are. In that state, the
subconscious mind is available for
suggestion.
With my program,all the sug­
gestions are about looking and feel­
ing your best, having great energy,

being turned off to harmful food,

Everyone can be h> pnotized

No one can be hypnotized

ment.
